name: Team Haley Stevens
subject: Your Founding Donor Status enclosed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Our deadline is nearly here

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11288?t=2&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
---
null, our deadline is nearly here, but we're still short of our goal to reach 25,000 Founding Donors to kick off this election year in the strongest possible position.
**Here's why this goal is so important:** Michigan is now ranked as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip. That's why national Republicans are targeting our race and why MAGA megadonors are already spending big to flip this battleground red.
**Haley is going to need every bit of grassroots support she can get to fight back and win this crucial race. But we just checked our records, and it looks like we're still missing your gift:**
_**Team Stevens Supporter Record**_
**Supporter ID:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11256?t=3&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
**2026 Founding Donor: NOT YET**
**Percent to Goal:** **87**
**Founding Donor Deadline: 11:59 P.M. TOMORROW**
**If you've been waiting for the right moment to step up, this is it, null.**[**So we're asking: Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us close the gap and keep Michigan blue?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11256?t=4&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11257?t=5&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11258?t=6&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11259?t=7&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11256?t=8&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
---
Thank you so much for coming through in this important moment,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11368?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11369?t=10&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=11&akid=1818%2E49239%2EMfZhcW)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

subject: your signature is needed!! (it's about the Electoral College)
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR) Listen, we’ve emailed you OVER and OVER again about how important it is to ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all!

**REMEMBER:** Top Democrats like Elizabeth Warren agree that abolishing the Electoral College is the ONLY WAY to stop Republicans from stealing future presidential elections.

[But, literally NOBODY in your area has signed onto our petition... **do you even care, team?!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71426?t=3&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR)

[**We’re re-opening our petition for the next 5 hours ONLY in your area! Team, if you truly care about helping to save our democracy, you’ll sign on before it’s too late.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71426?t=4&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR) [ **125,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign our petition now to show Congress there’s massive support for abolishing the Electoral College once and for all! >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71426?t=5&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR) | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71426?t=6&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR)
---

\-------- FORWARDED MESSAGE --------

**BREAKING via _NBC_ :** "Trump just realigned the entire political map. Democrats have 'no easy path' to fix it."
[**Elizabeth Warren is calling for an END to the Electoral College now. Without 125,OOO signatures, ****we won 't be able to show Democrats in Congress there's a critical mass. Please sign the petition now:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71426?t=7&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71426?t=8&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR)
---
This petition is registered to you only.

Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

_Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory._

**Now, Sen. Elizabeth Warren is urgently pleading with Democrats:**
We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.

**So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again.**

[**_If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71426?t=9&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71426?t=10&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR)
---
Thank you,

_Fight for Reform_
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=11&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=12&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR)

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=17&refcode2=23783_4449941_81YlFR&akid=23783%2E4449941%2E81YlFR)

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Trump’s next war just started – and no one voted for it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Peter ,
On Friday night, Donald Trump sent U.S. forces into Venezuela without Congressional approval in what many consider to be an unconstitutional and illegal act of war.
This isn’t about democracy. It’s not even about drugs. It’s about oil, control, and Trump’s obsession with power. And once again, he’s doing it without a shred of accountability.
Top Republicans are cheering him on – even those who admit they haven’t been fully briefed. They’re falling in line behind Trump’s unilateral war-making, while Democrats are raising the alarm: this was an illegal strike carried out without a declaration of war or a vote from Congress.
At GOTV PAC, we’re sounding the alarm too – and working to elect Democrats who believe in the Constitution, not autocracy.
If you’re with us, we need you in this fight.

Top Republicans are cheering him on – even those who admit they haven’t been fully briefed. | **Are you still with me, Peter?** I’m checking in because I know that a _lot_ has happened over the last year. I know that people are seeing their healthcare, retirement security, and job protections get stripped away to make room for billionaire tax breaks. I know that this administration's mass deportation plan is disrupting communities and turning neighbors against each other. And I know that fascists in D.C. are pushing the limits of their power, and will _keep_ pushing until people either accept their extremism or give up. **But Peter, I want YOU to know that I’m standing ten toes down against this cruelty. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Tell Congress to get a spine and Stop Trump's War in Venezuela
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Stop Trump's War in Venezuela](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3c20764-382b-45b8-8d40-e8e398d9ada6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T511f6d4d-75a9-46d6-8714-5581ab3a9bb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Quick links: [Go to action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bb29dc2-261e-4429-97bc-2ffa489d7468/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [Discuss on Substack](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc428228d-53fc-4053-ac52-f4f278f5fb46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [Subscribe](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40ff660d-4ad3-48f0-8a9f-f857ae9a0549/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) (free or paid) | Unsubscribe at bottom | [See more actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td10843a5-f813-4167-b83d-901639363e3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ Donald Trump has gotten us into a full-on war with Venezuela, something that precisely zero Americans wanted (okay, maybe 3 or 4, including Trump). it’s stupid, it’s dangerous, we need to end this insanity NOW. **Congress has the power from the Constitution and the War Powers Act to end this. [Tell them to do it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1c5fe61-b977-498e-b803-2a6a17eac315/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** It’s hard to stress how stupid and dangerous launching this war was. Venezuela represented zero threat to the US, and attacking them just pissed off roughly 30 million people, and probably every country in the area (now wondering if they’re next). All this does is piss off our adversaries, alienate our friends, and put American soldiers and civilians alike in danger. We must end it NOW. **[Add your name, and tell Congress to act, and end Trump’s war NOW.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9caec496-9b44-43f1-a27e-117fbe5a6a23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

name: Ken Martin
subject: Trump has committed the United States to “running” another country
body:
---
Derek, Trump promised peace, but has delivered war. For months, the Trump administration has escalated conflict in Venezuela with unconstitutional and illegal strikes, and lied to the American people. **Now, Trump has committed the United States to running another country for the foreseeable future while Americans foot the bill for regime change.** This weekend, Trump finally said the quiet part out loud. The justification for this war isn’t about stemming the flow of drugs. This is about regime change. This is about enriching oil corporations and billionaires. Congress must immediately assert its constitutional authority over American military action — the same authority Trump’s own chief of staff said he needs. This is the worst kind of betrayal from Trump. He committed the United States to an uncertain role in South America with an indeterminate timeline. As Trump’s influence over the country and the world wanes, he is ready and willing to endanger Americans and abandon the Constitution as a last-ditch effort to hold on to power and relevancy. We deserve better than this. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?refcode=em_20260104_5685_fr&refcode2=5685_22930333_xXpsjo&akid=5685%2E22930333%2ExXpsjo)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Their new way to suppress mail-in ballots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
This is exactly how we can tell that the party behind this change doesn't care about anything other than winning elections, Team.
That's because that same party once led the charge for widespread mail-in ballot use in the 90's -- in key states like Arizona, all in the name of democracy and the right to vote -- is strangely silent now that those same voters might be silenced by administrative mail delays.
Team, the MAGA movement and the party it has taken over won't stop until the only valid ballots being counted are their own. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us fight back and make sure every vote counts in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010426_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Fox 7 Austin: New Postal Service guidance on postmarks could affect ballot, tax deadlines [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010426_2&amount=25]
The day you mail something may no longer count as the actual mailing date, Team.
Legally speaking, the date stamped on your mail is when it counts as being sent, from your bills to your taxes to your ballot. For decades, that's been stamped the day you gave it to the United States Postal Service (USPS), whether you handed it to your mail carrier, left it in a mailbox, or dropped it at the local post office.
USPS has now reversed that practice. Your mail will be stamped the day it hits a regional processing facility, not your local post office. That could be a day, or more, later than when you handed your mail over.
What does this mean? If you live in a state with a mail-in ballot grace period -- something most states still have, even though MAGA is trying to end those -- your ballot still counts if it was postmarked by Election Day and received in the grace period after Election Day. In this case, however, a ballot mailed on Election Day may not be postmarked as Election Day, making your ballot automatically invalid even though you followed the rule of law and the postmark date is out of your control.
Our first priority is making sure every voter understands this change and how it can impact them -- not just in terms of vote-by-mail, but their bills, their taxes, responses to companies, you name it. What we all think is the deadline may not be the deadline and that's a huge deal that's being under-reported by the media.
We also need to make sure every mail-in voter across the country knows how to get their ballot in on time, especially those most vulnerable to this change, like the elderly, rural Americans who live far from USPS regional facilities, our military service members, and young people who are voting by mail away from home.
Team, it's a tough time of year and we know we've been asking for a lot. Will you pitch in $25 or whatever you can today and help us spread the word about these changes so we can protect mail-in ballots? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010426_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010426_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010426_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010426_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010426_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010426_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010426_2&amount=35]
Whether you can fuel our work with a gift or not, we appreciate your support and we hope you can spread the word about this change to your friends, family, and colleagues. You never know how a quick mention of something like this news might truly impact someone else's life.
Thank you,
The Voter Action Project Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010426_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010426_2&amount=20]

body:
We need to stand up to Trump’s lies.| |
---
| | Dear Peter – it’s Congressman Bennie Thompson.
---
| | I was proud to serve on the January 6th Committee with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren.

After the violent attacks on the Capitol, our Committee worked diligently to uncover the threats to our democracy and deliver justice.

Since that day, Donald Trump has never stopped undermining the rule of law, degrading our democracy, eroding our Constitution, or lying about the work of our Committee.

In the face of Trump’s lawless contempt for our justice system and our democracy, Zoe Lofgren has led the resistance, fighting to uphold our Constitution and stop Republicans’ far-right policies.

Patriot, In the wake of the assassination attempt on my father's life - and the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk - the opposition has made things clear:

**Violence is all they have left.** They don't want to talk. Or debate. Because they know they'll lose. So how do we as patriots live in an America where so many people openly despise us... and wish us harm? Well, that's something the Trump family knows a lot about. In fact, I've had so many people ask me how our family has endured living under constant attack for a decade that I decided to write a book about it. **It 's called _Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation._**_ _

That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. That day I was watching the rally at home. Both my 4-year-old daughter and my 6-year-old son were sitting on my lap. We stared in shock at the TV as "Grandpa" dropped to the ground behind the podium. I remember thinking that he was gone. But the worst attacks on my dad have resulted in his greatest triumphs. **When he stood up with blood running down his face, pumped his fist in the air, and challenged us to "Fight! Fight! Fight!" you and I witnessed a "turning point" in American history.** Sometimes I can't believe what we've all been through. Not just my dad and the entire Trump family... but all of us patriotic Americans. Think about it: _The millions of illegals dumped off in our small towns and cities..._ _The "mail-in ballots" and rigged census numbers..._ _Billions of our tax dollars laundered through fake "USAID" programs to rig elections and fund left-wing propaganda..._ It was all designed to break us. Demoralize us. **And silence us.** We watched as Steve Bannon and Peter Navarro were marched off to prison... As our schools and churches were shut down. **Members of the Legacy Media repeatedly call us "fascists" and "Nazis" for supporting my dad. ** But you know, when he stood up after that assassin's bullet tore through his ear, I think it clicked for millions of people: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. It was a moment of true courage and true leadership. And it spurred a generation of young men and women who've been told their whole lives that there's nothing good about this nation to suddenly stand up a little taller and say, "Donald Trump is right. America is worth fighting for." **Charlie Kirk reached millions of Americans with the same message. A message of courage, hard work, and Christian values that cost him his life.** Under Charlie's leadership, **Turning Point Action** became the top group, training, and organizing conservatives to promote freedom across the country. And that's not going to stop. Charlie's wife, Erika, has vowed to make sure that Turning Point Action will become stronger, bolder, louder, and greater than ever before. _Charlie 's voice will become millions of voices._ I'm proud to be one of them. That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Turning Point Action today. Thirteen years ago when Charlie looked at our college campuses, he saw teenagers from good, Christian, conservative homes being indoctrinated with leftist contempt for America. And he realized, just like my dad did, that America was going to be destroyed from the inside out unless our young people were taught to love this country again... the way our grandparents were. **Turning Point Action is inspiring a new wave of conservatism across our country.** It's why my dad believes in Turning Point Action. Because Donald Trump knows that one administration alone can't save this nation. We need millions of Americans to have their own "turning point" moment and realize that our country will survive only if citizens value freedom more than left-wing Socialism and race-baiting politics. The attacks on my father and Charlie are proof that the Left wants to destroy this nation. **Patriot will join with me in supporting Turning Point Action by sending a one-time gift of any amount today?** Just as light pushes back darkness, a stronger Turning Point Action will defeat the America haters. [**I’ll send you a hardback copy of Under Siege as my personal thanks for your gift of $50 or more today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=34f4a5211e5f4ba9816a99ea14af2cc3&_e=Ix2WQh7TZ7-rKAmp9vV5tpJK_mtHYA3s-IXxj6Z9zWk1to5dRh67JS1mn_KgC9HtNtKPTl2APtxK-xXD_WhXaxsDoEsdXM5lwv2KAYdRTUaNWZr7lEAoToUESKRkHkRF-frxVAnxRNlZOUMYL-nupTCMwyG5Ur_ArHQyg-avOe-iiwFsk7ftNMjMp_wSVot3SqU3gWhcJSQMXRyyLxQrdueLPy8KLHgK29z4j7TVpgyYVQO9s4YUDM1G7B-tEOx4coJkasnwil4o246Z90u4-TB4-95Ni7g5C8h6u5DiMgfyKM4XtpjVpPn1KX-q3U5lRbNlJDg2wCZvF3XgSREgkCE5lHYeCqMB5WC9aFfUfi6l2klQb2xwcwkW4SCO66MgepQm5bFICqhFJBtSPzBEIR2O-I-qxqECIii5mRKbhfv8lBXXSA93vOnCcT740T1jnFNO4_KVRdsxirOmZqzx8Zt-oUlickqFlSMKepGv94JjWJIe3syZCI2CCMpdj_8t9yN2WYbm7NBRsA1SXy2eTxdxtbXNnB9Tn5XJdOjvdMn7ntlrJ2kMDwpO_TYnAKIPM4bYsAqozcD2Dq8smYgtdN4ViTHJpMoNrvHFCLOjdkvSAFMDeMa8QgNE35KWxujwBnYqNIoiytsgCVuNIlAy2sN2gT8mKKY2imYSndG-q5FQx2bNB1txfRlaVq2MM6ZQzKPFlfIQ-Q90-HpB9xa-kfUVPlBi2LFOzivD8ehEv_I%3D)

They don't want to talk. Or debate. Because they know they'll lose. So how do we as patriots live in an America where so many people openly despise us... and wish us harm? Well, that's something the Trump family knows a lot about. In fact, I've had so many people ask me how our family has endured living under constant attack for a decade that I decided to write a book about it. It 's called Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation. Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. I'd like to send you a copy, Patriot. Because we all need to know how to look evil in the eye - and overcome it. That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. That day I was watching the rally at home. Both my 4-year-old daughter and my 6-year-old son were sitting on my lap. We stared in shock at the TV as "Grandpa" dropped to the ground behind the podium. I remember thinking that he was gone. But the worst attacks on my dad have resulted in his greatest triumphs. When he stood up with blood running down his face, pumped his fist in the air, and challenged us to "Fight! Fight! Fight!" you and I witnessed a "turning point" in American history. Sometimes I can't believe what we've all been through. Not just my dad and the entire Trump family... but all of us patriotic Americans. Think about it: The millions of illegals dumped off in our small towns and cities... The "mail-in ballots" and rigged census numbers... Billions of our tax dollars laundered through fake "USAID" programs to rig elections and fund left-wing propaganda... It was all designed to break us. Demoralize us. And silence us. We watched as Steve Bannon and Peter Navarro were marched off to prison... As our schools and churches were shut down. Members of the Legacy Media repeatedly call us "fascists" and "Nazis" for supporting my dad. But you know, when he stood up after that assassin's bullet tore through his ear, I think it clicked for millions of people: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. It was a moment of true courage and true leadership. And it spurred a generation of young men and women who've been told their whole lives that there's nothing good about this nation to suddenly stand up a little taller and say, "Donald Trump is right. America is worth fighting for." Charlie Kirk reached millions of Americans with the same message. A message of courage, hard work, and Christian values that cost him his life. Under Charlie's leadership, Turning Point Action became the top group, training, and organizing conservatives to promote freedom across the country. And that's not going to stop. Charlie's wife, Erika, has vowed to make sure that Turning Point Action will become stronger, bolder, louder, and greater than ever before. Charlie 's voice will become millions of voices. I'm proud to be one of them. That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Turning Point Action today. Thirteen years ago when Charlie looked at our college campuses, he saw teenagers from good, Christian, conservative homes being indoctrinated with leftist contempt for America. And he realized, just like my dad did, that America was going to be destroyed from the inside out unless our young people were taught to love this country again... the way our grandparents were. Turning Point Action is inspiring a new wave of conservatism across our country. It's why my dad believes in Turning Point Action. Because Donald Trump knows that one administration alone can't save this nation. We need millions of Americans to have their own "turning point" moment and realize that our country will survive only if citizens value freedom more than left-wing Socialism and race-baiting politics. The attacks on my father and Charlie are proof that the Left wants to destroy this nation. Patriot will join with me in supporting Turning Point Action by sending a one-time gift of any amount today? Just as light pushes back darkness, a stronger Turning Point Action will defeat the America haters. Charlie was taken from us - but his missionlives on in us. His courage is an example to all of us. So is his patriotism. Thank you for helping Turning Point Action ensure that everything he fought for - and everything our forefathers fought for - will endure for future generations. For Charlie & America,Eric Trump On behalf of Turning Point Action P.S. We were all under siege. And I hope my book reminds you that evil will not prevail when patriots stand together. Thank you again for standing with the Trump family and all the patriots at Turning Point Action. And with Charlie. | | TURNING POINT ACTION, INC. IS A 501(C)(4) NONPROFIT ORGANIZATION DEDICATED TO PROMOTING SOCIAL WELFARE THROUGH RAISING AWARENESS ABOUT FREE MARKETS AND CAPITALISM, INITIATING CIVIC ACTION AMONGST THE YOUNGER GENERATION, AND EDUCATING YOUTH IN ORDER TO ESTABLISH FREE MARKET POLICIES INTO LAW. DONATIONS ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE. NO GOODS OR SERVICES WERE PROVIDED IN EXCHANGE FOR YOUR CONTRIBUTION UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED. PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. | | 4930 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

**Boysko Bulletin: ****Invitation to Three Legislative Town Halls**

Dear Peter, In a week’s time, I’ll be headed to Richmond for the 2026 General Assembly Session. I am excited about this opportunity to pass legislation that I’ve been working on for many years - that will make life in Virginia easier, safer, and fairer. This week, you have several opportunities to join me and your other elected officials to learn about our legislation and share your concerns. Please join me for one or all of three legislative town halls this week. Your Voice Matters. Please attend to discuss the issues that matter most to our community – whether it's education funding, federal job losses, transportation, healthcare access, housing costs, or any other concern on your mind. I’ve also included information below on opportunities to attend two public hearings - the Governor’s Budget and the Fairfax Delegation Pre Legislative Session Hearing. Happy new year! I hope you had an enjoyable and peaceful holiday season. I’ve received many emails asking me to speak out against the federal Administration’s actions in Venezuela. I am opposed to the use of our troops in Venezuela. I’ve reached out to our federal legislators, as you should, to ask that they require our President to follow the rule of law. You know that I am committed to working for peace throughout our state, nation, and world. Kindest regards,

Jennifer B. **Opportunities** **Public Hearing re Governor Youngkin’s Proposed 2026 - 2028 Biennial State Budget** Wednesday, January 7, 2026 - virtual hearings will begin at 10 am. There will be four separate virtual hearings with legislators from each region participating as follows: Northern Virginia; Western Virginia; Hampton Roads; Central Virginia (Richmond). The public may sign up to speak for one of the virtual public hearings on Tuesday, January 6, 2026, beginning at 8 am through 4 pm. Please check the [House Appropriations](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122651232/593171608/-2076419384?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTA5NGFkOTItZDllOS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BCrz8H3KhVstNvYPpEYnIdnMof9umq1XLSaQXN3BJQA=&emci=cb9ace55-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e094ad92-d9e9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) or [Senate Finance and Appropriations](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122651233/593171609/185402092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTA5NGFkOTItZDllOS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BCrz8H3KhVstNvYPpEYnIdnMof9umq1XLSaQXN3BJQA=&emci=cb9ace55-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e094ad92-d9e9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) Committee websites for the latest information on registration. **Fairfax Delegation Pre Session Legislative Hearing** The Fairfax County delegation to the General Assembly will hold a public hearing regarding the upcoming 2026 session on Saturday, January 10, at 9 am in the Board Auditorium at the Fairfax County Government Center, 12000 Government Center Parkway, Fairfax with parking available in front of the Government Center Building. [**Press Release: Emergency Motion to Defend In-State Tuition for Immigrant Students**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122651235/593171611/-988424050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTA5NGFkOTItZDllOS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BCrz8H3KhVstNvYPpEYnIdnMof9umq1XLSaQXN3BJQA=&emci=cb9ace55-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e094ad92-d9e9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) Over the holidays, we received news that the federal Administration sued Virginia, claiming that our law that allows undocumented students with ties to Virginia to pay in-state tuition is unconstitutional. I passed that legislation in 2020 - it is carefully crafted to ensure that it is constitutional and treats all students with ties to Virginia in the same manner. Further, the law ensures that all students can work to their full potential. We all benefit when each of us is able to learn and to contribute. clean_body: | | | Boysko Bulletin: Invitation to Three Legislative Town Halls Dear Peter, In a week’s time, I’ll be headed to Richmond for the 2026 General Assembly Session. I am excited about this opportunity to pass legislation that I’ve been working on for many years - that will make life in Virginia easier, safer, and fairer. This week, you have several opportunities to join me and your other elected officials to learn about our legislation and share your concerns. Please join me for one or all of three legislative town halls this week. Great Falls Town Hall with Delegate Rip Sullivan, 1/5/2025 at 6:30 pm, Great Falls Library, McLean Town Hall with Delegate Rip Sullivan, 1/6/2025 at 6:30 pm, McLean Community Center, . Herndon Town Hall with Delegate Keys-Gammara, 1/7/2025 at 6:30 pm, McLean Community Center, Your Voice Matters. Please attend to discuss the issues that matter most to our community – whether it's education funding, federal job losses, transportation, healthcare access, housing costs, or any other concern on your mind. I’ve also included information below on opportunities to attend two public hearings - the Governor’s Budget and the Fairfax Delegation Pre Legislative Session Hearing. Happy new year! I hope you had an enjoyable and peaceful holiday season. I’ve received many emails asking me to speak out against the federal Administration’s actions in Venezuela. I am opposed to the use of our troops in Venezuela. I’ve reached out to our federal legislators, as you should, to ask that they require our President to follow the rule of law. You know that I am committed to working for peace throughout our state, nation, and world. Kindest regards, Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS If you would like to support my work, please visit =. Photo Gallery Update for Legislators on Dulles Airport in Richmond for the Virginia Education Summit, the Joint Rules Committee Meeting, and the meeting of the Joint Senate Finance and Appropriations and the House Appropriations Committees Lighting the menorah candles at Reston Town Center for Chanukah Legislative Updates Work continues on my 2026 legislative We are limited to 25 bills plus any bills recommended by a commission. So far, I have introduced one bill and one resolution - two of my highest priorities. I have drafted more than 30 bills and will introduce 26 total and then transfer the rest to other legislators. The final changes are due in a few days and most bills will be filed by the opening day of session, January 14th. Status: In Committee Status: In Committee I look forward to seeing many of you in Richmond. Please reach out to me by email at mailto:SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov if you would like to discuss my legislation or ask that I support other legislation. | | For detailed information on constituent services offered by my office, see my website, . Information available includes: Resources for Those Impacted by the current federal administration Additional Resources for Federal Employees Facing Unemployment Help Paying Bills Transportation Discounts: 50% Off Metrorail and Metrobus for SNAP Recipients Reach Out for Mental Health Support - Addiction Recovery Know Your Rights - Resources for Immigrants Opportunities Public Hearing re Governor Youngkin’s Proposed 2026 - 2028 Biennial State Budget Wednesday, January 7, 2026 - virtual hearings will begin at 10 am. There will be four separate virtual hearings with legislators from each region participating as follows: Northern Virginia; Western Virginia; Hampton Roads; Central Virginia (Richmond). The public may sign up to speak for one of the virtual public hearings on Tuesday, January 6, 2026, beginning at 8 am through 4 pm. Please check the or Committee websites for the latest information on registration. Fairfax Delegation Pre Session Legislative Hearing The Fairfax County delegation to the General Assembly will hold a public hearing regarding the upcoming 2026 session on Saturday, January 10, at 9 am in the Board Auditorium at the Fairfax County Government Center, 12000 Government Center Parkway, Fairfax with parking available in front of the Government Center Building. Fairfax County is assisting with the logistics of the delegation’s event. Fairfax County residents who want to sign up in advance to speak at the hearing should register online using this or contact the Department of Clerk Services at 703-324-3151, TTY 711, by Thursday, January 8, at noon. Learn more at . Give Back Over the holidays, we received news that the federal Administration sued Virginia, claiming that our law that allows undocumented students with ties to Virginia to pay in-state tuition is unconstitutional. I passed that legislation in 2020 - it is carefully crafted to ensure that it is constitutional and treats all students with ties to Virginia in the same manner. Further, the law ensures that all students can work to their full potential. We all benefit when each of us is able to learn and to contribute. AG Miyares chose not to defend Virginia as he nears the end of his term. Others have stepped up, including the and the , which are providing pro bono representation in this case on behalf of the Dream Project. Please support them if you can. In the News Events Monday Nights at 7 pm/ We welcome notices about events that are free or very low cost. Keep in Touch** It’s been a busy year back and forth from Herndon to Richmond. During Session, I work with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, session aides Toby Anthony and Mallory Lenz, and in District, Kathy Shupe, Juliet Morro, and Aditi Goel. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov. name: Greater Georgia
subject: Reminder: 2025 Annual Report
body:
This year brought a new chapter for Greater Georgia with the same mission and spirit
| | | | |
---
|
Friends,
2025 has been an exciting year of change for Greater Georgia.
In 2021, Greater Georgia was founded by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler with a mission to build a year-round conservative operation focused on registration, voter education and mobilization, and election integrity.
Four years later, after conservatives saw the fruits of their labor in 2024, Senator Loeffler accepted a new role in President Trump's administration.
With that transition, Greater Georgia entered a new chapter with the same mission.
In 2025, Greater Georgia continued this work by:

* Launching a six-figure campaign and successfully registering 17,309 new conservative voters

* Hosting a statewide tour across Georgia to educate voter's about state legislation

* Mobilizing 84,000 low-propensity voters in the November 2025 elections

* Serving as Election Integrity first responders when Chatham County lost absentee ballots in the mail

We hope you enjoy our full year-end report, sharing these highlights and much more.
---
| | [2025 ANNUAL REPORT](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UQM5euJujYhWTdB0EWBmQ1s8iNykf1P-XQ-yuXeOZsCK6l74da1vFlQUUieABxu_q0fgd0smaKlsjD6qOAQ0KQD5rPCvEKoNiuji_QCyLPJaockpjbPkEoDSF9Pj2OVtlnLNA162g4AzbKDZjWcf6nHQqg61Jb7wG1W0H0TJw1ElEHPNbEF4YH0Yn8QfywM9&c=BTDg1xmCis9i6xgfqI-9bxRc6ZrRguPg3705YfjCsfWXxjJxsqWUPg==&ch=YxIv-zw-mqM_HsVyBpXpMKuOEUxUHfatmQYSPl_qHnA3ZToufQe2Zw==)
---
This year is a preview of our work ahead in 2026. We have big plans next year that you won't want to miss. Stay tuned!
With gratitude and joy as we ring in a New Year,
Your Friends at Greater Georgia
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
Greater Georgia, founded by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is working to register, engage, educate, and mobilize voters in communities across the Peach State. Our year-round work is focused on growing our movement by registering voters who may not be captured by Georgia's "Motor Voter" program, mobilizing diverse and underrepresented communities, promoting issue advocacy, and fighting to restore trust and integrity in our elections.
###

Four years later, after conservatives saw the fruits of their labor in 2024, Senator Loeffler accepted a new role in President Trump's administration. With that transition, Greater Georgia entered a new chapter with the same mission. In 2025, Greater Georgia continued this work by: Launching a six-figure campaign and successfully registering 17,309 new conservative voters Hosting a statewide tour across Georgia to educate voter's about state legislation Mobilizing 84,000 low-propensity voters in the November 2025 elections Serving as Election Integrity first responders when Chatham County lost absentee ballots in the mail We hope you enjoy our full year-end report, sharing these highlights and much more. | | == This year is a preview of our work ahead in 2026. We have big plans next year that you won't want to miss. Stay tuned! With gratitude and joy as we ring in a New Year, Your Friends at Greater Georgia | | | | | | | | | | Greater Georgia, founded by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is working to register, engage, educate, and mobilize voters in communities across the Peach State. Our year-round work is focused on growing our movement by registering voters who may not be captured by Georgia's "Motor Voter" program, mobilizing diverse and underrepresented communities, promoting issue advocacy, and fighting to restore trust and integrity in our elections. | | | | | == | == == == | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. Box 550988 | Atlanta, GA 30355 US | |

name: The Flyover
subject: Venezuela’s New Leader, Gas Prices Down, and AI Frog Cop
body:
President Trump threatened [Venezuela's newly appointed interim leader,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSnDAMhp_GdNqxDYtvCxdp6C5tSkaLBTgxNmOLZbinzzhb5AGuUfNLn-b7f32On-iDj8tP3MjynMZIZwnETHl8UaSvgwKWSGcgdJQXLHv2o5a6B6lA3keHPlxj1zg7E2lqG7LK9KZXShrdrFb1pCel28fj0SF93D_atkNpnk8j1aTQNd5WmlTyrpTsWnnDyeFdu2dv8OnM5EQnyXlO-fY7-cgrzeFKL8q3KW1NsCvzXkT7Q-hB6CFeeypcI6GHChZ6kKqOTujhKFD9hB44H9sOvGZCpljgv2vdgLctOArTBTm57JeDvuD0vALCjExwplwIeMUIG7ojJ_AzlJXAJSqRa_7nfXDUh022bj99CL70RnRy2dCHfwr8rd5fVv8NAAD__48Zmdc) Delcy Rodriguez, with consequences "probably bigger than Maduro" after she rejected working with his administration on Sunday.

# Monday, January 5, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1914, carmaker Henry Ford announced an increase in the pay of assembly-line workers to [$5 a day](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOpDAQRU9jMpBdgK0OHGxC1ptuiAqqDF5VY2Q8MMzpRz1XmPR_6T3p_XuOT4wSt-UvvtiXkMaNr0O4FM7jyRt_fbDgsfEljMR5wWPPcQQNttam1v1IGOUeu4p8YAZuK_bGWWeN0Q6q1QNSpy30MyAFF9jw1Ns24MM9eugecxX9m6aN7o3RXasbnAl7oMk6nMjNpDrNFEvKzf8Ut7JykDudnJs5vSrxayn7odo_CgYFw3VdTVl55S3fIWVqUl4UDPy5S8qsYJgkvYf3d9QhnlxTEsFcE94Khip72q8oEg_rVKeXF0b5MZVf5Tk9fAcAAP__H217Ug), doubling the previous wage. He also implemented home inspections to determine eligibility for the new wage, based on whether workers were leading morally upright lives. As we report below, scientists believe they may have developed an [anti-aging drug](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAUAL8GOwygwm5BcY3dXnulefKeygVhA6jZ-_rL3i9cP5lJ5usxPcAHH9dP2MnWJU2RrhKoVsrTSZF-DgpQIl2BACmvUJ7ZT0oozYXkYpgQfHhNfYN2IVLUNWSl0UZLKYxqNqsWvJEx2MFsBjPDfTDu3i96MApuWs-Nt2-bkGKQUvSdaMEhDApnbWBG45D1gtDXlNvv5GPdaAmvdFJuXdqbYLdan4V1H0yNTI3XdbXFeYqOluSO8oaYGutGfDt2iHxO-GJqxHyshdcNKncQeaaTciEOK_m4Ntni8_Ih-KIN68W6gw9_ufqvR6dVvwEAAP__tPV9tA) that can partially reverse the aging process by resetting cells to a more youthful state. Human trials are set to begin this year. Would you take it if it were to work? Reply to let us know. Today’s sponsor, [ChooseGLP1](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u2zAMBeCnkTcHFPUXDxpaBN7SLAU6GpRFO2rlH9hKgvTpizR3uPtd-YEHB-fXuTtTymkef9DEvgxLN_Njz1wKb92dZ_5740z7zI_MFHkbaV-31CGgrUHWYLpIKT87XUU_MCOrir101lkpwWF19RSCk8EENwTsj9Jgr9Fqq3UTmoGBquRfaSDBSAlawYH6SAZjsI5CdH0UGjimsmyH30uay5WH_FzuvB36Zaqyv5ay7kJ9E9gKbDNn7vOflwlsLQxGGYg1mIZrrZWuj1FijYCyGSKhAidU29O0UhrnLkWhTsJ9_3xwJ4F2pY2mt12MrC9o4ANu4f31s71Um4_rI-WcduuEhnGilP-3LF-a9u7xXwAAAP__3MyHew), helps readers cut through the noise by comparing top telehealth providers so you can save hundreds on FDA-approved GLP-1 weight-loss medications without insurance or endless doctor visits.

## Venezuela's New Leader Rejects Trump
President Trump threatened [ Venezuela's newly appointed interim leader](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSnDAMhp_GdNqxDYtvCxdp6C5tSkaLBTgxNmOLZbinzzhb5AGuUfNLn-b7f32On-iDj8tP3MjynMZIZwnETHl8UaSvgwKWSGcgdJQXLHv2o5a6B6lA3keHPlxj1zg7E2lqG7LK9KZXShrdrFb1pCel28fj0SF93D_atkNpnk8j1aTQNd5WmlTyrpTsWnnDyeFdu2dv8OnM5EQnyXlO-fY7-cgrzeFKL8q3KW1NsCvzXkT7Q-hB6CFeeypcI6GHChZ6kKqOTujhKFD9hB44H9sOvGZCpljgv2vdgLctOArTBTm57JeDvuD0vALCjExwplwIeMUIG7ojJ_AzlJXAJSqRa_7nfXDUh022bj99CL70RnRy2dCHfwr8rd5fVv8NAAD__48Zmdc), Delcy Rodriguez, with consequences "probably bigger than Maduro" after she rejected working with his administration on Sunday. Rodriguez declared loyalty to the captured dictator despite Trump praising her Saturday as "[necessary to make Venezuela great again](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MsK1DAUxvGnSXdnyKUXZ9HFiNTVuFFwWU6SM51omoQkM6E-vVTBF3D9wQe___f7ekfnXdi-4E5zfcQ1UCueaqW8vinQrxd5LIGaJ7SUNywpu1VyOQIXwIfVovPH2nd2fhBJUh3NYhqnUQg-ye45m6tWCrXiV64-4DhoNYjealSaSNqJOjefb1zwQQjeK35BY3GQVo8TajsZy3pO1tWYLz-iC_VJD3_EN-WLiXvn52etqTB1Y3JhcmmtXfYSzo3JhQK8CpPLiTrHmL1lcqn5tSdomEMBNNWFDf5ZA_yVQnPeQ8IDELTbIGVnCNwDypPARioBKpgYE2WsxOSCGW438e24f_7J1BKNs0x9-nimpVa-Uk5dnm06X10ZJ9bzbUfn_yDqf5V_z_J3AAAA__9-x5tp)." Trump administration officials have told American oil executives [they must invest billions to rebuild](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb9GOxxAhaSgSGO3aVM6CE_3ZZ7gACvZfH3GFPmB1PfOnXvOx22-WSQM27vdwZQ1zgFqJigF0nxCgO8HkM0BKoH1kDabj4Sz5FIxLhgfZ2-RnvPQerMCSOhbMEIrrYTgWrZ3o4V2fW_X5cWtq_RCgRxenbJciWGwo2rRXGtc8FEIPvS8s87bUfpFabt47XwzcPBYYuo-I4Zyh5We8YTUubi3ZO6lHLnp3xo5NXKqtXZr_LoorryR0xEJC7rcyOkPiOWCRCxWyOyRGQRI25O5uB82IGS2IBHGkFlJj_1gzhJlFqAyDCfkskMobTL-qFcvK90MfNst0u-l8i-Pp5E_AQAA__8XDIxp) Venezuela's shattered petroleum infrastructure if they want compensation for assets seized decades ago, but industry leaders remain cautious about the safety of employees and equipment in a country where leadership remains uncertain, and oil prices hover around $57 per barrel. Secretary of State Marco Rubio rejected Rodriguez as legitimate and [ called for free elections ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU8DHchjwN4ULtLQbdqUaLCHZSJjI9ss2pw-IkUukPpJ_-u9z_t0R_YcHh-4kSlLnAKd2VMplKYnBfo-yGMOdHpCR-mBeU88SSFVI6ARw-SQ_Wvqa2cWIkldTQa00gpAaFmvpruRWlTfaXADyNm93QBJayCwNMBN12yuNQFiABB9J1q0DgfpZqVxdtq6qhfkuMTUfkUOZaXFv-KTUmvjVnuzlrLnqnuv5FjJ8TzPNsz2srh4Jcc9ei5s8wVXLtSs8chUyfFPrynp2PZmQ3ek2CQbUA4StK6TcfvJ3nNWuurFY0P2v6_lX6meRv4EAAD__3izfx0) during a transition period, though he said conversations about a potential vote would be "premature."
## Gas Prices Drop Below $3 Nationally
The national average for gasoline [fell to $2.83 per gallon](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u3CAUxfHV2B0W4A-cgiKNu0mb0rqGi30jDBYwwzirf5q3hdcfHf30__tYH0Cewv4HTtTFxTVgzR5LwbS-MOD_J3rIAatHsJh2yFeiVXI5MS4YH1cL5O91aK12iBL7FrVQk5qE4Eq2h5Z85L9gBuGknREmNffTMMIGTjoD29yS_rxxwUch-NDzDoyFUdptUrBZZWwzcLRUYur-RQrlQOfv-MLUmXi2Xh-lXLnpfzdyaeRSa-1cfG_PTAFz_mwauaCJIZ53I5dInu2Q2ZXIYGb4vtAUtCwXuFmmPZAjA6H4m_lYMbFypPjcD_ZBtknbq5L3lCfVDHw_gfw3o_yo3UvLrwAAAP__cDiHDw) to start 2026, marking the fifth straight week of declines and the lowest prices Americans have seen so far this year. Hawaii remains the most expensive state at $4.42 per gallon. Oklahoma is the cheapest at $2.24, and the lowest-priced markets are now in the low-$2 range as refineries boost output and demand remains seasonally soft. The Energy Information Administration projects prices will hover around $3 per gallon throughout 2026 as Brent crude falls from $69 per barrel in 2025 to a forecasted $55 this year. Analysts at GasBuddy expect prices to keep easing into January or February. See [state gas price averages here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAYBODT4M7WD8agFBSvcZfXbon-wNhhRewIWEfZ06-SPcLWM_o0mo-zP3PKaVv_8w2uLbvf8KgZraH4Axu-v5C5bnhkcERZud5L8oqU6Un2NPnIKT-97qJbAIWxg5PWWCMlWdVdneFpCRaabFyCuUAaTacTj5qC1BjHLrmXRpImKUmPNHCIPKl4MZYv0YYoNCGmtpfhc09bu2LJz_1AGcJ-67K7tnavYvwn1CzU_DswoA7M_GoINdfGDf3KtX9HPR8ovKIKNXfFxfsj5ZyqsULTeuOU33D70xuHUz8BAAD__9A3dNk).
## Old Nostradamus Verses Fuel 2026 Fears
The 16th-century French astrologer's cryptic four-line verses, called quatrains, are sparking fresh anxiety as interpreters link verses numbered "26" to the coming year, [ warning of everything](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3OpDAQRE8DGaj9Ax4CB5uQzaYbooZuBq-MjWwPaPb0K-YKX1ZSSaV6789zeqLzLrx-4862rHEKfGXPpXCaTg78780ec-DLMxKnF-YjuUmC7BsQDXQTofOfSddkV2bJqmYrTG96IcDIerPDzFphx_SQQg-rNForw2IQHT1gJVU7e6-BgE4I0ApaXAg7SXNvcCazUKWByZWY2r_RhbLx6j_x5NQuca-93Uo5cqV-VXKs5HhdV_vBLca7reR441RyxFTc4vmOIeaSkHB_5-ZITG4pLobcfJmSOznlZvYxUiMEAIAaVLuV3dfJ0nE5713uTaXhtaPz3w_lR-JOK_8HAAD__waeguU) from political assassinations to technological chaos. One frequently cited verse reads, _" The great man will be struck down in the day by a thunderbolt,"_ which some claim points to the violent fall of a modern political leader. Another reference to "a great swarm of bees" has been [interpreted as a metaphor](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGymzAQRb8GOjGSAGEXKtLQOW1KZq1d8MZCYiQBcb7-jT3vD155mjv3nD-36QbsOSy_YSVb5jgFOrOnUihNBwX6v5OHHOj0BEhpgbwlnrTURkglZD8hsH9NXY12JtLU1mTVYAajlBx0_bAXdZ2pnxHRdRe8oOzfLI0hNTgFpmb7XpNK9krJrpUNOIRe490McMfBYdVJQi4xNX8jh_Kg2b_iQalxca29fZSy5ar9Vemx0uN5ng39g5UDJc8HNS42-7PS49ur0uP-FGdMHsU3h5hLAoR1zwI5lz3dOSziI7glQnaFY8iCg_M7kmhb2ar2KutkcTvZe85mqDq5rMD-86j8KONh9VcAAAD__7QciWU) for the spread of authoritarian ideologies or mass movements gaining power. One optimistic quatrain offers hope, predicting "the man of light will rise" to guide humanity toward renewal after the chaos subsides. Scholars caution that Nostradamus wrote in deliberately vague Middle French and Latin, making it easy to retrofit any verse to current anxieties. Yet, believers claim he predicted events like 9/11 and the COVID-19 pandemic--interpretations widely rejected by historians as retroactive readings.

Gas Prices Drop Below $3 Nationally The national average for gasoline to start 2026, marking the fifth straight week of declines and the lowest prices Americans have seen so far this year. Hawaii remains the most expensive state at $4.42 per gallon. Oklahoma is the cheapest at $2.24, and the lowest-priced markets are now in the low-$2 range as refineries boost output and demand remains seasonally soft. The Energy Information Administration projects prices will hover around $3 per gallon throughout 2026 as Brent crude falls from $69 per barrel in 2025 to a forecasted $55 this year. Old Nostradamus Verses Fuel 2026 Fears The 16th-century French astrologer's cryptic four-line verses, called quatrains, are sparking fresh anxiety as interpreters link verses numbered "26" to the coming year, from political assassinations to technological chaos. One frequently cited verse reads, " The great man will be struck down in the day by a thunderbolt," which some claim points to the violent fall of a modern political leader. Another reference to "a great swarm of bees" has been for the spread of authoritarian ideologies or mass movements gaining power. One optimistic quatrain offers hope, predicting "the man of light will rise" to guide humanity toward renewal after the chaos subsides. Scholars caution that Nostradamus wrote in deliberately vague Middle French and Latin, making it easy to retrofit any verse to current anxieties. Yet, believers claim he predicted events like 9/11 and the COVID-19 pandemic--interpretations widely rejected by historians as retroactive readings. ### What living abroad taught me about freedom, citizenship, and dissent
| | [The Angry Democrat](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)

| Jan 5

I did not really want to write this post, but I am going to write it anyway.
After one of my last pieces, someone emailed me and told me I sounded angry.
Well, yes.
I do not know if you noticed the title, _**The Angry Democrat**_. That is not an accident.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RLmDzFJw-B1XqOqy9bJBqF63pGF5NsIdW5euXrrJ110?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=183484870)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4f3d96ee-06be-4f07-8bf5-7c97f689927f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Before going any further, I want to be clear about something. This post was inspired by that email, but not in a negative way. I do not know whether it was sent as criticism, concern, or an attempt to find hope, and I am not assigning intent to it. I appreciated that someone took the time to reach out, and nothing they said offended me or made me angry. I did not take it personally and I hope they don't feel personally attacked by this reply.
What it did do was make me think more carefully about how I explain my criticism of this country and why I choose to stay engaged rather than disengaged.
They also suggested that instead of writing about what I think is broken in America, I should write a post about why I like America. As if criticism requires a loyalty oath. As if you need to wrap every argument in a flag just to be taken seriously.
I have never agreed with that framing. I do not think people need to pledge allegiance, perform patriotism, or preface every critique with "I love America, but..." just to earn the right to speak. In fact, that impulse feels deeply un-American.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6ba65e82-aeba-4470-97f1-cfe6bc913b85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
https://www.youworkforthem.com/photo/163475/close-up-of-a-happy-family-holding-the-american-flag?srsltid=AfmBOoqOtv1TnWgYu6Hn3YUvaKwubUL-fW6MhO3NUAH9R8gNJKz8_lIy
That said, I am writing this anyway. Not because I owe anyone anything, but because I choose to live here, and that choice matters.
I am not someone who believes that where you are born is where you must live and die. I lived abroad for roughly fifteen years. I lived in China. I lived in Taiwan. I lived in Hong Kong briefly. I lived in Hawaii for many years, worked there, and went to university at the University of Hawaii at Mānoa. I have traveled to forty, maybe fifty countries. I have more friends scattered around the world than I do in Northeast Ohio, where I am from.
So when I say I choose to live in the United States, I mean that literally. It is a comparison informed by experience.
Let me be very clear about something that often gets lost. America is not the best at everything. Not even close.
I have lived in China. You cannot compare American infrastructure to what China is building right now. Power grids, high-speed rail, airports, digital payment systems, communications infrastructure, social media integration. In many ways, America looks old and underbuilt by comparison.
Go to Hong Kong, London, Tokyo, Seoul, Shanghai. Compare their subway systems to New York's, or the lack of public transit in just about every other city, and ask yourself what the hell happened here.
When I was a student in Taiwan, their universal healthcare system covered us. Students!
For a minimal fee, we received high-quality care. I personally had double inguinal hernia surgery there. Friends of mine went through the hospital system for everything from scooter accidents to routine care. The experience was efficient, affordable, and excellent. Comparing that system to ours is not even a fair fight.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RLmDzFJw-B1XqOqy9bJBqF63pGF5NsIdW5euXrrJ110?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=183484870)
So no, I am not here to argue that America has the best infrastructure, healthcare, or public systems. In many areas, we do not. Nor do we have the best in many other systems or infrastructure, which I cover in other posts.
The reason I choose to live in the United States is something deeper.
People love to say America is a "melting pot," but that is just the surface. That is the tip of the iceberg. The real substance is underneath.
In the United States, everyone here is American.
That sounds simple, but it is rare.
China is not an immigrant country. You cannot become Chinese. Period. Try being a foreigner there. Try speaking the language with an accent. Try not looking Chinese and claiming to be Chinese. If you want to talk about discrimination, start there.
And this is not just China. Try speaking French with the wrong pronunciation in France and see how forgiving their culture is.
In the United States, people speak English with accents from every corner of the world. And for the most part, we try. We listen. We adjust. We accept.
Under the law, being American means something. It means equal rights to own property, to buy land, to start a business, to enter contracts. The First Amendment applies equally to a Chinese American, an African American, a white Anglo-Saxon Protestant, and everyone else.
That is not true in most of the world.
Go look at what it means to immigrate elsewhere. Can you buy property on your own? Can you own land? Can you open a business without a local partner? Are you classified as a "foreign-owned business" forever? Do officials refuse to speak to you and demand your spouse instead? These are not edge cases. These are norms.
Americans take for granted how deeply these rights are embedded. We assume they exist everywhere. They do not. And if some of these rights do exist, the complete combination we have in our constitution does not.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RLmDzFJw-B1XqOqy9bJBqF63pGF5NsIdW5euXrrJ110?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=183484870)
Freedom of speech. Freedom of religion. The right to bear arms. Protection from unreasonable searches and seizures. The presumption of innocence. The requirement for warrants. The ability to criticize the government openly, loudly, and repeatedly.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/27fabef2-5f47-460e-88d4-ab840eb60759?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Are these rights being eroded? Yes. Absolutely. But they still exist within a legal framework here in a way they simply do not in many other countries.
And even more important: if you believe these rights are being violated, you are allowed to say so. Publicly. Without disappearing.
That alone is extraordinary.
That is why I choose to live here.
And because I choose to live here, I choose to fight for it. To criticize it. To point out where other countries are doing things better and ask why we refuse to learn. To push back against bad policy, bad leadership, and bad incentives.
I am not going to say the Pledge of Allegiance before every critique. I am not going to perform patriotism to prove I belong. I do not need to preface opposition to foreign wars with declarations of love for the troops.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c62fd390-9a5e-418a-8026-d7567fa99c2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
https://www.smithsonianmag.com/history/pledge-allegiance-pr-gimmick-patriotic-vow-180956332/
I do not accept purity tests.
The United States is an experiment. Participation is a choice. I choose to participate. And part of that participation is insisting that we can do better, informed by what I have seen elsewhere and what I know is possible.
The thing that makes America great is not that it is perfect. It is that I am allowed, by right, to say it is not.
That is why I live here.
And that is why I keep writing.
That is why I stay **angry.**
_Join other**ANGRY DEMOCRATS** by support Matt's work. Subscribe and Share! _
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RLmDzFJw-B1XqOqy9bJBqF63pGF5NsIdW5euXrrJ110?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=183484870)

clean_body: What living abroad taught me about freedom, citizenship, and dissent | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? We need to find other ANGRY DEMOCRATS. Please consider sharing and subscribing to fuel the ANGER for change. What living abroad taught me about freedom, citizenship, and dissent | | | Jan 5 | | | | | | | | | | | | I did not really want to write this post, but I am going to write it anyway. After one of my last pieces, someone emailed me and told me I sounded angry. Well, yes. I do not know if you noticed the title, The Angry Democrat. That is not an accident. | | ---|---|--- Before going any further, I want to be clear about something. This post was inspired by that email, but not in a negative way. I do not know whether it was sent as criticism, concern, or an attempt to find hope, and I am not assigning intent to it. I appreciated that someone took the time to reach out, and nothing they said offended me or made me angry. I did not take it personally and I hope they don't feel personally attacked by this reply. What it did do was make me think more carefully about how I explain my criticism of this country and why I choose to stay engaged rather than disengaged. They also suggested that instead of writing about what I think is broken in America, I should write a post about why I like America. As if criticism requires a loyalty oath. As if you need to wrap every argument in a flag just to be taken seriously. I have never agreed with that framing. I do not think people need to pledge allegiance, perform patriotism, or preface every critique with "I love America, but..." just to earn the right to speak. In fact, that impulse feels deeply un-American. | | ---|---|--- That said, I am writing this anyway. Not because I owe anyone anything, but because I choose to live here, and that choice matters. I am not someone who believes that where you are born is where you must live and die. I lived abroad for roughly fifteen years. I lived in China. I lived in Taiwan. I lived in Hong Kong briefly. I lived in Hawaii for many years, worked there, and went to university at the University of Hawaii at Mānoa. I have traveled to forty, maybe fifty countries. I have more friends scattered around the world than I do in Northeast Ohio, where I am from. So when I say I choose to live in the United States, I mean that literally. It is a comparison informed by experience. Let me be very clear about something that often gets lost. America is not the best at everything. Not even close. I have lived in China. You cannot compare American infrastructure to what China is building right now. Power grids, high-speed rail, airports, digital payment systems, communications infrastructure, social media integration. In many ways, America looks old and underbuilt by comparison. Go to Hong Kong, London, Tokyo, Seoul, Shanghai. Compare their subway systems to New York's, or the lack of public transit in just about every other city, and ask yourself what the hell happened here. When I was a student in Taiwan, their universal healthcare system covered us. Students! For a minimal fee, we received high-quality care. I personally had double inguinal hernia surgery there. Friends of mine went through the hospital system for everything from scooter accidents to routine care. The experience was efficient, affordable, and excellent. Comparing that system to ours is not even a fair fight. So no, I am not here to argue that America has the best infrastructure, healthcare, or public systems. In many areas, we do not. Nor do we have the best in many other systems or infrastructure, which I cover in other posts. The reason I choose to live in the United States is something deeper. People love to say America is a "melting pot," but that is just the surface. That is the tip of the iceberg. The real substance is underneath. In the United States, everyone here is American. That sounds simple, but it is rare. China is not an immigrant country. You cannot become Chinese. Period. Try being a foreigner there. Try speaking the language with an accent. Try not looking Chinese and claiming to be Chinese. If you want to talk about discrimination, start there. And this is not just China. Try speaking French with the wrong pronunciation in France and see how forgiving their culture is. In the United States, people speak English with accents from every corner of the world. And for the most part, we try. We listen. We adjust. We accept. Under the law, being American means something. It means equal rights to own property, to buy land, to start a business, to enter contracts. The First Amendment applies equally to a Chinese American, an African American, a white Anglo-Saxon Protestant, and everyone else. That is not true in most of the world. Go look at what it means to immigrate elsewhere. Can you buy property on your own? Can you own land? Can you open a business without a local partner? Are you classified as a "foreign-owned business" forever? Do officials refuse to speak to you and demand your spouse instead? These are not edge cases. These are norms. Americans take for granted how deeply these rights are embedded. We assume they exist everywhere. They do not. And if some of these rights do exist, the complete combination we have in our constitution does not. Freedom of speech. Freedom of religion. The right to bear arms. Protection from unreasonable searches and seizures. The presumption of innocence. The requirement for warrants. The ability to criticize the government openly, loudly, and repeatedly. | | ---|---|--- Are these rights being eroded? Yes. Absolutely. But they still exist within a legal framework here in a way they simply do not in many other countries. And even more important: if you believe these rights are being violated, you are allowed to say so. Publicly. Without disappearing. That alone is extraordinary. That is why I choose to live here. And because I choose to live here, I choose to fight for it. To criticize it. To point out where other countries are doing things better and ask why we refuse to learn. To push back against bad policy, bad leadership, and bad incentives. I am not going to say the Pledge of Allegiance before every critique. I am not going to perform patriotism to prove I belong. I do not need to preface opposition to foreign wars with declarations of love for the troops. | | ---|---|--- I do not accept purity tests. The United States is an experiment. Participation is a choice. I choose to participate. And part of that participation is insisting that we can do better, informed by what I have seen elsewhere and what I know is possible. The thing that makes America great is not that it is perfect. It is that I am allowed, by right, to say it is not. That is why I live here. And that is why I keep writing. That is why I stay angry. Join otherANGRY DEMOCRATS** by support Matt's work. Subscribe and Share! | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Matt Diemer 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def853ed0f3ac41f3ac4c004bb5793c67a359ef4e622a8233e09ca3c4eb586cfa3bcca82292d00668bb01d5582dc739787728a8c7af76a809972ac)**Banks don't need your **permission** to legally seize your deposits. This is how you can protect your savings. [**Find Out**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def853ed0f3ac41f3ac4c004bb5793c67a359ef4e622a8233e09ca3c4eb586cfa3bcca82292d00668bb01d5582dc739787728a8c7af76a809972ac)

[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def8534a1df3c5218b6124bb4f9d4fecb2b6674d16942fb18b3220d172412ac075a1802953f17c4932b2326cb6f3110a278a269e6ec41c4d5bc27c) | **[Silver Is Hitting Record Highs
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def8534a1df3c5218b6124bb4f9d4fecb2b6674d16942fb18b3220d172412ac075a1802953f17c4932b2326cb6f3110a278a269e6ec41c4d5bc27c)**Silver prices are surging - and most investors still don't understand why. This free e-book, **The Silver Opportunity,** explains what could come next. [**Download**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def8534a1df3c5218b6124bb4f9d4fecb2b6674d16942fb18b3220d172412ac075a1802953f17c4932b2326cb6f3110a278a269e6ec41c4d5bc27c)
* * *
**[It's RMD Time Again.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def853adb02b65ac000b06f8e19d1b0b26600f4501737c870bd44166352fd696816152f29f5f375e9b345e8ae54060964d874261b4a69ae5dbfd4a)** **Imagine opening your retirement statement this year...** And realizing that a simple decision - one most retirees never even think about - could reshape your taxes, your diversification, and even your long-term financial stability. Every year, Americans over age 73 are forced to withdraw **tens of billions of dollars** from their retirement accounts. And year after year, most people follow the same path: **Take the RMD in cash and move on.** Not because it's the best choice. But because no one ever tells them there's another way. **[The "Default" RMD Isn't Your Only Option.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def853adb02b65ac000b06f8e19d1b0b26600f4501737c870bd44166352fd696816152f29f5f375e9b345e8ae54060964d874261b4a69ae5dbfd4a)** Financial institutions make it easy to withdraw cash. Too easy. But simple isn't always strategic. Taking your RMD in cash may:
* Increase taxable income
* Force you to sell assets at moments that may not
align with your plan
* Reduce the overall portion of your wealth that remains invested

And yet... **[There's an IRS-Approved Alternative Most Retirees Never Hear About.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def853adb02b65ac000b06f8e19d1b0b26600f4501737c870bd44166352fd696816152f29f5f375e9b345e8ae54060964d874261b4a69ae5dbfd4a)** Few realize that **RMDs can also be taken "in-kind."** Meaning: instead of withdrawing cash, you can receive _certain assets directly_ without liquidating them first. No, it doesn't eliminate taxes. But for many savers, it may help them:
* Preserve their long-term allocation
* Avoid being forced to sell during volatile markets
* Strengthen diversification, depending on their strategy

It's fully IRS-allowed... but rarely mentioned in traditional planning conversations. **Before You Take Your Next RMD, Ask Yourself:**
* Do I know _most_ IRS-approved ways to satisfy my distribution?
* Am I selling assets when I don't want to - or at prices I don't like?
* Could an in-kind distribution align better with my long-term goals and risk tolerance?

For something you're required by law to take each year, understanding your options isn't optional - it's essential. **[To help you make sense of it all...](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def853adb02b65ac000b06f8e19d1b0b26600f4501737c870bd44166352fd696816152f29f5f375e9b345e8ae54060964d874261b4a69ae5dbfd4a)** We've created a clear, simple breakdown of:
* Cash vs. in-kind RMDs
* How each method works
* Questions to ask before choosing
* What to discuss with your advisor

So before you take your next withdrawal, **[take a moment to get informed.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def853adb02b65ac000b06f8e19d1b0b26600f4501737c870bd44166352fd696816152f29f5f375e9b345e8ae54060964d874261b4a69ae5dbfd4a)** Your decision today could influence your strategy for years to come. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=54e0153db2def853adb02b65ac000b06f8e19d1b0b26600f4501737c870bd44166352fd696816152f29f5f375e9b345e8ae54060964d874261b4a69ae5dbfd4a)

This is how you can protect your savings. ---|--- | prices are surging - and most investors still don't understand why. This free e-book, The Silver Opportunity, explains what could come next. Imagine opening your retirement statement this year... And realizing that a simple decision - one most retirees never even think about - could reshape your taxes, your diversification, and even your long-term financial stability. Every year, Americans over age 73 are forced to withdraw tens of billions of dollars from their retirement accounts. And year after year, most people follow the same path: Take the RMD in cash and move on. Not because it's the best choice. But because no one ever tells them there's another way. Financial institutions make it easy to withdraw cash. Too easy. But simple isn't always strategic. Taking your RMD in cash may: Increase taxable income Force you to sell assets at moments that may not align with your plan Reduce the overall portion of your wealth that remains invested And yet... Few realize that RMDs can also be taken "in-kind." Meaning: instead of withdrawing cash, you can receive certain assets directly without liquidating them first. No, it doesn't eliminate taxes. But for many savers, it may help them: Preserve their long-term allocation Avoid being forced to sell during volatile markets Strengthen diversification, depending on their strategy It's fully IRS-allowed... but rarely mentioned in traditional planning conversations. Before You Take Your Next RMD, Ask Yourself: Do I know most IRS-approved ways to satisfy my distribution? Am I selling assets when I don't want to - or at prices I don't like? Could an in-kind distribution align better with my long-term goals and risk tolerance? For something you're required by law to take each year, understanding your options isn't optional - it's essential. We've created a clear, simple breakdown of: Cash vs. in-kind RMDs How each method works Questions to ask before choosing What to discuss with your advisor So before you take your next withdrawal, Your decision today could influence your strategy for years to come.
