clean_body: Derek, Tomorrow marks five years since the January 6th insurrection—a dark day when we saw the heart of American democracy attacked. A crowd of traitors stormed the U.S. Capitol, put lives in danger, brutalized Capitol Police officers, and tried to overthrow our government. What happened that day was unconscionable. And the threat to our democracy didn’t end when the mob was cleared from the building. I want to be direct with you: this fight isn’t over—not even close. Since Donald Trump returned to office, he and his allies have put tremendous pressure on the rule of law. He’s flouted the Constitution—abusing his pardon power, seeking retribution against his foes through law enforcement, and even threatening me and several of my colleagues with death for stating the law, for crying out loud. No matter what Trump or his congressional allies try to do, nothing will deter me from standing up for our democracy, defending our freedoms, and doing my job for the people of Western PA. Quitting just isn’t in our vocabulary here. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Derek, Donald Trump made it his top priority on Day One of his presidency to pardon the criminals who stormed the Capitol on January 6, 2021. name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Leftist mobs could not stop us
body:
They tried to break us.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvb49mfcs00063tnch3na77fpp37fpikvcjgsf3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)
---
Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztjp5tloi0kcf718velmnkl9j4k63gcfr3plj7eg_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)
---
ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --_They wanted to pick a fight._ Police made multiple arrests. **UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone.**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi9gk3d82lm94u02vb0nj8hlmsks9pagnepp9oi8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)
---
But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: **Truth is louder than hate. **
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj7cqumfpesjmh4i37ratucvb5f00m4n7cn8f3eo_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)
---
| | **Friend, I need you to hear this next part -- because it's about patriots like you.** This tour? This fight? These students who keep showing up -- even when it's dangerous? They didn't get here on their own. They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them. Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in... When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political "experts" said Gen Z was lost to the Left... And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built... People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive. And showed our young people that they're not alone. That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has defenders.That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future. So if you've ever wondered if it's working... If it's worth it... **Let me be clear: Patriots like you are why we 're winning the American Culture War.** And now this is your chance to be part of something rare -- a moment in history where patriotic young Americans are reclaiming the culture, one campus at a time. Our students on campus are truly the vanguard for saving this nation, but they need to know we have their backs. **Will you make a gift right now to send backup to the frontlines and stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit? ** **[Every dollar you give today helps us protect our student leaders, send activism kits to chapters, defend free speech, and fuel our reach to change more hearts and minds.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkmfthgqkd7n0ui1bkvq9qumg179recrj2f0snv0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)**
---
[ **Send Backup to the Frontlines**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4gl0nbn3mceaeb8jljag725efqflreg2keojjbg_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)
---
The Left tried to intimidate us. They tried to outnumber us. They tried to drown us out. But we didn't blink. Our students didn't blink. The mob at Berkeley couldn't stop us. _Because we didn 't come to Berkeley to be liked..._ **We came to speak truth.** We came to finish what Charlie started. That's exactly what happened. **And that 's exactly why we're winning.** Friend, thank you. Patriots like you helped turn chaos into courage... Hate into hope... And grief into grit. Let's keep going...
---
| | **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkpqenu27his2i5mrh6a2l5efhufr855qrub0ldg_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh3s3r7sa7tnsgkntupe15npc4j386kapt4n3qj0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs) **P.S.** Friend, when the Left screamed in our students' faces... When they mocked Charlie's murder... Our students held the line. If you believe in what they're doing... If you know this fight is just beginning... Your support means more than you know. [**You can help by sending backup to the frontlines. Help these brave young leaders fight for freedom and equip our student chapters across the country.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvpgakqruuu9vv4jq89f5h3edmi26n4uk8k4n9c8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)
---
[ **Send Backup to the Frontlines**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0m40b0smpdaiqva0beoq8j36a2113il2jjs54so_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8saevtq6s79fgesia0igq3u8r1m0isd5h5u31a0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp35c5ie1pj7c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsago0jdb03ngqkgm9tv2n3fmni8i52n4sj7uo8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgmcoj2cph2bs)_

name: Barlow For Wyo
subject: Barlow for Wyoming Newsletter
body:
Looking Ahead to a New Year
| | | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_0)
---
| **Welcome to the Barlow for Wyoming Newsletter - your hub for campaign news, information, and upcoming events.**
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_1)
---
| **Looking Ahead to a New Year**
---
| Please see the video message from the Barlow Ranch above, set on a beautiful Wyoming morning. As we step into a new year, I would like to begin with a simple thank you. The kind of support we've seen since beginning the campaign does not happen by accident. It happens when people believe in a shared vision and are willing to invest their time, energy, and trust. I do not take that lightly. Because of you, this campaign closed out the year with record-breaking fundraising and real momentum. See below for a closer look at our release. The year ahead will move fast. The legislative session is right around the corner, and I will continue to show up, listen, and do the work Wyoming people expect from their leaders. At the same time, the campaign trail keeps rolling. We will be in towns big and small, having real conversations about the issues that affect daily life, not just the headlines. I wish you and your families a happy, healthy, and prosperous 2026. Wyoming has always been at its best when we work together, stay grounded, and keep our focus on what truly matters. Let’s keep that spirit front and center as we move forward, doing what's best for Wyoming today and for the generations coming next.
Riding for Wyoming, Eric
---
|
---
| ** All 23 Counties Visited!**
---
| Since my announcement in August, Kelly and I have been busy criss-crossing the state, visiting all 23 counties before the end of the year! And, we have more trips planned. We will continue stopping by cities and towns to listen and learn from you!
---
|
---
| **Eric In the News**
---
| | | Barlow Raises Over $500k, Brings Historic Fundraising Momentum Into 2026
Eric Barlow’s campaign for Governor of Wyoming is closing out the year with unprecedented momentum, reporting just over half a million dollars raised. The amount places the campaign on pace for one of the strongest fundraising efforts of any Wyoming gubernatorial race in Wyoming’s history. “I entered this race to continue serving Wyoming, not to climb the political ladder or play wait-and-see politics,” Barlow added. “As we head into the new year, I’m grateful for the trust people have placed in this campaign, and I’ll keep working every day to earn it.” Since launching his campaign, Barlow has received broad, grassroots support from Wyomingites across all 23 counties. His campaign has signed up hundreds of volunteers, has over 460 Wyoming donors, and has more than $390,000 in cash on hand to carry forward into 2026. “This campaign is being built by Wyoming people who believe in Wyoming solutions,” Barlow said. “This level of support is humbling, and it tells me that folks are ready for leadership that listens, respects local communities, and puts the long-term future of this state first.” “Wyoming people know Eric Barlow, and they trust his steady leadership,” said Diana Enzi, co-chair of the Barlow for Wyoming campaign committee. “This early support reflects real confidence in his commitment to practical solutions for Wyoming’s future.” The strong fundraising comes alongside growing statewide engagement. Over the past five months, the campaign has expanded its footprint across Wyoming, with supporters hosting events, volunteering, and helping carry Barlow’s practical conservative message into their own communities. Campaign leadership attributes the fundraising success to a focus on direct voter engagement and a campaign grounded in Wyoming values rather than national political trends. “This unprecedented early support reflects what we know about our Wyoming neighbors,” said Tony Ross, co-chair of the Barlow for Wyoming campaign committee. “They are responding to a campaign built on experience, service and respect, and they’re ready for steady, capable leadership.” Looking ahead, the campaign plans to build on its momentum with expanded outreach, additional community events, and continued engagement with voters across Wyoming. January will include events in Campbell County, the Big Horn Basin, and both southwest and northwest Wyoming. February and early March will focus on the 2026 legislative budget session, during which Barlow will host events across the southeastern part of the state.
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| Connect Folks to Eric

Are there folks in your neck of the woods that Eric and Kelly need to meet? Could you be the person or group that connects them? Let us know if you'd like to host an informal get-together with Eric to help him share his plans for moving our state forward. Lots of 2026 dates are still available. You can log your interest on our website or get in touch with us at scheduler@barlowforwyo.com.
---
|
---
| **Ride with Barlow for Wyoming**
---
| Eric's campaign is powered by folks who believe in Wyoming’s values of hard work, integrity, and community. Your contribution keeps us moving forward to build a stronger future for our state. **👉 Join the ride — chip in today!**
---
| | [ DONATE ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_2)
---
|
---
| **Get In The Saddle**
---
| | |
---
| | | | Wyoming’s strength has always come from neighbors pitching in. Join the Barlow For Wyoming team of volunteers who are helping share his message across our state. **🤠 Ride with us — sign up to volunteer!**
---
| | [ VOLUNTEER ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_3)
---
| | | | **Follow Us Online**
---
| [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_4) [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_5) [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_6) [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_7)
---
| No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KE7AGQJQEAQ0CJSA99RH1QX5_8)
Barlow For Wyo P.O. Box 822 Green River, WY 82935
---

His campaign has signed up hundreds of volunteers, has over 460 Wyoming donors, and has more than $390,000 in cash on hand to carry forward into 2026. “This campaign is being built by Wyoming people who believe in Wyoming solutions,” Barlow said. “This level of support is humbling, and it tells me that folks are ready for leadership that listens, respects local communities, and puts the long-term future of this state first.” “Wyoming people know Eric Barlow, and they trust his steady leadership,” said Diana Enzi, co-chair of the Barlow for Wyoming campaign committee. “This early support reflects real confidence in his commitment to practical solutions for Wyoming’s future.” The strong fundraising comes alongside growing statewide engagement. Over the past five months, the campaign has expanded its footprint across Wyoming, with supporters hosting events, volunteering, and helping carry Barlow’s practical conservative message into their own communities. Campaign leadership attributes the fundraising success to a focus on direct voter engagement and a campaign grounded in Wyoming values rather than national political trends. “This unprecedented early support reflects what we know about our Wyoming neighbors,” said Tony Ross, co-chair of the Barlow for Wyoming campaign committee. “They are responding to a campaign built on experience, service and respect, and they’re ready for steady, capable leadership.” Looking ahead, the campaign plans to build on its momentum with expanded outreach, additional community events, and continued engagement with voters across Wyoming. January will include events in Campbell County, the Big Horn Basin, and both southwest and northwest Wyoming. February and early March will focus on the 2026 legislative budget session, during which Barlow will host events across the southeastern part of the state. | | | | | | | | | | Connect Folks to Eric Are there folks in your neck of the woods that Eric and Kelly need to meet? Could you be the person or group that connects them? Let us know if you'd like to host an informal get-together with Eric to help him share his plans for moving our state forward. Lots of 2026 dates are still available. You can log your interest on our website or get in touch with us at scheduler@barlowforwyo.com. | | Ride with Barlow for Wyoming | Eric's campaign is powered by folks who believe in Wyoming’s values of hard work, integrity, and community. Your contribution keeps us moving forward to build a stronger future for our state. 👉 Join the ride — chip in today! | | | | Get In The Saddle | | | | | | | Wyoming’s strength has always come from neighbors pitching in. Join the Barlow For Wyoming team of volunteers who are helping share his message across our state. 🤠 Ride with us — sign up to volunteer! | | | | | | Follow Us Online | | No longer want to receive these emails? Barlow For Wyo P.O. Box 822 Green River, WY 82935

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Some thoughts on Venezuela and Trump’s decision to go to war
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7)
Hi Derek, this is a long email that I hope you’ll read about the Trump administration’s military operations in Venezuela this week:
After a year of lawlessness at home, Donald Trump is once again lashing out, without thinking about the consequences.
His Secretary of Defense talks of vengeance and “effing around and finding out,” and his Attorney General seeks to impose the “wrath” of the justice system however Donald Trump sees fit.
And for far too long, Congress has done nothing to stop it. Nothing.
Congress has the power to declare war and check the president, including this one who flagrantly violates his oath of office and breaks the law. That puts not just our citizens at risk, but endangers our interests abroad, too.
But more than just talking, I’ve been doing something about it, along with Tim Kaine and Rand Paul.
Over the past few months, as Trump massed American servicemembers and firepower in the Caribbean, and used military force to destroy vessels and kill those on board, I forced bipartisan votes to stop the illegal misuse of our armed forces. We warned that the true motive was not drugs, but regime change in an oil-rich nation.
Something Trump made plain in his address — this was about oil and power, not about drugs. If it were about drugs, he wouldn’t have just pardoned the drug-running former president of Honduras.
Listen, nobody will mourn for Nicolás Maduro. He was a thug and an illegitimate leader of Venezuela, terrorizing and oppressing its people for far too long and forcing many to flee the country. But using military power to remove Maduro so that Trump’s cronies can profit from that nation’s oil wealth is not in our national interest. It doesn’t justify Donald Trump’s trampling of the Constitution. And it further erodes America’s standing on the world stage and risks our adversaries mirroring this brazen act, like in Taiwan or Ukraine.
Donald Trump is clear: he launched this war to remove a foreign leader, and now, he claims the U.S. will “run the country.” In other words, Donald Trump wants the U.S. to be an occupying power and control the oil proceeds.
Look, our service members performed their mission with enormous courage and skill. They are the best and most capable military in the world. But the public wants action to lower costs at home, not to risk the lives of service members abroad in another endless war.
Derek, acting without Congressional approval or the buy-in of the public, Trump risks plunging a hemisphere into chaos and has broken his promise to end wars instead of starting them. And in conjunction with his continued saber-rattling around the world and dropping approval ratings at home, the American people should be concerned that this is not the last time he will break that promise. By the administration’s logic, Trump can send our military anywhere in the world and be the sole decider of when to risk war. Not the American people. Not Congress.
**[We need to rein in this power. Derek, Congress must bring up a new War Powers Resolution and reassert its power to authorize force or to refuse to do so. If you agree, please add your name in support today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=EG_2601_Venezuela.gV4ymn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20260105_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=EG_2601_Venezuela.gV4ymn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20260105_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7)
---
For far too long, under both Democratic and Republican presidents, Congress has failed on a bipartisan basis to do its job and vote on whether to send the nation’s service members to war. It’s our most basic responsibility.
But we have a chance to act now. And we must.
We must speak for the American people who profoundly reject being dragged into new wars.
Americans, especially our military families, deserve better than a President who will so openly break his promises of peace when there’s oil profits on the line.
More from me very soon,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12026_abs_em.43HrbP&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20260105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q12026_abs_em.QtEv2H&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20260105_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=7&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---
Sign up to receive [fewer emails](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/em-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7) or [visit our store](https://store.adamschiff.com/). Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=9369%2E5257348%2EpadGi7)

Friend, Throughout my campaign so far, my favorite part has been meeting Americans where they are, and hearing directly from them about what they care about most. [**But, if we haven’t had the chance to meet in person, will you let me know what issues matter to you most by filling out my campaign’s 2026 Priorities Survey? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122698101/593235998/-411445434?source=LOC_EM_SURV_2026.01.05_Priorities-2026_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZjYzk0MWQtNGNlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zHxGOj9iA2IETq5cazClz2LG3O5w91_Uhkt07a7EyV0=&emci=4f1579da-57dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=efcc941d-4cea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=626985) | | [ Take the survey ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122698104/593236000/-411445434?source=LOC_EM_SURV_2026.01.05_Priorities-2026_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZjYzk0MWQtNGNlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zHxGOj9iA2IETq5cazClz2LG3O5w91_Uhkt07a7EyV0=&emci=4f1579da-57dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=efcc941d-4cea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=626985)

From fighting to lower costs to investing in our children’s education, what happens in Washington has a direct impact on families in AZ-01 and across the country. That is why it is really important to me to hear from every voter I can on what matters most to them.
My extremist opponent, Gina Swoboda, does not care what everyday Americans care about. _She is dedicated to serving Donald Trump and enacting his radical agenda._

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Capitol Update for January 5th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e4b648079d&e=a7ab36849c)
| | | | | |
# Happy New Year!
I’m grateful for the trust you’ve placed in me to serve our community. 2025 brought meaningful progress on public safety, animal welfare, victims’ rights, government accountability, and responsible governance. Here’s a look at what we accomplished together:🐾 **Protecting Animals & Strengthening Accountability**Last session marked a major bipartisan win for animal welfare. At the end of December, the Trump Administration also launched a multi-agency [‘strike force’](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ae9c343a90&e=a7ab36849c) to crack down on animal abuse, so animal cruelty cases aren’t just an Arizona problem.✔️ SB 1658 — Failure to Treat; Animal Cruelty (Signed)This landmark bill strengthens Arizona’s animal‐cruelty statutes by ensuring that failing to provide necessary medical care is treated as the serious offense it is. It passed with strong bipartisan support and is now state law.🛡 **Supporting Victims & Public Safety**I continued my long‐standing commitment to protecting victims and strengthening justice.✔️ SB 1103 — Victims’ Rights Enforcement (Signed)Enhances enforcement tools to ensure victims’ rights are upheld across the justice system.✔️ SB 1220 — Victims’ Rights; Audio Recordings; Appeal (Signed)Expands victims’ access to audio recordings and strengthens their rights during appeals.✔️ SB 1424 — Impersonation of Veterans or Armed Forces (Signed)Creates penalties for falsely claiming military service — a critical step in honoring those who truly served.🚨 **School Safety & Youth Protections**Keeping students safe remains a top priority.✔️ SB 1227 — School Safety; Cell Phone Bans (Engrossed)Advances policies to reduce classroom distractions and improve learning environments.✔️ SB 1508 — Bullying Definition (Advanced)Strengthens Arizona’s statutory definition of bullying to better protect students. Sadly, the Freedom Caucus combined their efforts with the Democrats to kill this important piece of legislation named in honor of [Andrew Harstad](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=29e47f7cdf&e=a7ab36849c).🏛 **Government Efficiency & Accountability**As Chair of the Regulatory Affairs & Government Efficiency Committee, I continued pushing for transparent, responsive government.✔️ SB 1507 — Corrections Oversight Office (Signed)Improves reporting and oversight within Arizona’s corrections system.✔️ SB 1659 — State Board; Allegations of Misconduct (Signed)Creates clearer processes for handling misconduct allegations within state boards.✔️ SB 1527 — Occupational Boards; Renewal Extension (Signed)Reduces regulatory burdens by extending renewal timelines for occupational licenses.💼 **Banking, Finance & Consumer Protection**Serving on the Finance Committee, I advanced several measures to strengthen financial transparency and consumer protections.✔️ SB 1206 — Banks; Special Deposits; Requirements (Signed)Updates requirements for special deposits to protect consumers and ensure financial stability.🚗 **Transportation & Public Safety**✔️ SB 1107 — Motorcycle Safety Fund Continuation (Signed)Continues critical funding for motorcycle safety education and training statewide.🗳 **Election Integrity & Civic Trust**✔️ SCR 1001 — Citizenship; Identification; Contributions; Early Voting (Pre-filed for Next Session)A major election‐integrity measure pre-filed to strengthen voter identification and ensure confidence in our electoral system.**Leadership That Delivers** As your state senator, I will continue to serve on key committees shaping Arizona’s future this year:
* Chair — Regulatory Affairs & Government Efficiency
* Member — Judiciary & Elections
* Member — Finance

With my continued leadership, I will ensure that Arizona families, taxpayers, and small businesses have a strong voice at the Capitol.**Looking Ahead in 2026** In 2026, I will continue to be productive, collaborative, and focused on real‐world solutions. I will remain committed to advancing public policies that protect families, support victims, strengthen accountability in our public education system, and ensure state government works efficiently for every Arizonan.**Outlook for 2026**
* Focused on Solutions
* Driven by Service
* Committed to Arizona

**Bolick in the News**[ KNAU](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=35d5fba9d8&e=a7ab36849c)[AZ Free News](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=62e93b95c5&e=a7ab36849c)[AZ Free News](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1f2ba9eb5d&e=a7ab36849c)

* January 5th at a Paradise Valley residence from 5:30pm to 7:30pm. Please RSVP to [PJ@PetersenPublicAffairs.com](mailto:PJ@PetersenPublicAffairs.com) for the exact address.
* January 6th from 4pm to 6pm in downtown Phoenix. Please RSVP [HERE](mailto:info@BolickforArizona.com?subject=RSVP%20for%201/6) to receive the address.
* January 8th from 10am to 11:30am in downtown Phoenix. Please RSVP [HERE](mailto:info@BolickforArizona.com?subject=RSVP%20for%201%2F8&body=null) to receive the address.
* January 8th at Arizona Rock Products Association from 4pm to 6:30pm. Please RSVP [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dc3e531a8c&e=a7ab36849c) to receive the address.

I will remain committed to advancing public policies that protect families, support victims, strengthen accountability in our public education system, and ensure state government works efficiently for every Arizonan.Outlook for 2026 Focused on Solutions Driven by Service Committed to Arizona Bolick in the News | | 📅 Campaign fundraisers this coming week January 5th at a Paradise Valley residence from 5:30pm to 7:30pm. Please RSVP to mailto:PJ@PetersenPublicAffairs.com for the exact address. January 6th from 4pm to 6pm in downtown Phoenix. Please RSVP mailto:info@BolickforArizona.com?subject=RSVP%20for%201/6 to receive the address. January 8th from 10am to 11:30am in downtown Phoenix. Please RSVP mailto:info@BolickforArizona.com?subject=RSVP%20for%201%2F8&body=null to receive the address. January 8th at Arizona Rock Products Association from 4pm to 6:30pm. Please RSVP to receive the address. | | 📌 Campaign Update👉 Please** to sign my online nomination petition to help me qualify for the August Republican primary ballot. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | 👉 Please to donate to my campaign to keep our momentum going. | | | | | | | As you know, I have officially filed paperwork to run for a third term. With your continued support, we will hold this Senate seat in November 2026 and keep fighting for Arizona families, small businesses, and educational freedom.Thank you for staying engaged and informed. Your interest and partnership helps ensure we continue building a stronger, safer, and more prosperous Arizona. Best, Shawnna | | | | | Copyright © 2026 Vote Bolick, All rights reserved. If you want to mail a donation, our mailing address is: Shawnna Bolick c/o Vote Bolick 610 E. Bell Road 2-142 Phoenix, AZ 85022 | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. AUTHORIZED BY SHAWNNA BOLICK. | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Vote Bolick c/o Shawnna Bolick 610 E. Bell Rd. #2-142 Phoenix, AZ 85022 * USA

[Visit Tony's Website Here](https://substack.com/redirect/7150122d-3907-4615-9fb9-91e7d24e9352?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Fairfield is at a pivotal moment. Rising costs, erosion of local control, and growing frustration with town governance make clear that Fairfield needs experienced, steady, and solution-focused leadership. That's why **Tony Hwang** is the right choice to serve as Fairfield's next First Selectman.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..CM_4ORNrKYA0feHgAVnWr9Bij3TCud9LAd1KB34ln8U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=183559940)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=183559940&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTU5OTQwLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc2Mjg0NTUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDIyMDQ1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bvM1iDjLBfzLy84ChBeRHFVm8RiJIFRVmV8nsAd9wQI)
Tony Hwang has spent more than 35 years deeply connected to Fairfield--engaged in civic life, raising a family, and serving the community long before this campaign began. His public service record spans more than two decades at the local and state level, built on collaboration, accountability, and delivering results, even while serving in the minority party.
This election is about restoring balance and trust in local government. One-party rule has left too many residents feeling unheard and unrepresented. Tony has seen firsthand how unchecked power weakens transparency and accountability. Fairfield deserves leadership that listens, asks hard questions, and governs for all residents--not just a political majority.
Tony's priorities are practical and focused:
* Improving town services while respecting every taxpayer dollar
* Restoring local control, especially in zoning and land-use decisions
* Protecting Fairfield's quality of life, infrastructure, and environment
* Strengthening education by focusing not only on buildings, but on student experience, mental health, and post-COVID recovery

He believes Fairfield **can provide better services to residents without spending more money** --through disciplined budgeting, efficient management, and transparent governance.
### Election Information
* **Election Day:** Tuesday, **February 3, 2026**
* **Absentee Ballots Available:** Beginning **January 5, 2026**
* [You Can Click Here to Apply for an Absentee Ballot](https://substack.com/redirect/4516aeec-bb7d-4e60-bcb0-4398093ae5d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or
* Go to the Fairfield [Town Clerk's Office](https://substack.com/redirect/6cc58fb5-f00f-46e2-9066-bbc395fcdf40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Old Town Hall, 611 Old Post Road, 203-256-3090.
* **Early Voting In Person:** **Thursday, January 29 through Sunday, February 1, 2026** , from **10:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a3f7a8a3-dae1-43a1-a411-c7d4b3789fe1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
To learn more about Tony's experience, vision, and priorities, visit **[tonyhwang.org](https://substack.com/redirect/2e6ff5ec-a881-44ff-bfcf-48b25ae2c0e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/2e6ff5ec-a881-44ff-bfcf-48b25ae2c0e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

### What Else Can You Do?
If you live in Fairfield, talk to your friends, neighbors, and family. Tell them the future of Fairfield is in their hands--and that Fairfield can deliver better services without spending more money.
Encourage them to look beyond party labels and headlines and focus on experience, accountability, and real solutions. A simple conversation can make the difference: a phone call, a walk down your street, or a reminder to vote early.
### Get Involved - Need campaign materials or want to help?

#### _The campaign headquarters are open at**929 Kings Highway East**. Stop by to pick up lawn signs, literature, or to get involved with canvassing and outreach._
#### _Fairfield works best when residents are engaged, informed, and involved._
#### _**This election isn 't about partisanship--it's about leadership, experience, and the future of Fairfield.**_
**Tony Hwang is ready to lead Fairfield forward.**
### A Note From Supporters
_While this father-and-son team does not live in Fairfield, we have spent significant time here with friends and neighbors and are deeply invested in preserving the**local control and quality of life of all Connecticut residents** , especially in the wake of **HB 8002** , which threatens to impose one-size-fits-all policies on towns that know their communities best._
_We have knocked on doors throughout Fairfield and spoken with residents from all walks of life --families, seniors, renters, homeowners, and small business owners. What we consistently hear is a desire for leadership that listens, respects local control, and focuses on practical solutions. **Based on those conversations and Tony 's proven record, we are confident that Tony Hwang will serve Fairfield well as First Selectman, just as he has served the community with integrity and dedication as its State Senator.**_
[Pledge your support](https://substack..CM_4ORNrKYA0feHgAVnWr9Bij3TCud9LAd1KB34ln8U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=183559940)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=183559940&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTU5OTQwLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc2Mjg0NTUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDIyMDQ1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bvM1iDjLBfzLy84ChBeRHFVm8RiJIFRVmV8nsAd9wQI)

name: quickpoll@voteractionproject.org
subject: Foreign interference in our elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Department of Justice has previously seized websites linked to Russian disinformation campaigns. Federal authorities separately accused two employees of the Moscow-controlled media organization RT of being a part of a scheme to spread Russian propaganda, bolstered by millions of dollars.
That comes on the heels of a Beltway think tank revealing that a network of pro-Iranian sites have been circulating disinformation around the election, not long after the intelligence community linked Iran to a hacking of a presidential campaign. U.S. officials have said that Russia, Iran, and China were all trying to influence our elections.
We want to hear from voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Are you worried about foreign interference in our elections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=010526_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=010526_1no&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010526_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010526_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Happy New Year, Peter!

There's no denying that 2025 was a challenging year—one that marked a pivotal moment in the fight for reproductive rights.

**As we turn the page to 2026, we do so with resolve and defiance.** There will be challenges ahead, but we remain steadfast—and hopeful—about what's possible when people come together to defend our rights.

**Because of the generosity of our incredible community, we are starting the year strong.** Every single dollar donated helps us:
* Challenge abortion bans nationwide so people do not have to risk their lives to access basic care
* Expand access to health care around the world and advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights
* File landmark lawsuits to block extreme and dangerous anti-abortion bans

Thank you for your voice, your support, and your commitment. I’m incredibly proud to have you on our team as we move forward together.

Onward!

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

P.S. If you didn’t have a chance to give before the year ended, it's not too late. [Every gift—at any time—helps fuel the critical work ahead.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/122704967/593246377/2141984067?sourceid=1151063&utm_campaign=26emjge-1225aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=thankyou&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmE0YjUyZi01MGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rVjrnp_IWhBu_BSzKDMP1r8tRF8VCn-MoNK_ZzYzg8=&emci=2fb62c59-4ae0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8fa4b52f-50ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/122704968/593246378/2141984067?sourceid=1151063&utm_campaign=26emjge-1225aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=thankyou&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmE0YjUyZi01MGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rVjrnp_IWhBu_BSzKDMP1r8tRF8VCn-MoNK_ZzYzg8=&emci=2fb62c59-4ae0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8fa4b52f-50ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

clean_body: Hope for 2026 | | | | ---|--- | Happy New Year, Peter! There's no denying that 2025 was a challenging year—one that marked a pivotal moment in the fight for reproductive rights. As we turn the page to 2026, we do so with resolve and defiance. There will be challenges ahead, but we remain steadfast—and hopeful—about what's possible when people come together to defend our rights. Because of the generosity of our incredible community, we are starting the year strong. Every single dollar donated helps us: Challenge abortion bans nationwide so people do not have to risk their lives to access basic care Expand access to health care around the world and advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights * File landmark lawsuits to block extreme and dangerous anti-abortion bans Thank you for your voice, your support, and your commitment. I’m incredibly proud to have you on our team as we move forward together. Onward! Nancy Northup President & CEO P.S. If you didn’t have a chance to give before the year ended, it's not too late. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. | Peter,
Over 50,000 people in communities across Colorado and the eastern plains have their groundwater contaminated with salt and even radioactive elements.
Donald Trump just vetoed a bipartisan bill to fund a critical pipeline to provide clean drinking water to these people. And Trump's top MAGA ally, Lauren Boebert, is unable and unwilling to help them now.
This failure belongs to Lauren Boebert. She thought she could play both sides and win--and now real people are paying a heavy price for her blind loyalty to Trump, who only cares about wealth and power for himself.
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zb97-Z51BMyrJ2wrkV9NMK5A9bGQwzEQ4prQORaCRBFLaaMJlgmsZClFb5WU8ONDdzwWUmf3thkauAIb_meVWessEV3jlC4rWmz7G1M3DuDqNK11zfCMUI3Wo4LWfzE6ZRfNAuGwQNEfbvvIKVaij9bhktyJH5JlgxK50wwxuRGuVUs9B3xcY6DoxIwDjaGGx7CyzBOBRcpTWuKrADWtzKyOlzvLL6PBxFdvddrfuKg=&c=XpmOWvVq9ha3DSnFphfZFVU16ty7zW15Cp50ga1mgNUymueJJ_q4tg==&ch=X9xKD-j22BPvFP10efJlginV7sgdKlSkYqkwERwxAGZ3Q6m91NvyHw==)
---
Carpetbagger Lauren Boebert never did have the backs of the people of the 4th district--but now it is painfully obvious to everyone that not only is Boebert an utter embarrassment, she is also the most ineffective and incompetent lawmaker in Congress.
Boebert's relentless sucking up to Trump did nothing for Coloradans. All it did was advance her political career.
Lauren Boebert voted against rural infrastructure projects for clean drinking water in TWO different bills. While working at the AFL-CIO, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese helped pass those bills.
Let's put an end to her disastrous time in office: Trisha needs your help right now, Peter, to defeat Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. When Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her in 2024, our campaign had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in the district--outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points in a red wave election.
[The starting gun for the 2026 midterms just went off and we need to get a strong lead against Boebert to defeat her this year. name: Floriduh
subject: Runty Ron DeSantis giving MAGA a lift with FL gerrymander
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
DeSantis’ “Floriduh” gerrymander could make or break this entire fight for the House before any votes are cast in November.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qhb6hnN8REVUQLMx_awmCZ2ilDjiqz5JnqhgKKg5sb9fLdT_hRnw-Cz1dB8ZcrH1GlbH4yNX8Jz4SB3PnL48-RififwgxUKp_Kh2OL5rlK8w0C_meLk95H63e1MetaZeTWDEPbuU1YWx1nHE6MTB2Fw9iZWk8e-IoHDhz8cf_J_EwGVB1BWNmabWWmQRQveD3xnbU-GRBWF3WYv3N-scFQ==&c=BPMgpWk_3aOzWMTXSTZyG1n9WshRTW649oyX2eBFzrAv9omFYsqsCw==&ch=Iz2uDg33qWKa6q9t5HpY77BWzj7TeOEzs_lL9d_KpTYuWppLYe-1cg==)
---
Peter,
When little Ron DeSantis ran for president, it was revealed that he put lifts in his shoe heels to add an extra 3 or more inches to his height.
That pathetic ploy didn't help him. He still failed--and was humiliated repeatedly by the man he now answers to: Donald Trump.
But now that Runty Ron's boss has ordered him to find him extra GOP seats in Florida to help MAGA survive the coming midterm storm, DeSantis is trying to give Republicans an artificial boost with the same old trick he pulled in the 2024 campaign: putting lifts in MAGA's shoe heels by forcing the Florida legislature to add 3-5 more red seats before April.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qhb6hnN8REVUQLMx_awmCZ2ilDjiqz5JnqhgKKg5sb9fLdT_hRnw-Cz1dB8ZcrH1GlbH4yNX8Jz4SB3PnL48-RififwgxUKp_Kh2OL5rlK8w0C_meLk95H63e1MetaZeTWDEPbuU1YWx1nHE6MTB2Fw9iZWk8e-IoHDhz8cf_J_EwGVB1BWNmabWWmQRQveDEQGE04CBlJVrRv-_Aw6T4Q==&c=BPMgpWk_3aOzWMTXSTZyG1n9WshRTW649oyX2eBFzrAv9omFYsqsCw==&ch=Iz2uDg33qWKa6q9t5HpY77BWzj7TeOEzs_lL9d_KpTYuWppLYe-1cg==)
---
DeSantis' "Floriduh" gerrymander could make or break this entire fight for the House before any votes are cast in November.
That's why our ballot initiative campaign to allow blue state Colorado conduct redistricting is so important right now, Peter.
We can't sit back and hope that DeSantis' Florida gambit backfires--we need to get to work making sure blue states follow suit and fight MAGA head-on.
Colorado Draws The Line is leading the ballot measure to redistrict blue Colorado. Our effort could flip 2 or even 3 GOP-held seats, virtually wiping out any advantage Trump may get from Florida's gerrymander.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122711386/593253447/-1468130409?refcode=em-1.5.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMxZjhjZS01M2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_3onWlDo2_X77jn5OCmxY9kqd8mfJSdwwq4J-lZZh0=) Hi friend, This is Cisco Aguilar, Nevada’s Secretary of State – the state’s top election official. In 2022, Nevadans elected me to this office after I defeated one of the most extreme election deniers in the country – in a razor-tight race decided by fewer than 25,000 votes. It was a close and hard-fought election, and it showed just how much pressure our democracy is under. Since then, I’ve focused on doing the job Nevadans trusted me to do. That has meant a lot of work on modernization, innovation, and transparency. We’ve implemented a new election management system with the latest in technology and cybersecurity; started to replace our outdated corporate filings system; and made things easier for small business owners in Nevada. We even cut hold times when you call the office from 45 minutes to under 5! We’ve also worked to improve the basics: strengthening our election systems, supporting county clerks and local officials, and pushing back against misinformation meant to confuse or intimidate voters. **Now, I’m up for re-election.** Because Nevada is a swing state, the pressure on our election system is always high – and extremists have shown they’re willing to exploit that. The person elected Secretary of State this year will be responsible for running the 2028 election Imagine an election-denier in this role. That’s not a hypothetical we can afford to test. And in a swing state like Nevada, the consequences could truly influence the outcome of the presidency. That’s why I’m reaching out today: **[If you believe in fair, secure, and accessible elections, I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. This will be one of the most consequential statewide races in 2026, and your $3 support helps us build the operation we need to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122711388/593253448/-1468130409?refcode=em-1.5.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMxZjhjZS01M2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_3onWlDo2_X77jn5OCmxY9kqd8mfJSdwwq4J-lZZh0=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122711389/593253449/-1468130409?refcode=em-1.5.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMxZjhjZS01M2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z_3onWlDo2_X77jn5OCmxY9kqd8mfJSdwwq4J-lZZh0=)**

clean_body: | = Hi friend, This is Cisco Aguilar, Nevada’s Secretary of State – the state’s top election official. In 2022, Nevadans elected me to this office after I defeated one of the most extreme election deniers in the country – in a razor-tight race decided by fewer than 25,000 votes. It was a close and hard-fought election, and it showed just how much pressure our democracy is under. Since then, I’ve focused on doing the job Nevadans trusted me to do. That has meant a lot of work on modernization, innovation, and transparency. We’ve implemented a new election management system with the latest in technology and cybersecurity; started to replace our outdated corporate filings system; and made things easier for small business owners in Nevada. We even cut hold times when you call the office from 45 minutes to under 5! We’ve also worked to improve the basics: strengthening our election systems, supporting county clerks and local officials, and pushing back against misinformation meant to confuse or intimidate voters. Now, I’m up for re-election. Because Nevada is a swing state, the pressure on our election system is always high – and extremists have shown they’re willing to exploit that. The person elected Secretary of State this year will be responsible for running the 2028 election Imagine an election-denier in this role. That’s not a hypothetical we can afford to test. And in a swing state like Nevada, the consequences could truly influence the outcome of the presidency. That’s why I’m reaching out today: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Cisco | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: The Democrats
subject: Our New Year’s Resolutions:
body:
---
Derek, **Happy New Year!** It’s officially 2026, and we’ve gotten a jump start on our New Year’s resolutions. Here they are:
* **Flip the House and the Senate** so we can stop Trump’s disastrous agenda in its tracks.
* **Elect Democrats at all levels of government** who will fight for a more fair, just, and affordable future for their cities, districts, and states.
* **Organize everywhere to win anywhere.** To elect as many Democrats as possible, we need to continue investing in state Democratic Parties, recruiting and training volunteers, supporting candidates nationwide, and having impactful conversations with voters across the country to ensure they know what’s at stake this year.

But Derek, the thing about New Year’s resolutions is that they aren’t accomplished overnight. We know achieving these goals is going to take hard work and diligence _all year_. And to do it, we have to start now. [**So today, we’re asking you to join us and chip in $7, or whatever you can afford, to power our fight to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year and beyond. We’ll put your donation to work immediately as 2026 gets underway:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260105_5601_fr&refcode2=5601_22930333_fihTCQ&akid=5601%2E22930333%2EfihTCQ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260105_5601_fr&refcode2=5601_22930333_fihTCQ&akid=5601%2E22930333%2EfihTCQ)**

clean_body: | | | | | New year. New quarter. Same mission. Our team is focused on getting in front of as many voters as possible every single day. In the coming weeks, our campaign will be out in full force collecting 3,000 valid signatures from neighbors, friends, and community members across the district to earn our place on the ballot. | | | | As we kick off this new fundraising quarter, here’s a breakdown of what your contribution will go directly toward: | | → ✍️ Print petitions and launch signature collection events to get Joe on the ballot → 📋 Train and support volunteers to help gather signatures → 🗳️ Expand our reach among voters early and consistently | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | | | Joe Reagan is building a broad, energized coalition well ahead of the June 2026 primary that is powered by people who live here, lead here, and believe our community deserves better representation. Thank you for standing with us. Joe for CO-05 | | | Joe Reagan is a Democrat, decorated combat Veteran, nonprofit leader, and devoted father running for Congress to flip Colorado’s 5th District blue. With over 20+ years of experience leading change and teams across the defense, technology, and nonprofit sectors, Joe Reagan is ready to step up and bring the concerns of our community to Congress. Support Joe’s campaign to help launch a new era of leadership in Washington D.C. »** | | FOLLOW JOE ONLINE: | | ---|--- Paid for by the Committee to Elect Joe Reagan

name: Graham Platner
subject: Susan Collins, Chuck Schumer, and AIPAC are trying to bury us before we even get started
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
Peter,
Janet Mills just entered the race against Susan Collins. So you’re about to get a million fundraising texts and emails from Mills and her campaign (if you haven’t already).
I’m new to this whole politics thing, but I’ve begun to learn how this works: After you donate to any establishment Democrat, Chuck Schumer and the DNC turn around and use your email address and phone number to put their thumbs on the scale – propping up their choice, even when that person is not the strongest candidate in the race.
It’s all part of the corrupt system in Washington. Corporations buy candidates through corporate PAC checks. Special interest groups like AIPAC pour millions into Super PACs. And Chuck Schumer and the DNC buy loyalty by sending millions of texts and emails to funnel money to milquetoast candidates, even when they don’t have the best chance to win.
I’m not the choice of corporations, AIPAC, Chuck Schumer, or the DNC. And that’s exactly why I’m the Democrat who is finally going to actually defeat Susan Collins and turn Maine blue.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a Democrat who will actually support Medicare for All and call what’s happened in Gaza a genocide.
But I’m going up against Susan Collins, AIPAC, and the entire DC establishment. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I am counting on folks like you to chip in now to our campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Graham Platner and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3&amount=25]
This is a pretty pivotal moment in our campaign, so no amount you can afford is too small. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to childrenâ€™s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn564912tq4cc8g6bst7ncqovtu9f4brfpic67ao_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3tmuthe2s4o13v263q0qml5cgv7p0sb3ge5dlso_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh4dsnqritnnnkljtiegu0eubsf1gj70f8l5qcr8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztbi9b36tpf39m051bh67idfqmt111jd5p5spds8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zptgv3pdusn5l3qbiufb28hltuvmrg053aakq9s8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr3te3ae44av2ekds8sm6bs4u1tgs2gtrjqi1t90_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpqvf44r7kvpiao5c5ncvin23sb6l3huegt5jka8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ctnk2qgoohrbqidg9ef0os76ak4u0lc01fsuuo_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj2aomgrfslskp1gmgbt47v2hadv875p06ujd8qo_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cdgm1or4chh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

name: Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, & Ryan Zinke
subject: If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:

All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA - Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: PolitiBrawl
subject: Trump predicts Cuba “ready to fall” after Maduro capture
body:
"It was Cubans that guarded Maduro," Rubio revealed. "He was not guarded by Venezuelan bodyguards. He had Cuban bodyguards..."

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..iozGSH4O4GDZau80gAfNKekDCCazbjwJyJ3wpBiNf_k?) for more

# [Trump predicts Cuba "ready to fall" after Maduro capture](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=183543873&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTQzODczLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc2MzMxMDQsImV4cCI6MTc3MDIyNTEwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AT0z61_YfzY0e57fAxvQZOFsqTVcQNJCVFgXDd4H4BU)
### "It was Cubans that guarded Maduro," Rubio revealed. "He was not guarded by Venezuelan bodyguards. He had Cuban bodyguards..."
| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---
| Jan 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=183543873&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTQzODczLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NzYzMzEwNCwiZXhwIjoxNzcwMjI1MTA0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DdZFdyOgdR06Eo2qVBhARw2CUgMKASBxxjB-Stk3p3E&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=183543873&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTQzODczLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc2MzMxMDQsImV4cCI6MTc3MDIyNTEwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AT0z61_YfzY0e57fAxvQZOFsqTVcQNJCVFgXDd4H4BU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=183543873&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTQzODczLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc2MzMxMDQsImV4cCI6MTc3MDIyNTEwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AT0z61_YfzY0e57fAxvQZOFsqTVcQNJCVFgXDd4H4BU)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcG9saXRpYnJhd2wvcC90cnVtcC1wcmVkaWN0cy1jdWJhLXJlYWR5LXRvLWZhbGw_.6W69mAMWG15wdXMo4XABnUdHj0Xgf0oGpYYFNcB1B9E?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/trump-predicts-cuba-ready-to-fall?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

President Donald Trump said late Sunday that Cuba's fate is now**["directly tied to Maduro's ouster"](https://substack.com/redirect/2697254e-03c3-4993-b11a-31342d313696?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and predicted the island nation will collapse without Venezuela's security and oil support, telling reporters aboard Air Force One "I think it's just going to fall. I don't think we need any action. Looks like it's going down. It's going down for the count" when asked if he was considering U.S. action in Cuba.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2697254e-03c3-4993-b11a-31342d313696?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Cuban forces killed protecting Maduro, ran Venezuelan security:** Cuba's government acknowledged 32 Cuban military and police officers were killed during the U.S. operation in Venezuela, marking the first official death toll released by Havana and announcing two days of national mourning, while Secretary of State Marco Rubio revealed Cuban operatives effectively ran Venezuela's internal intelligence and security operations, with Maduro "not guarded by Venezuelan bodyguards. He had Cuban bodyguards."
* **Trump threatens Colombia over cocaine trafficking:** Trump took aim at Colombia, accusing its leadership of fueling drug trafficking into the U.S., saying "Colombia is very sick, run by a sick man who likes making cocaine and selling it to the United States" and warning the country "is not going to be doing it for a very long time," while suggesting the U.S. was prepared to act against narco-trafficking networks.
* **Operation part of broader Western Hemisphere strategy:** Trump framed Saturday's capture of Maduro and his wife on narco-terrorism charges as part of a broader effort to reassert U.S. dominance in the Western Hemisphere, invoking the Monroe Doctrine and warning that hostile regimes can no longer rely on one another for survival, while also reviving his focus on Greenland, arguing the Arctic territory is critical to U.S. security amid Russian and Chinese activity.

* * *
# **Gov. Tim Walz drops out of 2026 re-election bid amid Somali fraud scandal**
Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz **[abruptly dropped his bid for a third term Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/ad34aba1-ef2b-4921-b99e-3dc26e99dce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid a growing fraud scandal where allegedly billions of taxpayer dollars were swindled on his watch, stating "Every minute I spend defending my own political interests would be a minute I can't spend defending the people of Minnesota against the criminals who prey on our generosity."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad34aba1-ef2b-4921-b99e-3dc26e99dce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Fraud estimates range from $1 billion to $9 billion:** The theft is thought to be at least $1 billion, though First Assistant U.S. Attorney Joe Thompson claimed late last year the fraud could be $9 billion or more, with prosecutors having charged over 90 people for setting up bogus nonprofits to get state funding to provide services to the homeless, hungry, and individuals needing daycare--fraud prevalent among Minnesota's Somali population.
* **Klobuchar viewed as top Democratic contender:** U.S. Sen. Amy Klobuchar is viewed as the top contender to jump into the race and would join three Senate colleagues running for governor, though her potential candidacy complicates Democrats' hopes to go on offense in the 2026 midterms, particularly with retirements in key states including Minnesota where Sen. Tina Smith is not seeking reelection.
* **Walz blasts Trump while defending tenure:** In his announcement, Walz swiped at President Trump--who has railed against the welfare scandal--claiming "Donald Trump and his allies want to make our state a colder, meaner place" and accusing them of "demonizing our Somali neighbors and wrongly confiscating childcare funding," calling it "disgusting" and "dangerous," while GOP Majority Whip Tom Emmer responded "Good riddance."

* * *
# **Maduro transferred to federal court for arraignment**
Nicolas Maduro, the dethroned Venezuelan dictator indicted on major drug trafficking and weapons charges, **[was transferred to federal court in New York Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/7c16c8f3-a98d-41d2-92e3-b0d0fa9252f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for his noon ET arraignment, with footage showing federal authorities moving a handcuffed Maduro from a helicopter to an armored truck, days after American forces captured him in his presidential palace.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/64037a14-d6e1-43f5-8486-765c1ce19a0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Maduro faces four charges, wife faces three:** Maduro faces four charges including narco-terrorism conspiracy, cocaine importation conspiracy, possession of machine guns and destructive devices, and conspiracy to possess machine guns and destructive devices, with federal prosecutors stating "For over 25 years, leaders of Venezuela have abused their positions of public trust...to import tons of cocaine into the United States," while his wife Cilia Flores, also arrested in the raid and a high-level official in Venezuela's socialist regime, faces three similar charges.
* **Short hearing expected, bail highly unlikely:** The proceedings are expected to be short with no witness testimony, where the defendants will have a chance to enter their pleas and the judge will set the next court date and address pretrial release, though bail is highly unlikely according to legal experts.

* * *
# _Must Watch:_
# **Army vet goes NUCLEAR on Eric Swalwell, wipes the smug smile right off his face**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/dc775d8b-1cdd-4327-b843-e9f9a559be69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
