name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 1/5/2026
body:
Health care realities in Colorado and a brief global update
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**January 5, 2026** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Rocky Mountain Voice family,
Happy New Year — and welcome to 2026.
There’s a lot to cover from last week, and that’s fitting for the first newsletter of a new year. As we turn the page, we’re starting with stories that cut straight to issues Coloradans live with every day: health care access, rising costs, and decisions made far from the communities most affected by them.
Before diving in, we also want to flag one piece we haven’t shared to our newsletter audience yet: **[Rocky Mountain Voice’s Most Viral Moments of 2025](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**. It’s a snapshot of what readers engaged with most last year — not curated highlights, but the stories people actually stopped to read, share, and debate. It’s worth a look as we set the tone for the year ahead.
**Health Care: What’s Actually Happening in Colorado**
Two RMV original reports anchor today’s digest, and together they tell an important story about how health care policy plays out beyond press conferences and political talking points.
First, we break down how [Colorado secured more than $200 million in federal funding for rural health care](https://link.email.joinrmv.) — and why the reality looks very different from the rhetoric surrounding it. While national debates framed recent legislation as a threat to access, the funding Colorado received is targeted, limited, and designed to stabilize care in rural communities without running through insurance companies or expanding bureaucracy. The details matter here, especially for hospitals and providers that have been operating on the edge for years.
Our second health care piece looks at a different side of the system: [why “caps” don’t always cap costs](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Whether it’s TABOR at the state level or the Affordable Care Act’s medical loss ratio rules, we walk through how policies meant to restrain spending can still allow overall costs to rise. It’s not an argument built on slogans — it’s an explanation of incentives, loopholes, and the quiet shift from taxes to fees that many Coloradans feel but rarely see spelled out.
Taken together, these stories reflect what we aim to do more of in 2026: slow down, show the mechanics, and explain how decisions actually affect families, providers, and taxpayers.
**A Brief Look Abroad: Venezuela**
We’re closing today with a short international update that connects to broader themes we’ll continue watching. Developments in Venezuela — including renewed attention on Nicolás Maduro’s regime, long-standing U.S. indictments, and coordinated pro-Maduro activity inside the United States — have resurfaced questions about foreign influence, information warfare, and the reach of authoritarian systems beyond their borders.
We’ve linked several pieces below for readers who want to understand the background and why this moment matters. It’s a reminder that global events often intersect with domestic politics faster than we expect.
_🚩[Before his fall from power, two decades of U.S. documents detail Maduro’s criminal conduct](https://link.email.joinrmv.)_ _🚩[How socialist activist networks mobilized nationwide protests within hours of Maduro capture](https://link.email.joinrmv.)_
Thank you for starting your Monday with us — and for bringing Rocky Mountain Voice into a new year. Stay tuned this week as we continue reflecting on 2025 and begin rolling out what’s ahead for 2026.
— Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Rocky Mountain Voice: Boots on the Ground, Uncovering Colorado’s Hidden Truths](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.) _Rocky Mountain Voice has spent the last two years covering stories that don’t fit neatly into a news cycle. We’ve reported on fraud, government overreach, and policy failures by doing the unglamorous work — pulling records, talking to whistleblowers, and sticking with stories long after other outlets lost interest._

**[The Top Lies of 2025](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** [THE FEDERALIST](https://link.email.joinrmv.) If it felt like 2025 was just one big psyop orchestrated by the Democrat Party and its accomplice media stooges, that’s because in many ways, it was. Learning nothing from the political and ratings beatings they took in 2024, the left and its corporate media allies doubled down on twisting the truth during the first year of Trump 2.0.
**[Colorado Voters Could Decide Future Of ICE And Local Law Enforcement Cooperation](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**[DENVER7](https://link.email.joinrmv.) Next fall, Colorado voters could decide whether local law enforcement should be required to cooperate with federal immigration enforcement, such as U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), in certain cases.

|
---
**STATE**
**[After the rhetoric, Colorado secures $200 million for rural health care](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.) “People will die—tens of thousands, perhaps year after year after year—as a result of the Republican assault on the health care of the American people.” That’s what House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries said on July 3, during the longest speech in House history, in an effort to delay passage of H.R. 1—a.k.a. the One Big Beautiful Bill (OBBB)—before it was sent to President Trump for signature.
**[Bird Resignation Rekindles Debate Over Unelected Lawmakers](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**[COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.joinrmv.) Despite new laws governing vacancies in the Colorado legislature, Democrat statehouse member Shannon Bird has still found a workaround that throws a wrench into her constituents’ ability to choose their representative at the ballot box.

**[New Colorado Emissions Law Expected to Push Furnace Prices Up 40% or More](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**[FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.joinrmv.) HVAC experts are warning about a significant price increase in the cost of new furnaces and water heaters in 2026. On Jan. 1, a new law went into effect in Colorado tightening the emissions standards on gas furnaces and water heaters.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Federal Eyes Turn to Minnesota After YouTuber Exposes Massive Childcare Fraud](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**[TOWNHALL](https://link.email.joinrmv.) I mean, it’s wild. Maybe not for the locals who likely saw the alleged Somalian corruption schemes that appear to be rampant. From Medicare to childcare, this group seems to have gamed the system for tens of billions of dollars.

**[If 2025 Had a Playlist, These Songs Would Be on It](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.) _This was a year that kept interrupting whatever you thought you were doing. It arrived unevenly. Some moments swallowed entire news cycles. Others barely registered at first, only making sense months later, once the consequences showed up. Most of the arguments about 2025 focused on motives or ideology._
**[Five Trump Policy Moves Legacy Media Largely Ignored in 2025](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**[THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.joinrmv.) About 70% of Americans said they didn’t have “very much” or any trust that news outlets would fairly cover President Donald Trump’s second term, according to a YouGov poll. Media Research Center found that 92% of the major network media coverage of Trump during his first 100 days in office was negative. __
_**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**_
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Douglas County Sees Political Shift in 2025 After Home Rule Vote and School Board Elections](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.joinrmv.) Douglas County this year failed to achieve home rule status, voters elected a progressive-leaning school board and officials completed a land transfer to build a massive regional sports complex.

**[Ski Town at a Standstill as Labor Dispute Shuts Down Telluride Slopes](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**[THE NEW YORK TIMES](https://link.email.joinrmv.) The ski runs above the mountain town of Telluride, Colo., sat eerily empty on Saturday. Chair lifts hung as motionless as icicles. Tourists slumped beside outdoor fire pits, trying not to think about the money they had spent on ski vacations now upended by a labor dispute.

**[First Fatal Mountain Lion Encounter In Decades Reported In Larimer County](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**[DENVER7](https://link.email.joinrmv.) A woman died after a suspected mountain lion attack south of Glen Haven in unincorporated Larimer County, authorities say. Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) posted at 5 p.m. Thursday that it was responding to the area for a “suspected mountain lion attack” and Denver7 confirmed around 7 p.m. that it was fatal.
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.joinrmv.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Voices From the Frontlines: The 2025 Guest Pieces That Shook Colorado Readers](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.) _This list wasn’t shaped by editors or ideology. It took shape because readers kept stopping, reading, and sharing these guest commentaries. After the list, we step back and look at what that pattern tells us—and why it matters going into the new year._
**[Why Mamdanism Will Not Win Colorado](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY BOOKER LIGHTMAN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.) _Zohran Mamdani’s upset victory in the New York City mayoral election has sparked excitement on the far left and dread on the right. Will Mamdani herald a new age of far-Left ascendancy? Fortunately for Republicans, his victory was contingent on factors specific to New York City that are not present in the rest of the country._
__

**[“Not a Land Grab”](https://link.email.joinrmv.)****
** BY AIMEE TOOKER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.) _The proposed Dolores River National Conservation Area is a total of 68,000 acres along the river in Montezuma, Dolores and San Miguel Counties and was the result of over 15 years of stakeholder engagement. Despite the remote and beautiful nature of the Dolores River, over a century of coordinated collaboration among stakeholders has determined its optimal usage and management, and those local conversations excluded the use of both Wild and Scenic status as well as a designation as a National Monument.___
____

**[Serving Together — Mature Language of Love](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
**[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.) _If love is who we are, what does it look like when we put that love to work? Interesting question. There is a special kind of strength that emerges when God’s people connect, bond, and pray... they serve together, which is the language of love. It’s a strength that the world cannot produce or imitate. This strength of unity is created—not by power, preference, or personality—but by love in action._ __
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
🎯**DID YOU KNOW?** About 44% of Americans make a **New Year’s resolution** before the night is over — but only 31% stick with it. By February, more than 80% have already fallen off. The most common goals? Exercising more, eating better, losing weight, and saving money.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Let me tell you who I am
body:
This is me, Peter.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3729?t=7&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe) **Who I am:** Dad. Husband. Brother. Son. Northern Nash High Varsity Basketball alum (and a graduate of NC public schools from 1st grade through law school). A former Governor, Attorney General, and legislator before that — with a winning record in the toughest campaigns. Your Democratic candidate for the U.S. Senate from North Carolina. **What I stand for:** Affordable health care and housing. Lower prices. Good jobs. Strong schools. A liveable planet. Abortion access. Voting rights. Feeding kids who are hungry. Doing right by this country even when powerful politicians would rather I stay silent. **Why I need you:** My race for the U.S. Senate is one of the most competitive in the country, and Republicans see me as their top threat. Donald Trump handpicked my opponent. GOP mega-donors are lining up to fund his campaign. There’s a long road ahead of us, and if we’re going to win, we need the resources to take on everything the GOP can throw at us. [I know how to win NC. I know I can’t do it alone. A donation of $1 or more today will help give us the momentum to flip this toss-up seat for the first time since 2008.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3730?t=8&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe) Thanks for being in it with me, Roy Cooper [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3729?t=9&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=10&akid=293%2E124072%2EJ_MGpe)

name: Raul (personal)
subject: Reaching out directly to say thank you, and Happy New Year.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=yNBVRc6t35drwiqXCSbyrfbQHt2oC1%2BtaG2ZWcdSasFy1k4yithQnrYbPG71vFMpK6%2FCHd%2FdUqVRuzhcAP2zVIkoDdTPN8QtZg%2FMPFpoRgiKBqpGApCeSXThKs7VncSztFC9MOYVT5MYvlHn7NebKxiBrpLLr2uWUhGyfcbaOnkZXbWEku5kToKNae5Vnpw%2B%2BGOxGaoHo6FByV%2FXOonZ1D2YpsXRjQB1gNT3sugXHn7TZ3Yt90L%2BLoGgsyShjL3Khx7KZv%2B8w5h%2BL0CrbMvmBAAJnZEipnnUs5QsArDYR1g%2BQT5h1AeVnEEr4M%2Bi38qQRv%2FSKQ6jA1WpOWEq%2BO4yy69Mo3ouXwRAMSRNGUzW%2Fc5aP8XfPmEvOmbX9X1gUqqyWTyTtEbUZ6BhHorwglvpFjQ1hfFZqIC58hur9e8GcoAxUgbCiR0qyYACwQT8lHWK]

# [#]
Happy New Year! 🎉

I wanted to reach out to you and extend a personal thank you for lending your support towards our year-end fundraising deadline on Wednesday night.

Thanks to you and supporters all across California’s 25th and beyond, I’m proud to share that we successfully hit our fundraising goal.

As we kick off 2026, we need to stay focused and reverse the red-leaning trend we’ve seen here in CA-25 to play our part in flipping the House in November. Meeting goals like this is exactly how we do it.

We’ve got our work cut out for us in the days ahead, and there’s simply too much at stake to slow down for even a second.

But for now, thank you for standing with me. Together can we create a future of compassion, prosperity, and progress for all of us in 2026.

Sincerely,
Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

1. Kari Lake To Congress: Please Don't Give Us the Money
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a4b5cf93-7068-4298-8764-684d2dae4370?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In this interview, Kari Lake said something I've never heard a bureaucrat say out loud: "Please don't give us the money." She's talking about shrinking government, not growing it -- and it's a direct challenge to the "more funding fixes everything" mindset.
2. What's really breaking MAGA apart -- and is the chaos organic or engineered?

In this in-depth conversation, James Lindsay joins me to unpack the growing divisions inside the MAGA movement. We define what many are calling the "Woke Right," break down the three distinct factions now operating under the MAGA banner, and explain how infiltration, incentives, and manufactured outrage are fueling internal conflict.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7946f1-c342-4d68-8ebf-d2aff300a7bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rather than chasing personalities or online drama, this conversation focuses on systems, power, and outcomes -- separating real ideological differences from distractions designed to weaken the movement from within. If you've sensed something is off but couldn't quite name it, this discussion provides clarity.
3. The CROWN Act Is a Scam: Josh Shapiro Gave Himself $4M and Gave Black Pennsylvanians Optics
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eed8d3cd-35df-4247-97c0-20bec39c8665?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eduardo_Ver=C3=A1stegui=2C_Sound_of_Freedom_Foundation?=
subject: A hospital bed can stop a child from being trafficked
body:
There are no ICU beds left. That’s what we’re changing, right now.

| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5818320/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvTk5BbnlBcmo5aA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDU/LbmNsTWxyU0dBUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNHTGRTRE5SSEJLeHZscw/gaVv5XQ/s3t7001d831)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Mexico City is my home. It’s where I was born, where I learned to believe in God’s purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart. When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache. You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film _Sound of Freedom._ But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren’t enough ICU beds to care for them. Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come. That’s why I’ve set a goal:

**I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds** to hospitals and medical centers that serve God’s children in Mexico City.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
These beds are lifelines. They are where a fragile heartbeat stabilizes, where a child’s breathing grows stronger, where healing happens. **[_Will you give $25, $50, or $100 today to help us deliver these ICU beds to the hospitals that need them most?_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ Give Now – Rush Healing to a Child ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Every $1 you give becomes $10 of real medical value. How? Because through the Sound of Freedom Foundation’s partnerships with trusted humanitarian distributors, we’re able to secure **bulk discounts on high-need medical equipment**. That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help. $25 → provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies.
$50 → provides $500 toward children’s ICU beds.
$100 → provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies.
$250 or more → helps equip an entire hospital ward for rescued children. **_[Will you give $25, $50, or $100 today to help us reach this goal and bring healing to God’s children?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_**
---
[ Give Now – Save A Child’s Life ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night. And the impact doesn’t end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive. In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, **a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused.** This is what we can change together. We have the plan.
We have the partners.
But this mission can’t launch without you. Patriot, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation. If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit. **[Will you give $25, $50, $100, or more today to help us deliver these ICU beds to Mexico City before time runs out?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ Send an ICU Bed to a Sick Child - Give Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
For God’s children,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5818320/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDU/LbmNsTWxyU0dBUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNHTGRTRE5SSEJLeHZscw/gaVv5XQ/s6l5d7911f1)

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: The exact moment I called Emerge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
I was drinking coffee, looking out at Mount Hood, and listening to Dr. Christine Blasey Ford testify during the Kavanaugh hearings.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122726914/593270220/-1585290222?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2026-01-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwYmQ5YjhjLTVmZWEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0Vxd6_yQwveoLDuQRTGEuereX7RLufVqSTX3UuZBv9o=)
---
| Peter,

I’m Congresswoman Maxine Dexter — an Emerge alum, a physician, and now a member of Congress from Oregon.

I can tell you the exact moment I decided to run for office. I was drinking coffee, looking out at Mount Hood, and listening to Dr. Christine Blasey Ford testify during the Kavanaugh hearings.

**Three hours later, I called a friend at Emerge Oregon and said: “I want to run for office.”**

Emerge was my first step into political life. They trained me, encouraged me, and gave me the confidence and skills to go from an ICU doctor to a lawmaker.

And during the pandemic, while treating COVID patients and watching scientific expertise get dismissed and distorted by the Trump administration, that training grounded me. I knew exactly why I was in the fight and who I was fighting for.

Today, in Congress, I see firsthand how desperately we need more women with real-world experience, science backgrounds, and fierce empathy. Women who recognize disinformation when they see it and refuse to let chaos replace evidence. Women who can stand up to Trump’s attacks on truth and public health.

Emerge helps build those women.

[_**The next class of Emerge candidates — doctors, educators, organizers, mothers — will shape the future of our democracy in 2026. Will you join this moment as a 2026 Founding Donor and help train more women to run and win?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122726915/593270221/-1585290222?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2026-01-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwYmQ5YjhjLTVmZWEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0Vxd6_yQwveoLDuQRTGEuereX7RLufVqSTX3UuZBv9o=)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Regime change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2020%2E791427%2Eww_dwV)
Friend — The simple truth is that Trump’s actions in Venezuela are illegal under international law and unconstitutional under American law.
But beyond the law, these actions are just the latest example of a strategy of reckless and destabilizing attempts at regime change by the United States.
From nations like Iraq and Afghanistan, to Nicaragua and Guatemala, to Libya and Iran, the United States has attempted, often successfully, to topple foreign governments through either military force or coups and covert operations.
We have seen the devastation that these actions leave behind: Power vacuums, civil wars, economic collapse, breakdown of public infrastructure, and even the development of terrorist groups and fascist leaders.
Now we are seeing this same exact story play out, just months after Trump promised on the campaign trail to end needless wars and interventions. **It was a lie.**
I want Americans to ask themselves: Should the priority of our government be dropping bombs overseas and meddling with other countries’ governments and futures? Is that really the best use of our time, attention, and money?
Just look at the last year of Trump’s presidency. He has overseen an all-out slashing of federal agencies and lifesaving programs. Millions of Americans are struggling to deal with the cost of healthcare, rent, groceries, and energy thanks to Trump’s policies. But there are two groups that always seem to do well: Defense contractors and oil companies.
That’s why Trump and Marco Rubio are already talking about Mexico, Cuba, Colombia, and even Greenland potentially being next. Trump said himself on Fox News: **_“We can do it again, too. Nobody can stop us.”**_
They are emboldened by the lack of accountability from Congress or the international community. It’s absolute authoritarianism. Which means it’s up to us, Americans of all kinds who oppose endless war and regime change, to speak out forcefully and ensure public opposition to Trump’s harmful actions.
I am running for reelection to Congress because I believe we have a responsibility to put a check on the President’s illegal acts of war and play a role in forging a new US foreign policy, one where we seek diplomacy around the world rather than illegal and destabilizing invasions. One where we are attentive to the needs of our world while staying focused on the many issues we face at home.
**[If you believe in that vision, I need your help to beat Trump and the far-right this November and ensure a real check on the power of this runaway White House. Chip in whatever you can afford today and support the work of our movement.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan26.B2OwkJ&refcode=em260105-1-180&t=2&akid=2020%2E791427%2Eww_dwV)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan26.B2OwkJ&refcode=em260105-1-180&t=3&akid=2020%2E791427%2Eww_dwV)**
Trump is playing with the lives and futures of countries like Venezuela because he believes might makes right. We have to reject it. We have to fight back and win.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=2020%2E791427%2Eww_dwV)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=2020%2E791427%2Eww_dwV)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=2020%2E791427%2Eww_dwV)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=2020_791427_ww_dwV&akid=2020%2E791427%2Eww_dwV)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

I want Americans to ask themselves: Should the priority of our government be dropping bombs overseas and meddling with other countries’ governments and futures? Is that really the best use of our time, attention, and money? Just look at the last year of Trump’s presidency. He has overseen an all-out slashing of federal agencies and lifesaving programs. Millions of Americans are struggling to deal with the cost of healthcare, rent, groceries, and energy thanks to Trump’s policies. But there are two groups that always seem to do well: Defense contractors and oil companies. That’s why Trump and Marco Rubio are already talking about Mexico, Cuba, Colombia, and even Greenland potentially being next. Trump said himself on Fox News: “We can do it again, too. Nobody can stop us.” They are emboldened by the lack of accountability from Congress or the international community. It’s absolute authoritarianism. Which means it’s up to us, Americans of all kinds who oppose endless war and regime change, to speak out forcefully and ensure public opposition to Trump’s harmful actions. I am running for reelection to Congress because I believe we have a responsibility to put a check on the President’s illegal acts of war and play a role in forging a new US foreign policy, one where we seek diplomacy around the world rather than illegal and destabilizing invasions. One where we are attentive to the needs of our world while staying focused on the many issues we face at home. Trump is playing with the lives and futures of countries like Venezuela because he believes might makes right. We have to reject it. We have to fight back and win. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION
subject: Happy New Year! It's time for a change in JOCO.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION * 6709 West 119th Street * Ste
body:
I hope you had a wonderful Christmas and a Happy New Year! We have alot of work to do, can I count on you to join me in this fight?

| | | | | [|
---](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=3a55dae817&e=7320325a61)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
Dear Peter,As we welcome a new year, I want to take a moment to say **thank you**.

This past year reminded us of something important: Johnson County is full of people who care deeply about their families, their neighbors, and the future we’re building together. No matter the challenges we face, this community shows up, and that gives me real hope for the year ahead.
A new year is a chance to reset, refocus, and recommit to what matters most: honesty, accountability, and leadership that respects the people it serves. It’s a chance to do better...and to expect better from those in charge.
I’m running for **Johnson County Commission Chair** because I believe our county works best when decisions are made in the open, when leaders listen first, and when families come before politics. That’s the kind of leadership I’ll bring in 2026 and beyond.
**As we step into this new year together, I hope you’ll stay engaged, stay informed, and stay hopeful. This campaign is about the future of Johnson County - and I’d be honored to have you with us.**

Working for you,
**Karen Crnkovich
** Candidate for Johnson County Commission Chair
---

clean_body: I'm too busy to search far & wide for you AGAIN! | | | | I have ONE spot left on the official 2025 MAGA Honor Roll ... and I’m holding it for YOU. Your name has come across my desk over and over this year — more than once, more than twice — which is exactly why I told my team: “Save the final spot for Fellow American do NOT give it to anyone else.” I’m personally compiling the permanent 2025 MAGA Honor Roll , the exclusive list of my strongest, most loyal patriots from this historic year. This list is going straight to my desk in the Oval Office. I will be reviewing every single name myself tonight. Please don’t make me stay up all night wondering why you weren’t there when I looked for you. Thank you, President Donald J. Trump P.S. When I don’t see your name tonight, I’ll know you let the last spot go to someone else. Don’t do that to me. Confirm now and make my night. | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. All contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (i.e., without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are strictly prohibited. Contributions made in the name of, or refunded by, any other person are unlawful. | Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc., P.O. Box 509, Arlington, VA 22216. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee.

## Commonsense Corner:
---
This weekend, the heavy hand of American justice brought [Nicolás Maduro](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/B7bL_2i9csH_ALRqASyHac4-_nUjR3oonSrrzBRnFggzW7WeZJ93kUXw_3TYIWuCLUF3_t53OabvmVgQNXkGydAlUKftxwGODDyRD0vdN5LPJR7XEUhS6fi1V_l_nrZ7Hu5zAnKyWPXMv1Emndt2ptHhBt7VlvNiIyaH6jO_dhNL65vhSsixmz2LjV8m4_PGvKIlzZzwJCEyPQzzuq9F8Ym7w9MxVHoCWbX28AKcRSAaLBCRbMs4uxjxwCCf8iZWoEPjfCxaEeDwAfbnyclLla9VKnC53zQsx8vKhcfum6H36fpargDrN7sVSvpWHMY6xtIUnaBrOe91zZ-MuMFtaqZD_AWaBQ0NRlWE-53yYhJsdV5rHxQO4K9zAPmFlI6pHJxfxVozLtlMC2oInjeNIXL2ZksR4SOhzU3waYjUqMBwc3d4IkYMVbql3p0F_w7aIK7qhIAOc1euzDy6n9yEMluoe9NjqtIO2p6A8sC7eX6k8h6iPEJCBUxnFUfbayqt0l_Ey1ndXQ/Tzy2MIzzncJvPlWlrhx7Azs_d02zSGC-/16) out of hiding, ending his tyrannical regime once and for all. Across Venezuela, people [celebrated](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/5utCsa_8-j5VkzD6WJP7HJt1UnFnegFHaMWgYXfun_c_PBO2SO0CDpNXUzbKJVFTAkFP43lUx6v4oIq8rGGrcfP3RoGk5AUlghvuLUAF4pG0Phucld3TBCfqNxUnmWetG5ISXn7bP5nqcOwE_oChrogXtV9KBlX1YL7PNiFZaB5JH0yYVkgknSi2Y-w7aASTaCA7UfWr489J2uLpt8tsnBcw1S6BTdEgVCTuoNtrnnHG9udUwidZf2JI-rQdMfGygy5c8USXopAIlJCi9eTyF0mqoor6GBIPPJvEzPHgKXRwP3_kXmUbXLA4O-XLeceXAU_uLIGKRWpme1YFApl7OSgq5NUXiaSw2mU5m4dRYVhL8IXVREUyGkB3n-dhsUW19hKjqCw3eQKH0JpoMx73yANT3MMwGPpGpY19mG5ozFEsFGQ1t95hAGp-RtsdfzIiuN2D9CjgmnXJifUGbmePVIg9ttKRUF-yo9C5S9-4eBLiWUA6zSq3ipq4OiOg6o4AZLgSFLFr81azMTDPrwGOqFFfwX5Qd6VjOXEwlmRJR9G2F-qI4ytjl0Sqjb7DmK4/lH5pCC1kYFRwtkGCXbq0kzqG9ygjL7G6/16) in the streets—tears of joy streaming down their faces. They’re finally free from a thug dictator whose rule destroyed their lives, and America will be safer without his relentless narco-terrorism. But this didn’t happen by accident. It happened because America led. Kudos to President Trump, Secretary Rubio, Secretary Hegseth, and the brave men and women of the U.S. military who carried out this operation with precision. As Tim likes to say, you may not want President Trump [teaching](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/Vhb5csW28fqw4GpjRZEVi1flAob2ZflXJqnmQhosa3ttvAa9ojPCxhWmwQCm_mbf3-T45n392d862pfss0J-VkHmFxjR5swKyw8ywMQmUg0OxTXNZZQy4-dKXH2YELDoGy739iZRw_lMTnxy9M7eJox2bBoQMjMQUQ9Og2Ma9D8Sk7ebIrGhU2aqXN6POfn_lM74dsUqnD7YEmMzWCj4oancA89_XRXhtMK4IZ50O7IGkAq4PnRFV5hVDD3GQRZfRpCUISbIsI9cOXEVXhS9xIh7qIuG3_0BJWJW1HRgwKid03jq_HlHzefoYP82L5s3bkisYTY0Dqnhe2YENqZcUh50QeKYeiUp_79vslKCGKcJaWVQz5-3eBQ9MMIT6ax7jibKbjoZNhANiOPu4JAmoOejxqp7ipsc6qnR0bTM-8asjk5qQ-0YXDUwOK4KtsU/lDSr4hd30jRPPqWU1DRvdLEkTZ3d9F30/16) your Sunday School class, but he’s exactly who you want in the White House. Once again, the United States showed the world that freedom still has a defender. God bless America!

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: This weekend, the heavy hand of American justice brought out of hiding, ending his tyrannical regime once and for all. Across Venezuela, people in the streets—tears of joy streaming down their faces. They’re finally free from a thug dictator whose rule destroyed their lives, and America will be safer without his relentless narco-terrorism. But this didn’t happen by accident. It happened because America led. Kudos to President Trump, Secretary Rubio, Secretary Hegseth, and the brave men and women of the U.S. military who carried out this operation with precision. As Tim likes to say, you may not want President Trump your Sunday School class, but he’s exactly who you want in the White House. Once again, the United States showed the world that freedom still has a defender. God bless America! | Boots on the Ground Poll: Do you support President Trump taking the initiative to topple the Maduro regime and restore democracy in Venezuela? Last Week’s Poll Results | This Week in Tim’s Feed | Just For Kicks In case you’re wondering what it looks like inside Tim’s skateboard shed, here’s a peek! Turns out scraps can make a pretty cool looking longboard. We look forward to seeing this one when it’s all done, but who should it go to? Comment on with your ideas. | Sport Your Support: | | | | | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Troy Downing
subject: Hey you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? If you do, I’m BEGGING YOU to read this email...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Hey you!
Yes, you, Peter.
No, not your laptop. The person looking at it!
I was really hoping to reach you today.
This is Congressman Troy Downing, and I want to thank you for opening my message. Can I borrow just one more minute of your time?
**President Donald J. Trump and House Republicans have accomplished a historic twelve-month run unlike anything in modern American history.**
_🇺🇸 We secured the border 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We brought back American jobs 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We cut taxes for working Americans 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We reduced government waste 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We eliminated the woke agenda 🇺🇸_ The tide has turned in our favor.
**_BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!!_**
**WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!!**
The Democrats are more desperate than ever.
They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan.
They’ve become a dangerous cabal that **CANNOT BE TRUSTED** with America’s future.
If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age.
But we need the funds to make it happen NOW!
The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance.
**_Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it._**
I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. [Is it worth it to you?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[CHIP IN $17 RIGHT NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)–Troy| |

| | **Happy New Year!** Last Saturday marked one year of the 119th Congress, and my priorities this year remain focused on Northwest Washington. It is an honor to represent the 2nd District — one that I never take for granted. This past year was difficult as we stood up for our values against the Republican Rip-Off and their attacks on critical programs like Job Corps, local infrastructure, food assistance programs like SNAP, and affordable health care. **We faced the longest government shutdown in history.** During that shutdown, federal workers like air traffic controllers and TSA agents did not receive paychecks, but many continued to show up to work to keep the flying public safe. At the end of the year, Western Washington experienced historic flooding that we are still continuing to recover from. **I hosted five town halls with more than 83,000 people attending, watching, and listening in total. **I had 313 meetings and events in Northwest Washington state and 315 meetings and events in Washington, D.C. I received more than 310,000 messages (2.1 times as many as I received in 2024) and responded to 103,000 of them (2.4 times as many as in 2024). I listened to your concerns about this administration and brought your stories with me to fight for our values. This year, we have an opportunity to take back the House in the November election. We have to start building our momentum now. [**Will you donate $3 and help us turn the tide in the upcoming election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122731780/593278529/1596212816?refcode=2026-01-05-newyear&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e225ca2d-63ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI1Y2EyZC02M2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8fFi_fT-zVmqHWQY-a47q2ZrGcEbmv35p5QrcrTN40=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122731781/593278530/1596212816?refcode=2026-01-05-newyear&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e225ca2d-63ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI1Y2EyZC02M2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8fFi_fT-zVmqHWQY-a47q2ZrGcEbmv35p5QrcrTN40=) Together, we can take on the Republican Rip-Off and win back the House. body:
https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/ [https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/]
Peter,
We have six days to reach our first big milestone and it’s one that will shape the entire course of this campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail] .
New York’s public financing system is one of the most powerful tools in our democracy. It allows everyday people, not just big donors, to decide who gets heard. When a campaign qualifies:
• Candidates can run real, competitive races
• Voters have more power than special interests
• Incumbents have to earn every vote
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail] Here’s how it works: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail] Small-dollar donations from New York residents between $5 and $250 are matched 6-to-1 by the state [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail] . That means $5 becomes $30. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail]
But to unlock those matching funds, two things must happen by January 11 :
• 1,000 New Yorkers must contribute
• We must raise $100,000 from New York residents
We set an ambitious goal to qualify in our very first filing period and incredibly, we are within reach.
So here’s my simple ask: Can you give $5 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail]
That $5 brings us closer to unlocking six times as much, and it helps us carry this message across the East River, up the Hudson, and into communities that rarely get heard.
We launched this campaign just weeks ago — and already, the momentum is real. Hitting this milestone will prove that New Yorkers are ready for something new.
Let’s finish this year strong and start the next one with the wind at our backs.
With gratitude,
Adem

name: Mike Van Someren for State Senate
subject: It's Time to Get Serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
People are doing their part. It's time the system did too.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mikevansomeren/raising-wages-helps-businesses-thrive-10143109?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=30eafb6b3d&e=356c0699dd)
| | | | | |

Happy New Year.I hope you had time over the holidays to rest and reset; because now it’s January, and this is when campaigns stop being ideas and start becoming movements.Let me be clear about what this campaign is and isn’t. This is not about replacing work or lowering expectations. It’s about restoring the basic promise that if you work hard, the system should work for you too. People are already doing their part. What’s broken are the systems around them.\- As wages fall behind, employers should be part of the solution — not put the entire burden on workers.
\- As healthcare costs rise, the largest providers and insurers should be part of the solution rather than putting the burden solely on patients.
\- When schools struggle, we shouldn’t drain their funding and walk away.
-And when rules are enforced, they should apply to **everyone** —no special treatment.Government gets expensive not because it acts, but because it stands by while problems grow.This is the year we stop shrugging. The year we hold power accountable, expand opportunity, and make sure hard work means something again.Here’s how you can help right now:
* **Stay engaged:** read our updates and follow along as the campaign ramps up
* **Talk with others:** share why this race matters to you with friends or family
* **Show up when you can:** whether that’s hosting or attending an event, a conversation, or helping spread the word

If you’re reading this, you’re already part of the solution.It's time to get serious. Let’s get to work.
---
| | Mike Van Someren
---
| | Want to know more? Want to help elect people that actually want to work for you? Go to [www.mikevansomeren.com](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=1ecc439f31&e=356c0699dd) to donate and learn more.

# Mamdani acolyte goes full communist in leaked video
NYC Mayor Mamdani's tenant director, **[has sparked backlash](https://substack.com/redirect/fc4b8ef0-dbd8-4b31-9969-d54d4d7f9e8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over her views on property in the Big Apple and who it will be targeted at. She vows to transition property from individual to collective ownership, predicting a significant impact on white families as the city redefines housing rights.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc4b8ef0-dbd8-4b31-9969-d54d4d7f9e8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Controversial Video:** Cea Weaver, in a video that has appeared on X vows to transition property from individual to collective ownership, specifically targetin
g white families for impact as the city redefines housing rights.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/978badab-e638-44e4-97d1-3f2f85d3670e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Weaver 's radical vision: Her aim to** redefie property rights to prioritize collective good is a move critics see as a veiled assault on private ownership and traditional values.
* **Historical Parallels Offer A Warning:** Weaver's proposal mirrors failed socialist experiments from history, raising concerns about its feasibility and consequences for property rights in America's financial capital.
* **Past Tweets Leak:** In a **[selection of tweets](https://substack.com/redirect/282adf14-0625-40b2-ba29-329d8476fa99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** pulled from her X account Weaver's views are inline with socialist and communist ideals.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/282adf14-0625-40b2-ba29-329d8476fa99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/282adf14-0625-40b2-ba29-329d8476fa99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/282adf14-0625-40b2-ba29-329d8476fa99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

**An excellent way to display your American Pride and stand up to the woke MOB!**
**On your Boat, House or Truck, the message is clear!**
Made from 100% durable polyester, this flag is designed to withstand the elements while maintaining vibrant colors and high visibility. With its double-sided design, you can showcase it's message on both sides, ensuring that it looks great from any angle.
[Order your "Jolly Donald" flag today](https://substack.com/redirect/0e5d69ff-d328-4e57-95c3-9d61fb1386ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Maduro's capture creating volatility in the oil market as untapped reserves to open
Oil prices **[climbed modestly](https://substack.com/redirect/46ef4919-cb19-43ae-a593-774d9e0ec128?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday after the Trump administration orchestrated the dramatic overthrow of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro, casting uncertainty over the future of the OPEC nation's vast crude reserves while Trump called for massive U.S. investments to revive crumbling Venezuelan infrastructure.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/46ef4919-cb19-43ae-a593-774d9e0ec128?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Venezuela holds massive reserves:** Venezuela with over 303 billion barrels, has the world's largest proven crude reserves, but current production lingers at just 800,000 barrels per day after decades of decline.
* **Trump pushes U.S. investment:** President Trump has vowed major American oil firms will pour billions into fixing Venezuela's dilapidated infrastructure despite ongoing U.S. embargo on exports.
* **Analysts warn short-term risks:** Goldman Sachs highlights potential supply disruptions from instability, though sanctions relief could gradually boost output under a stable transition.
* **Long-term revival challenges:** Experts estimate $10 billion annually needed for turnaround, with orderly power shift possibly adding hundreds of thousands of barrels daily within a year.

* * *
* * *
# **Copper rockets toward all-time record high**
Copper prices **[surged as much as 3.5%](https://substack.com/redirect/d153eb1b-534d-4d52-b00a-2350c039ea6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** toward a record high near $13,000 a ton Monday, fueled by looming U.S. tariff threats under President Trump that are spurring massive imports and distorting global supplies amid robust demand.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d153eb1b-534d-4d52-b00a-2350c039ea6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tariff Threats Drive Imports** : Trump's plans to revisit primary copper tariffs in 2026 are reviving arbitrage trades, prompting traders to flood the U.S. with shipments ahead of potential duties.
* **Supply Disruptions Intensify Tightness** : A strike at Chile's Mantoverde mine underscores shipment risks, contributing to near-term market volatility on the London Metal Exchange.
* **Record Gains Mark 2025** : Copper posted a staggering 42% rise last year--its strongest performance since 2009--driven by expanding global demand tied to the energy market.
* **Shortage Forecast for 2026** : Analysts predict a global refined copper deficit exceeding 100,000 tons next year, despite a 2025 surplus distorted by U.S. inventory buildup.

* * *
* * *
# **Bitcoin surges past $92,000 to open 2026**
Bitcoin **[climbed above $92,000](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1f067c-e2b0-4b0b-be22-3fdc6550e63f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Monday, marking a strong rebound to kick off 2026 after a turbulent end to 2025 that saw the cryptocurrency drop from highs above $126,000 amid sell-offs and liquidations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1f067c-e2b0-4b0b-be22-3fdc6550e63f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Bullish trend declared:** 10X Research, citing normalized trading volumes and renewed institutional positioning sees a bullish market trend.
* **Options traders shift:** Crypto traders are buying upside calls, positioning aggressively for a potential push toward $100,000.
* **Key resistance level:** $98,197 is seen as the next "must clear" level for the next significant upward move, per analysts.
* **Historical pattern:** January's gains after a rare three-month declines is being viewed as optimistic , with portfolio rebalancing expected to provide tailwinds and further upsides.

* * *
* * *
# Starlink rushes free internet to Venezuela
SpaceX's Starlink is providing **[free satellite broadband internet across Venezuela](https://substack.com/redirect/4602044e-14ac-480c-abe6-d0450184f36e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/4602044e-14ac-480c-abe6-d0450184f36e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)through early February, a move announced by Elon Musk to support citizens amid widespread disruptions following a U.S. military operation that captured President Nicolas Maduro and his wife on narco-terrorism charges.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4602044e-14ac-480c-abe6-d0450184f36e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Musk voices direct support** Elon Musk reposted Starlink's announcement, adding "In support of the people of Venezuela" to emphasize aid for civilians during the crisis.
* **Starlink 's crisis response history** The service has previously restored connectivity in emergencies, including Ukraine's war and U.S. hurricane-affected areas like North Carolina.
* **Temporary service extension unclear** Free access runs until Feb. 3, with Starlink monitoring conditions but no confirmed plans for extension or local kit sales yet.
* **Maduro faces serious charges** U.S. authorities indicted Nicolas Maduro and Cilia Flores on narco-terrorism conspiracy, cocaine importation, and weapons offenses in New York federal court.

* * *

She vows to transition property from individual to collective ownership, predicting a significant impact on white families as the city redefines housing rights. | | ---|---|--- Controversial Video: Cea Weaver, in a video that has appeared on X vows to transition property from individual to collective ownership, specifically targetin g white families for impact as the city redefines housing rights. Weaver 's radical vision: Her aim to redefie property rights to prioritize collective good is a move critics see as a veiled assault on private ownership and traditional values. Historical Parallels Offer A Warning: Weaver's proposal mirrors failed socialist experiments from history, raising concerns about its feasibility and consequences for property rights in America's financial capital. Past Tweets Leak: In a pulled from her X account Weaver's views are inline with socialist and communist ideals. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- An excellent way to display your American Pride and stand up to the woke MOB! On your Boat, House or Truck, the message is clear! Made from 100% durable polyester, this flag is designed to withstand the elements while maintaining vibrant colors and high visibility. With its double-sided design, you can showcase it's message on both sides, ensuring that it looks great from any angle. Maduro's capture creating volatility in the oil market as untapped reserves to open Oil prices Monday after the Trump administration orchestrated the dramatic overthrow of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro, casting uncertainty over the future of the OPEC nation's vast crude reserves while Trump called for massive U.S. investments to revive crumbling Venezuelan infrastructure. | | ---|---|--- Venezuela holds massive reserves: Venezuela with over 303 billion barrels, has the world's largest proven crude reserves, but current production lingers at just 800,000 barrels per day after decades of decline. Trump pushes U.S. investment: President Trump has vowed major American oil firms will pour billions into fixing Venezuela's dilapidated infrastructure despite ongoing U.S. embargo on exports. Analysts warn short-term risks: Goldman Sachs highlights potential supply disruptions from instability, though sanctions relief could gradually boost output under a stable transition. Long-term revival challenges: Experts estimate $10 billion annually needed for turnaround, with orderly power shift possibly adding hundreds of thousands of barrels daily within a year. Copper rockets toward all-time record high Copper prices toward a record high near $13,000 a ton Monday, fueled by looming U.S. tariff threats under President Trump that are spurring massive imports and distorting global supplies amid robust demand. | | ---|---|--- Tariff Threats Drive Imports : Trump's plans to revisit primary copper tariffs in 2026 are reviving arbitrage trades, prompting traders to flood the U.S. with shipments ahead of potential duties. Supply Disruptions Intensify Tightness : A strike at Chile's Mantoverde mine underscores shipment risks, contributing to near-term market volatility on the London Metal Exchange. Record Gains Mark 2025 : Copper posted a staggering 42% rise last year--its strongest performance since 2009--driven by expanding global demand tied to the energy market. Shortage Forecast for 2026 : Analysts predict a global refined copper deficit exceeding 100,000 tons next year, despite a 2025 surplus distorted by U.S. inventory buildup. Bitcoin surges past $92,000 to open 2026 Bitcoin on Monday, marking a strong rebound to kick off 2026 after a turbulent end to 2025 that saw the cryptocurrency drop from highs above $126,000 amid sell-offs and liquidations. | | ---|---|--- Bullish trend declared: 10X Research, citing normalized trading volumes and renewed institutional positioning sees a bullish market trend. Options traders shift: Crypto traders are buying upside calls, positioning aggressively for a potential push toward $100,000. Key resistance level: $98,197 is seen as the next "must clear" level for the next significant upward move, per analysts. Historical pattern: January's gains after a rare three-month declines is being viewed as optimistic , with portfolio rebalancing expected to provide tailwinds and further upsides. Starlink rushes free internet to Venezuela SpaceX's Starlink is providing early February, a move announced by Elon Musk to support citizens amid widespread disruptions following a U.S. military operation that captured President Nicolas Maduro and his wife on narco-terrorism charges. | | ---|---|--- Musk voices direct support Elon Musk reposted Starlink's announcement, adding "In support of the people of Venezuela" to emphasize aid for civilians during the crisis. Starlink 's crisis response history The service has previously restored connectivity in emergencies, including Ukraine's war and U.S. hurricane-affected areas like North Carolina. Temporary service extension unclear Free access runs until Feb. 3, with Starlink monitoring conditions but no confirmed plans for extension or local kit sales yet. Maduro faces serious charges U.S. authorities indicted Nicolas Maduro and Cilia Flores on narco-terrorism conspiracy, cocaine importation, and weapons offenses in New York federal court. name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
#

Team —
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
[**I know I’ve asked a lot, but I need your help. If you’re still with me, please: Add your name alongside the thousands of others who have my back.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-jan26-stand-with-mark/?source=em260105-1-90&akid=6322%2E6688874%2ELhkmKt)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-jan26-stand-with-mark/?source=em260105-1-90&akid=6322%2E6688874%2ELhkmKt)**
Don’t give up the ship.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6322%2E6688874%2ELhkmKt).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. Don’t give up the ship. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

subject: CA Open Carry Ban Overturned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Nathan Magsig for State Senate 2026

|

| |
# Magsig Commends 9th Circuit Court Ruling - Overturning CA Open Carry Ban
---
|
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** January 5th, 2026Contact: nathan@nathanmagsig.com
---
| | | | | | **9th Circuit Court of Appeals Overturns CA Ban on Open Carry**
**(Clovis, CA)** \- Today, Supervisor Nathan Magsig issued the following statement in response to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals’ January 3, 2026 ruling in _Baird v. Bonta_ , which struck down California’s ban on open carry in counties with more than 200,000 residents:
“This ruling is a clear reminder that constitutional rights do not end at county lines or depend on population size. The Ninth Circuit correctly recognized that open carry has deep roots in our nation’s history and must be evaluated consistent with the Supreme Court’s _Bruen_ precedent,” said Magsig. “For too long, California has relied on legally questionable restrictions that punish law-abiding citizens while doing little to address violent crime.”
Magsig will be answering questions with a _special guest_ regarding the ruling on Facebook Live today at 2pm.
Join the Facebook Live on Nathan Magsig’s account at 2pm for any questions, and to get more clarification on the ruling:[https://www.facebook.com/NathanMagsigCA](https://nathanmagsig.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566959e132b9980afc6311201&id=a3241798ff&e=6cdbd718cb)
---
| [Watch at 2PM](https://nathanmagsig.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566959e132b9980afc6311201&id=38a4bc5167&e=6cdbd718cb)
---
| | ###
Nathan Magsig is a current Fresno County Supervisor, former Mayor of Clovis, and is running for the 12th Senate District. His family, wife Julie and their three children, reside in Clovis, CA.

In the final hours of 2025, grassroots supporters like you showed up for this campaign, and showed up strong. I’m proud to say we ended the year on a high note, and sent a clear, powerful message: CA-45 is not going to be an easy pickup for Republicans, no matter who they send (even as they stack the field with well-funded challengers). That momentum couldn’t come at a more important time: Congress is back in session, and already the stakes are high. We’ve got less than a month to prevent another government shutdown. And with GOP leadership letting critical ACA subsidies expire, families across the country are now facing sharp increases in their health care premiums. Democrats are demanding a vote to extend enhanced subsidies. We’ll keep pushing, but we already know Republicans are eyeing a watered-down alternative that doesn’t meet the moment. This is the kind of fight I came to Congress for. And it's the kind of fight I can't win without you in my corner. Let’s get to work in 2026! clean_body: | = = Happy New Year, friend. I hope you closed out 2025 with some rest and recharge with your loved ones because in all honesty, we’ve got a lot of work ahead. Before we dive in, I want to say thank you. In the final hours of 2025, grassroots supporters like you showed up for this campaign, and showed up strong. I’m proud to say we ended the year on a high note, and sent a clear, powerful message: CA-45 is not going to be an easy pickup for Republicans, no matter who they send (even as they stack the field with well-funded challengers). That momentum couldn’t come at a more important time: Congress is back in session, and already the stakes are high. We’ve got less than a month to prevent another government shutdown. And with GOP leadership letting critical ACA subsidies expire, families across the country are now facing sharp increases in their health care premiums. Democrats are demanding a vote to extend enhanced subsidies. We’ll keep pushing, but we already know Republicans are eyeing a watered-down alternative that doesn’t meet the moment. This is the kind of fight I came to Congress for. And it's the kind of fight I can't win without you in my corner. Let’s get to work in 2026! Thank you, Derek | = | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. To support Derek's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please click . Derek Tran for Congress 10441 Stanford Avenue #395 Garden Grove, CA 92842 United States

body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
On January 3rd, Donald Trump ordered a military strike in Venezuela and captured their president.
Let’s be clear about what that means : Instead of fixing what is broken at home, he is putting American lives at risk overseas and handing a blank check to oil companies and defense contractors.
We’ve seen this movie before. It never ends well.
We don’t want American boots on the ground in Venezuela. We don’t want to police another country. And we definitely don’t want our sons and daughters put in harm’s way so Trump can look tough or distract from his own scandals.
At a moment when working people need lower costs, affordable health care, and an economy that works for everyone, Trump is choosing military escalation over real leadership. Instead of fixing what is broken at home, he is exporting chaos abroad.
This is how would-be authoritarians warp our democracy. War becomes a distraction. Corporate interests win. Regular people pay the price.
Congress must step in and stop this unconstitutional act. No president gets to drag the country into another foreign conflict on his own, especially when the American people are saying loud and clear that they want investment at home, not invasion abroad.
Donating right now helps us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_venezuela_act] It gives us the resources to show our strength and send a message, hold Trump accountable, and block a slide into another endless war that puts American lives and our global credibility at risk.
This moment is urgent. Trump is acting fast, betting no one will stop him. We cannot wait six months while he drags us deeper into authoritarianism. If we are going to draw a line, it has to be today. Please chip in now and help us stop this before it goes any further. # [This Isn't Just About Venezuela. It's About What Comes Next.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=183572652&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTcyNjUyLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc2NDAzNDQsImV4cCI6MTc3MDIzMjM0NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hhKYUqfFFguDlTnraaTteLjVnYQHCG4nR00S3cIaXb0)
### Unchecked power, fake pretexts, and the terrifying precedent being set in real time.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Jan 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
