**[Endless Urgency is free to read--thanks to our paid subscribers. If you've been enjoying the work, please help keep it available to everyone by becoming a paid subscriber. Just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/a098b63b-95b3-4ff6-90ef-57b4dfc7c55b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/a098b63b-95b3-4ff6-90ef-57b4dfc7c55b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I spent a considerable amount of time in high school and college protesting a Republican president who tanked the economy and launched dumb wars so Big Oil could line its pockets. And here we are again: stuck in the same loop, only now with an even dumber, more corrupt Republican president doing it all over again.
Say what you will about George W. Bush--at least he bothered to lie to us. They invented a story. Weapons of mass destruction. A whole fictional pretext to justify invading Iraq. They put American lives at risk for a reason that, to this day, still doesn't make a shred of fucking sense--but at least on some level they understood the rules they were breaking. What's changed isn't just the president. It's how little effort they now put into hiding it.
Trump doesn't even pretend. He's openly bragging that it's about oil. They briefed oil executives before they told Congress what was happening. And let's be clear: Bush, for all his failures, went to Congress and got authorization to invade Iraq. It was a disaster, but he followed the process. Trump fabricated a pretext and launched an illegal war--on the dime of the American taxpayer, in the middle of the night--without even the courtesy of pretending otherwise.
**Risking the lives of American soldiers to make oil companies more profitable is wrong.** It was wrong then, and it's still wrong now. And the fact that they've stopped even pretending otherwise should scare the hell out of us.
* * *
**[Endless Urgency is free to read--thanks to our paid subscribers. If you've been enjoying the work, please help keep it available to everyone by becoming a paid subscriber. Just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/a098b63b-95b3-4ff6-90ef-57b4dfc7c55b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/a098b63b-95b3-4ff6-90ef-57b4dfc7c55b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I have two big thoughts as I try to process what our government just did in Venezuela.
First: Nicolas Maduro is a piece of shit. Let's not dance around that. He's a brutal dictator who has robbed and killed his own people. No one should feel sympathy for him. But condemning Maduro doesn't magically make this strike legal--or smart. And it doesn't erase the much bigger, much older problem underneath all of this.
After 9/11, we handed the executive branch insane powers in the name of "keeping us safe." That was a mistake then, and it's even more dangerous now. What started as wars in the Middle East quietly expanded into drone strikes in countries like Yemen under Obama. And yeah--most Americans were mostly okay with it, because we trusted Obama.
That trust is gone and we shouldn't ever give any president that kind of blind faith again, even if it's someone you like and support (as I proudly did with Obama).
And now we've got Trump inventing fake terms like "narco-terrorist" to justify blowing up boats in the Caribbean--and overthrowing a government in South America. That destabilizes an entire region.
The truth is, this doesn't make us safer. It trades long-term stability for short-term, reckless bravado, creating more instability, more resentment, and more reasons for retaliation down the line. And when leaders get used to acting without limits in the name of "security," that danger doesn't stay overseas.
That's where this leads. If we don't draw a line here, this kind of unchecked executive power will keep escalating. First it's Venezuela. Next it's Colombia, or Mexico, or Cuba. And eventually, this precedent will be used to justify violence against people inside our own borders.
Don't kid yourself--they're already laying the groundwork. Trump, J.D. Vance, Stephen Miller, the entire MAGA machine--they don't just call terrorists "terrorists." They call people like me terrorists. They call people like you terrorists. Why? Because we stand up to them.
They're building the pretext now. Maybe it's not Trump or Vance who pulls the trigger. But the machinery is being assembled in plain sight. The powers already exist. And Congress? Nowhere to be found. Or worse yet, GOP reps like Lindsey Graham openly justifying it--and threatening Cuba that they're next.
Second: What pisses me off most about Trump's D.C. is who wins--and who always loses.
We have unlimited resources when oil companies want military protection. But when you're going bankrupt because you got sick? When a generation of Americans are drowning in student loan debt? Suddenly we're broke. Suddenly, that's fiscally irresponsible.
Trump was elected on a promise to lower grocery prices. To address housing. To make life more affordable. He hasn't done shit on that. He can't even acknowledge it's a real issue for people, like he did in the campaign. His tariffs and energy policies have made it worse. So again: who's actually winning here?
Same answer as always: Trump finds new ways to enrich and protect himself (Epstein), his donors (tax cuts for billionaires... and Epstein), and his cronies (pardons... and Epstein)--and he does it by bleeding regular people dry.
This operation they're calling a "victory"? We won't know the real cost for years--how badly it destabilized the region, who died, who actually benefited (although we're pretty clear Big Oil execs will be the first to benefit). What we do know is that it won't be quick, clean, or easy. It never is.
They're pretending they'll be welcomed as liberators--just like Bush, Cheney, and Rumsfeld did in Iraq. Same arrogance. Same bullshit. Same recklessness. Very likely the same results.
And while they're off chasing oil profits and photo ops overseas, back home? People are still waiting for relief. So why can't--or why won't--this administration do anything to make your life better?
Eighty percent of Americans are barely holding it together. The American Dream is fading fast. Young people are more educated than ever--and still locked out of opportunity. Homeownership feels out of reach. Starting a family feels impossible. Retiring with dignity feels like a joke. Even taking a real vacation feels like a luxury.
And in that despair, people drift toward isolation--and toward more extreme answers. And abandon the belief that government can still do what it's meant to do: improve the lives of everyday people and keep us safe. Meanwhile, Trump abandoned the core promises he ran on. The promises to help regular people, make life easier, and put money back in your pocket.
But Big Oil got exactly what it paid for.
And once again, the rest of us are left holding the bag.

clean_body: Unchecked power, fake pretexts, and the terrifying precedent being set in real time. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Unchecked power, fake pretexts, and the terrifying precedent being set in real time. | | | Jan 5 | | | | | | | | | | | | I spent a considerable amount of time in high school and college protesting a Republican president who tanked the economy and launched dumb wars so Big Oil could line its pockets. And here we are again: stuck in the same loop, only now with an even dumber, more corrupt Republican president doing it all over again. Say what you will about George W. Bush--at least he bothered to lie to us. They invented a story. Weapons of mass destruction. A whole fictional pretext to justify invading Iraq. They put American lives at risk for a reason that, to this day, still doesn't make a shred of fucking sense--but at least on some level they understood the rules they were breaking. What's changed isn't just the president. It's how little effort they now put into hiding it. Trump doesn't even pretend. He's openly bragging that it's about oil. They briefed oil executives before they told Congress what was happening. And let's be clear: Bush, for all his failures, went to Congress and got authorization to invade Iraq. It was a disaster, but he followed the process. Trump fabricated a pretext and launched an illegal war--on the dime of the American taxpayer, in the middle of the night--without even the courtesy of pretending otherwise. Risking the lives of American soldiers to make oil companies more profitable is wrong. It was wrong then, and it's still wrong now. And the fact that they've stopped even pretending otherwise should scare the hell out of us. * I have two big thoughts as I try to process what our government just did in Venezuela. First: Nicolas Maduro is a piece of shit. Let's not dance around that. He's a brutal dictator who has robbed and killed his own people. No one should feel sympathy for him. But condemning Maduro doesn't magically make this strike legal--or smart. And it doesn't erase the much bigger, much older problem underneath all of this. After 9/11, we handed the executive branch insane powers in the name of "keeping us safe." That was a mistake then, and it's even more dangerous now. What started as wars in the Middle East quietly expanded into drone strikes in countries like Yemen under Obama. And yeah--most Americans were mostly okay with it, because we trusted Obama. That trust is gone and we shouldn't ever give any president that kind of blind faith again, even if it's someone you like and support (as I proudly did with Obama). And now we've got Trump inventing fake terms like "narco-terrorist" to justify blowing up boats in the Caribbean--and overthrowing a government in South America. That destabilizes an entire region. The truth is, this doesn't make us safer. It trades long-term stability for short-term, reckless bravado, creating more instability, more resentment, and more reasons for retaliation down the line. And when leaders get used to acting without limits in the name of "security," that danger doesn't stay overseas. That's where this leads. If we don't draw a line here, this kind of unchecked executive power will keep escalating. First it's Venezuela. Next it's Colombia, or Mexico, or Cuba. And eventually, this precedent will be used to justify violence against people inside our own borders. Don't kid yourself--they're already laying the groundwork. Trump, J.D. Vance, Stephen Miller, the entire MAGA machine--they don't just call terrorists "terrorists." They call people like me terrorists. They call people like you terrorists. Why? Because we stand up to them. They're building the pretext now. Maybe it's not Trump or Vance who pulls the trigger. But the machinery is being assembled in plain sight. The powers already exist. And Congress? Nowhere to be found. Or worse yet, GOP reps like Lindsey Graham openly justifying it--and threatening Cuba that they're next. Second: What pisses me off most about Trump's D.C. is who wins--and who always loses. We have unlimited resources when oil companies want military protection. But when you're going bankrupt because you got sick? When a generation of Americans are drowning in student loan debt? Suddenly we're broke. Suddenly, that's fiscally irresponsible. Trump was elected on a promise to lower grocery prices. To address housing. To make life more affordable. He hasn't done shit on that. He can't even acknowledge it's a real issue for people, like he did in the campaign. His tariffs and energy policies have made it worse. So again: who's actually winning here? Same answer as always: Trump finds new ways to enrich and protect himself (Epstein), his donors (tax cuts for billionaires... and Epstein), and his cronies (pardons... and Epstein)--and he does it by bleeding regular people dry. This operation they're calling a "victory"? We won't know the real cost for years--how badly it destabilized the region, who died, who actually benefited (although we're pretty clear Big Oil execs will be the first to benefit). What we do know is that it won't be quick, clean, or easy. It never is. They're pretending they'll be welcomed as liberators--just like Bush, Cheney, and Rumsfeld did in Iraq. Same arrogance. Same bullshit. Same recklessness. Very likely the same results. And while they're off chasing oil profits and photo ops overseas, back home? People are still waiting for relief. So why can't--or why won't--this administration do anything to make your life better? Eighty percent of Americans are barely holding it together. The American Dream is fading fast. Young people are more educated than ever--and still locked out of opportunity. Homeownership feels out of reach. Starting a family feels impossible. Retiring with dignity feels like a joke. Even taking a real vacation feels like a luxury. And in that despair, people drift toward isolation--and toward more extreme answers. And abandon the belief that government can still do what it's meant to do: improve the lives of everyday people and keep us safe. Meanwhile, Trump abandoned the core promises he ran on. The promises to help regular people, make life easier, and put money back in your pocket. But Big Oil got exactly what it paid for. And once again, the rest of us are left holding the bag. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. name: Voter Action Project
subject: The attacks on mail-in voting will only increase this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010526_2&amount=25]
Be prepared to hear about this all the way through the midterms, Team .
President Donald Trump has said that he is leading a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud.
Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. "
How is Trump going to do this? He's signed an executive order targeting November's critical midterms. Has this been just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we still fighting him tooth and nail? Definitely, yes.
We're working in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as states run our elections. We're petitioning members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court.
We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010526_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_2&amount=35]
Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump .
We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing.
Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy.
Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010526_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010526_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010526_2&amount=20]

body:
Happy New Year! 🎉

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/robforpa/robs-nepa-rundown-jdhivhzze6?e=131e83a3c2)

| | Happy New Year,
As we turn the page on another year, we want to reflect on everything you did to help us achieve victory in the last election. That win didn’t happen by chance; it was the result of countless hours of organizing, outreach, and teamwork from supporters like you who were willing to show up and do the work.
Now, the 2026 midterm elections are officially underway. The stakes are high, and the road ahead will demand the same energy, discipline, and commitment that carried us through the last cycle. If we’re going to protect our progress and keep delivering results for the people we serve, we’ll need to dig in and work just as hard, starting now. If you would like to join Team Rob, [**please sign up here.**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=3951f5f4de&e=131e83a3c2)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | It’s officially election year, and we have many opportunities for you to help Rob and our country right here in NEPA! If you’d like to join the team that takes down another Pelosi-backed, radical-left candidate, you can:
* Obtain petition signatures (Starts Feb. 17)
* Knock on doors
* Make phone calls
* Write letters to the editor
* Make signs
* Write personal postcards

[**Please click this link to fight for our home.**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=554875dbb5&e=131e83a3c2)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Our Volunteer of the Week is Rob, from Lackawanna County. He’s been a rockstar getting young people involved and door-knocking to grow the Republican Party across our district. Thanks for all your hard work, Rob!
---
|
---
| | Portland Paige is trying to spread the big-city crime that has overtaken Scranton to all of NEPA. Her soft-on-crime policies would eviscerate our way of life. We must stop Portland Paige and her radical agenda. **Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

body:
---

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

clean_body: Friends, We’re in court beginning today fighting the Democrats’ attempt to redraw the map of our congressional district and steal our seat. Lawyers, experts and massive legal bills. To save our congressional district it’s going to cost a fortune. | Friends, We’re in court beginning today fighting the Democrats’ attempt to redraw the map of our congressional district and steal our seat. Lawyers, experts and massive legal bills. To save our congressional district it’s going to cost a fortune. | | We’ve already had to beat back their attempt to gerrymander New York’s 11th Congressional District two times. I am fighting to defend our district, but it’s expensive. The Democrats are counting on overwhelming us with money and manpower. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Help us fight this unfair process from day one. Thank you, Nicole | Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: Starting the Year with Momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
A new year, fresh momentum, and a fight for Nebraska
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
| | Peter,
We’re starting the new year with a lot of optimism and momentum. A new year brings a fresh opportunity to listen, to lead, and to keep building toward a stronger future for our communities.
As we head into 2026, our campaign is continuing to grow because of the conversations we’re having across the district and the support of people who care deeply about where our country is headed. Every week, we’re meeting families, small business owners, and community leaders who want lower costs, safer neighborhoods, and more opportunity for the next generation.
That forward momentum carries into everything we’re doing this year, including the work we’re putting in day by day as we continue the Ride to Washington.

---
|
---
**Ride to Washington** We wrapped up the year 619 miles into our 1,155-mile Ride to Washington. This challenge is about more than distance. It’s about discipline, commitment, and showing up every day for the people we serve.
Thank you to everyone who has ridden along, shared an update, or encouraged us along the way. Your support has helped turn this into a true community effort, and we’re excited to keep building on that momentum as we head into the new year. The road ahead is still long, but we’re off to a strong start and ready to keep pushing forward together.
|
---
### **Looking Back on the Year**
This past year was also about slowing down at times and focusing on what matters most. Spending time with family, making memories, and staying grounded provided perspective and energy for everything else that came with a busy year.

[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
It was also a year spent out and about in the community. From local events and small gatherings to everyday stops around town, being present and engaged remains an important part of staying connected to the people and places that make this area special.

[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Most importantly, the year brought countless opportunities to meet and talk with people across the district. Listening to different experiences, stories, and ideas reinforced how much we all share in common and how valuable face-to-face conversations continue to be.

[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
|
---
| |
### **Looking Ahead**
As we move further into the new year, the focus remains on staying active, staying connected, and continuing to show up across the community. The months ahead will bring more opportunities to be out in the district, hear new perspectives, and strengthen the relationships that make this work meaningful.
There’s a lot of excitement about what’s next. From time spent with family, to community events, to ongoing conversations with neighbors, the goal is to keep building momentum and approach each week with energy and purpose.
If you see us out in the community, please say hello, share what’s on your mind, and stay engaged as we head into the year ahead. Your support and involvement make all the difference.

---
|
---
Thank you for taking the time to stay connected and for being part of this journey. Your encouragement, support, and willingness to stay engaged mean more than you know.
As we move into the new year, I’m grateful for the relationships built, the conversations shared, and the opportunity to keep showing up for the community. I’m excited about what lies ahead and appreciative of everyone who continues to walk alongside us.
Wishing you and your family a happy, healthy, and successful year ahead.

|
---
We'd love to have you on Team Lindstrom in our fight this year. If you can, please consider joining our team as a volunteer.
[VOLUNTEER](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
And if you’re able, please consider making a contribution to our campaign. Every dollar goes directly toward reaching voters and ensuring our message is heard loud and clear.
[DONATE TODAY](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Thank you for continued support,
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Brett Lindstrom Republican Candidate for NE-02
|
---
**Stay Connected with Team Lindstrom**
| | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---|---|---
|
---
Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress.
You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com To unsubscribe from Brett Lindstrom for Congress please click [here](https://link.win.lindstromforne.com/click/e82136/VaHR0cHM6Ly9sZmMubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/Sd2luX2xpbmRzdHJvbWZvcm5lX2NvbTI2MDEwNQ/LbmNsbm9haEtE/qP2hpZHM9bmM2V25TWXBzeDVRbHM/gaVwRnA/s5p950eb84d).

name: EMILYs List

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
Hey Peter, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
**[I’m asking you to split a donation between Heartland Patriots and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99059?refcode=em20260105-9901&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9901%2E614464%2EL2pFK-)**

body:

Another Republican right-wing super PAC, AFP Action, has endorsed my opponent, John Sununu, and is preparing to spend a ton of money in this race.

name: Kris Mayes
subject: Trump is abandoning Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
I talked with MS NOW about how the Trump administration is abandoning Arizona's fight against drug cartels. |
---
Peter, It's Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. As you may have heard me say before, Arizona is the fentanyl funnel for America. _More than half of all fentanyl seized in this country comes through my state._ And we've seized more than 27 million pills since I became Attorney General. **But here’s the thing: Attorney General Pam Bondi and Trump are abandoning Arizona's fight against drug cartels.** After I sent a letter to Bondi requesting an additional 50 DEA agents for Arizona**,** she actually took 60 DEA agents OUT of Arizona. I wrote an op-ed and went on MS NOW to tell this story: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122735771/593289437/1085921388?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2IyYmE3Ny02ZmVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvI6mTSJ-ZzPHg0EBnvkICGPwqFgNQGwOF4r6mmKPRM=) Bondi moved these agents to places like Washington, D.C., so they could patrol Foggy Bottom, pick up trash, and run around after immigrants. That is not what we need. We have one out of every 10 prosecutors now doing immigration enforcement when they should be going after drug cartels. Federal drug prosecutions are down 10%. CBP checkpoints along major trafficking routes are going unattended. **And meanwhile, Trump pardoned the former President of Honduras, who bragged about stuffing "drugs up the gringos' noses" after flooding 500 tons of cocaine into the U.S.** This is no laughing matter. More than 40% of Americans know someone who died from a drug overdose. Arizona is doing our part every day to fight the cartels and stop the flow of fentanyl. But we can't do this alone. Now, I'm asking Trump and Bondi to return those agents to Arizona and do their actual jobs. **We need federal law enforcement focused on actual criminals — cartel members and drug dealers — not maids and landscapers.** [**If you agree, please consider splitting a contribution between****Yassamin Ansari**** and my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122735772/593289438/1085921388?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2IyYmE3Ny02ZmVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvI6mTSJ-ZzPHg0EBnvkICGPwqFgNQGwOF4r6mmKPRM=) I'll keep calling out the Trump administration when they abandon Arizona's fight against deadly drugs. Thanks for having my back, \- Kris | [SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122735773/593289439/1085921388?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2IyYmE3Ny02ZmVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvI6mTSJ-ZzPHg0EBnvkICGPwqFgNQGwOF4r6mmKPRM=)

clean_body: I talked with MS NOW about how the Trump administration is abandoning Arizona's fight against drug cartels. | Peter, It's Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. As you may have heard me say before, Arizona is the fentanyl funnel for America. More than half of all fentanyl seized in this country comes through my state. And we've seized more than 27 million pills since I became Attorney General. But here’s the thing: Attorney General Pam Bondi and Trump are abandoning Arizona's fight against drug cartels. After I sent a letter to Bondi requesting an additional 50 DEA agents for Arizona, she actually took 60 DEA agents OUT of Arizona. I wrote an op-ed and went on MS NOW to tell this story: = Bondi moved these agents to places like Washington, D.C., so they could patrol Foggy Bottom, pick up trash, and run around after immigrants. That is not what we need. We have one out of every 10 prosecutors now doing immigration enforcement when they should be going after drug cartels. Federal drug prosecutions are down 10%. CBP checkpoints along major trafficking routes are going unattended. And meanwhile, Trump pardoned the former President of Honduras, who bragged about stuffing "drugs up the gringos' noses" after flooding 500 tons of cocaine into the U.S. This is no laughing matter. More than 40% of Americans know someone who died from a drug overdose. Arizona is doing our part every day to fight the cartels and stop the flow of fentanyl. But we can't do this alone. Now, I'm asking Trump and Bondi to return those agents to Arizona and do their actual jobs. We need federal law enforcement focused on actual criminals — cartel members and drug dealers — not maids and landscapers. = I'll keep calling out the Trump administration when they abandon Arizona's fight against deadly drugs. Thanks for having my back, \- Kris | = Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Mark Lamb
subject: Something bigger is broken.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS
body:
When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. |
---

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=891abb3212e24aa59d674d638c030ed5&_e=csbThQ4j4MOG50fwEj-IasnBAjQWoPv0A-wu7EitCThQIP7C5fVSQ65ruqVh9oKbvfezFGnKQGF-0wV6-1iPlu2o8uq6LVqU-OfRiyCJPS_TyhcdRd09HpatlzmS_pXrQQmKklpmmImrYIXn0Jdb03ZNP994SLH3L2OxP-R0H6atEsE1fS2t44D0eX6ApGW4duZ4JHhFd6E1VS9kAgmp2FnxwnUKjWzpg9isUMPmwHUBJP4cQvEBFpq-qVWSRzhQTDpzD2xQYRU1ZWVA-uawubEqFQMmWDGC5EBegjOM4scSQjcT2Pp0_PagtHPzaI744xIAHKPy4N3TNXC67pcYFihf2a6w6rXd4K7oEqzP3kdUlbRQaTsy-eIkTveTn69tYcUtBPT7aSKppM-MLTWW0PCJLTRVINM4ihontVSqMVGHguYmbo-TD0hvnmfmiG23axW96UqPNZ3N__48TRVmeiblBC1mRNLNrMZEMXRdPSK_WkeOwMxfyrbMhNis7-GV1P_aOexHn5-Zav3h4xScDGJp3CXWuAneb4Rc3BxSCBArjZw8jok17gzJmllnb9WzJCdPGbGQWOgNg-HyzMZ837n8tZNx9w-3jkHwXab3skTEsAX5uW2PIU4ew4mjciANkurL5VlUUF69CsBSebUMw7Zkve5YwDQf_z0YvoIDUTQ%3D)

Fellow Patriot,

Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself:

When something is broken, you don't complain - _you fix it._

That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient.

But today, something bigger is broken.

Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. _The people_.

The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom.

They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough.

**That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it.** To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone.

If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - **[I'm asking you to join this mission.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=891abb3212e24aa59d674d638c030ed5&_e=csbThQ4j4MOG50fwEj-IasnBAjQWoPv0A-wu7EitCThQIP7C5fVSQ65ruqVh9oKbvfezFGnKQGF-0wV6-1iPlu2o8uq6LVqU-OfRiyCJPS_TyhcdRd09HpatlzmS_pXrQQmKklpmmImrYIXn0Jdb03ZNP994SLH3L2OxP-R0H6atEsE1fS2t44D0eX6ApGW4duZ4JHhFd6E1VS9kAgmp2FnxwnUKjWzpg9isUMPmwHUS_c9dZUIxcqSP24IWSrYv1PqvtvsQQATrZy6h1DT-pbn7PleThu3W_k370dkCbhbOHwe2AyZ_e7IW5c2ydxor0Ju-55rOvB52Jm5XGNWtK2dLfcdE9uurjvVx-YxApogV5gokZN9aAcnR0zHc7z3dZyswLCXw2TadoaGYQnYbxYQDmiKHqwH-VvgtDpvGIPh4eO7Dwcf0BljxduRT9Ka2eAPzKgGU4ztL9uTabYZitBFrWUSLwUSPih9UGQYCnrTccf7uBfoj6TlnHUCqjwXIxOp9y92NaftYlX0TkaTGraWdw0G_IMLuMWJ9ayF-Zl5-pHviyQqQshESAde5ox5NWDaDWp8t4mfd_1dOXFfBGrQ3BWIwneeUimwFP0_ZbAc27nBiiSt1MrdJyg6XNs_LyNt1E4m_C5salmnwaM-73ZHJhL03txo4v7Yykf61_HU%3D)**

clean_body: When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. | Fellow Patriot, Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself: When something is broken, you don't complain - you fix it. That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient. But today, something bigger is broken. Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. The people. The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom. They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough. That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it. To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone. If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - Thank you for being in this fight, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Amanda for Colorado
subject: You have more power than you think
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Amanda for Colorado
body:
Get info on caucus and assembly | | | Hi friend, Thank you for staying connected with my campaign for Colorado Secretary of State. I appreciate that you value electing someone who has experience running elections and the expertise to defend your rights against the attacks we know are coming. (That’s me!) The next step in the process is to get my name on the ballot. You might be thinking–**wait, isn’t your name already on the ballot?** That’s a great question, and one I hear a lot. There are actually many steps candidates have to take before voters can officially vote for them. This big, important step of getting my name on the ballot is called “caucus and assembly,” and it takes place in March. It’s a series of three events that determine which candidates the Democratic Party will place on the primary ballot. And you get to participate! **Caucusing is one of the most impactful things you can do to get me elected.** This is where regular people have _a lot_ of power. You don’t need to be an expert to caucus. All you’ll need to do is be willing to show up. We’ll support and guide you through the rest! If you’re in, or if you’re thinking about it and want to learn more, [just sign up here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-F3lsakb6Eg0mcs3EBRPq2vMiEywq0I4DVaTF-EcyyM6U8GwpBXsqgQOHhvCQ0a1ergZ1MulPU_LosxFQeNU13uvqV2AkHywhqzMEHU0_gkb2CqpuqQoCLjB0jb-9y-3L6J0gimP3nJqDEN2XrrGK31bK2Po-nXSvhAWVdyvMGs16bxOmBNHCnmx-r1Vpu2wJ9gU674WOnCnzyL0eXZVGmedpGs9EM_AxJX_wEYxGBs8i-HB8i0nHNxyuL_h7B2Tn5na1BOR3_MVWc16VwLyB5rI6eN2uhmtckFeXScMfMqQ/4n1/ycVEqDhDSrKlf8FDNzpstA/h0/h001.s3QIB1iMTRto3TsrAzJwd77rqd3HNfmldQrIcrqjeBI) and we’ll send you everything you need. clean_body: Get info on caucus and assembly | | | Hi friend, Thank you for staying connected with my campaign for Colorado Secretary of State. I appreciate that you value electing someone who has experience running elections and the expertise to defend your rights against the attacks we know are coming. (That’s me!) The next step in the process is to get my name on the ballot. You might be thinking–wait, isn’t your name already on the ballot? That’s a great question, and one I hear a lot. There are actually many steps candidates have to take before voters can officially vote for them. This big, important step of getting my name on the ballot is called “caucus and assembly,” and it takes place in March. It’s a series of three events that determine which candidates the Democratic Party will place on the primary ballot. And you get to participate! Caucusing is one of the most impactful things you can do to get me elected. This is where regular people have a lot of power. You don’t need to be an expert to caucus. All you’ll need to do is be willing to show up. We’ll support and guide you through the rest! If you’re in, or if you’re thinking about it and want to learn more, and we’ll send you everything you need. | | ---|--- Paid for By Amanda for Colorado. Registered Agent Ashton Narzisi. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Amanda for Colorado, please .

body:
|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122737475/593294018/-1720966344?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_ChallengingTimes_260105_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzg4ZjVhMS03MmVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HcBbmYxTaFLD6CijU61a1y8S7WB6Df8B3M59dQ6Ikiw=) I'll be honest with you, Derek.

**This is one of the most challenging moments I’ve seen in my time in public service:**
* A Republican party that cruelly cut health care from millions of Americans to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest few.
* Our secretary of defense made us all less safe by playing fast and loose with classified information.
* And now, the president launched a war in Venezuela without any congressional authorization whatsoever. That’s reckless, dangerous, and unacceptable.

In 2025, we had to play a lot of defense. I voted against every Trump-Republican budget while fighting to extend the Obamacare tax credits. I also worked to hold this administration accountable for serious national security failures – from SignalGate to the influence of political extremists like Laura Loomer over foreign policy decisions. **Now that we’re in 2026 and the midterm elections are here, we have a chance to go on offense.**

We’ve got to win big and elect leaders who prioritize accountability and transparency over blind loyalty to a political party or president.

And we don’t have a minute to waste. That’s why I’m asking people like you – who care deeply about our democracy and the future of our country – to join me in this fight today.

[_**Will you make your first donation to my campaign right now to help Democrats win the midterms and bring accountability and transparency to name: Deb Haaland
subject: What can I say, friend?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
National Republicans are eyeing this race.

| | |
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3634?t=1&akid=6605%2E400544%2ExnKcqQ)
**Friend, is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to[donate ANY amount to my campaign before midnight?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3634?t=2&akid=6605%2E400544%2ExnKcqQ)**
| | [Donate now >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3634?t=3&akid=6605%2E400544%2ExnKcqQ)
---
What if I told you we’re entering a critical phase of this race, and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country?
What if you knew that MAGA forces with deep pockets will spend whatever it takes to flip control of our state government?
And what if you knew that ANOTHER self-funded multimillionaire candidate just entered the race this week — making it clear that we'll need a surge of grassroots support to stay ahead?
**And what if I told you that National Republicans are eyeing this race as a top pick-up opportunity and are ready to spend whatever it takes to win.**
**We can’t let that happen — and I’m counting on support from folks like you to make sure it doesn’t. That’s why, with time running out, I have to ask:**
**[Will you step up with a donation of $5 or anything at all to help us hit our fundraising goal this month so we have the resources it takes to win?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3634?t=4&akid=6605%2E400544%2ExnKcqQ)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3635?t=5&akid=6605%2E400544%2ExnKcqQ)
---
| | [Donate $35 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3636?t=6&akid=6605%2E400544%2ExnKcqQ)
---
| | [Donate $50 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3637?t=7&akid=6605%2E400544%2ExnKcqQ)
---
| | [Other Amount >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3634?t=8&akid=6605%2E400544%2ExnKcqQ)
---
Thank you,

Deb
|

We can’t let that happen — and I’m counting on support from folks like you to make sure it doesn’t. That’s why, with time running out, I have to ask: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Deb | | | | |

| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=407ac93a332f46e4a65c3fef2851be56&_e=QVvVou0S4mV2bsnDb5hlYlEWQJg3UJSkU_tPUqpQuw2z3IHgy3BBkYlw4vAbPVvfvNMdU71vYoRFSBXc-ry3x3Fc0jb1vG4mivGJDmCypir2bJVJhTl7Y4P7-04zFWRoAuzX0TUY8E7lqGVG9k_VoDIr2Ja667LnBouVtNlsM9X4pAOaB1jlV2lV3PufDASDQvkOmFlyT7KGVZ9N2g-qFKyf9t1diChdklQeJw68eM9SNktBEKoLDVWpOj9biLPr_ooXd3QgIx8AN3E1kt79gHTbz4BByspbPKAIMBsvNI7p8gZyM1IzpcsC9xOdn3I_MCCBcVIlU441DXBy6zEMzYDB3VL3imD4pT9QGrPi64OTJSlHbO3bSQwW4KdaX7u-BfoWwVvYdZS3z2rM1Xs02reqo_yq0eDMqK0Q42QPAj5pApO57zpsddUuBAE6Cj2RNmzEP6r-mEIFB2Sz1BBvRJkI7VGo6nV8EyjVqzVbxztqZnv7Clgym2-8DrvhIkj57QgjkTkVfGFHVnvnsE6fYPpmKu-MQQU0Y_rnn86n322KqyxIb5iVDd6Z2B9HIlVWdnZEO_fJ-XlcXT3nuXB193W52JmqfSUAedKW3WFptUALZgzLOkzhmJAJ7tToeIF7pJuhkga9_DfzjRO5flSAHmOSzLKh1xKgctXXQtyJurdlCHXQFR8ZwWeMQhJe7Vsw)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: I am so grateful for your support.
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend, I want to personally thank you.

Your contribution of $ made a difference for our campaign.

With your support, we met our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. That means we can hit the ground running in 2026 — knocking more doors, making more phone calls, sending more texts, and reaching more voters through TV and digital advertising.

With dark money groups already targeting our race, that's exactly what we need to do to win.

So thank you again, friend. It's an honor to have you on our team, and we couldn't do this work without you.

Onward,

Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=8c90a6ec-74ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=8c90a6ec-74ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: Trump is at war with humanity.
body:
Choose Humanity; Take the pledge.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/344ba812e225/tockcw1cwy-233?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=975c7a5c24&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | After this weekend’s attacks on Venezuela, one thing is painfully clear: **This administration is at war with humanity.**
Sovereignty is not whimsical. International law is not optional. And human lives are not expendable. However, this administration continues to demonstrate that there is no regard for civil society.
From endless wars abroad to cruelty and deprivation at home, the pattern is the same—humanity is never their priority.
We’re saying _enough_ is _enough_.
In moments like this, every message, every action, every campaign must return to one central truth: **we have a responsibility to one another.**
To protect life.To defend dignity.To refuse policies that rely on fear, violence, and dehumanization.
That’s why we’re asking you to take the **Prioritizing Humanity pledge.**
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=770d61c09e&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | This election cycle, we are standing united to demand justice, accountability, and leaders who consistently defend our shared humanity. Full stop.
Whether you are a voter or a candidate, the expectation is the same: **prioritize humanity.**
As the midterms approach, we must ask ourselves plainly: what kind of society are we becoming? Will we accept a nation defined by silenced voices, distorted democracy, and moral collapse? Or will we rise to meet our inalienable responsibility to each other?
At Movement for Freedom, we choose humanity—every time. And we are organizing, pledging, and electing leaders who will do the same.
[**Take the Prioritizing Humanity pledge today.**](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=e2367d43ec&e=81ab29c4d2)
Protect people everywhere. Empower communities. Win elections.
---
| |
_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=3689b296ae&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | _Copyright (C) 2026 Movement 4 Freedom. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Movement 4 Freedom PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/profile?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&e=81ab29c4d2&c=86008f10ec) or [unsubscribe](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&t=b&e=81ab29c4d2&c=86008f10ec)

name: Bo French
subject: Trump’s Ally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Bo French Campaign
body:
The world runs on oil... and our enemies own most of it.
| | | | [](https://link.emails.bofrench.com/click/e4422486/VaHR0cHM6Ly9ib2ZyZW5jaC5jb20/SZW1haWxzX2JvZnJlbmNoX2NvbTI2MDEwNQ/LbmNsalhtSXo/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1uY2xfYW1wbGlmeSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjYwMTA1LTIxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PW5jbC1BRXJSQlNXZkpYJl9ubGlkPUFFclJCU1dmSlgmX25oaWRzPW5jR3dBaDZGTEtQbHM/gaVwf-g/seg5ddcd58c)
---
|
---
| | Dear friend,
The world runs on oil. . . and our enemies own most of it.
China, Iran, Russia, the Middle East, and Venezuela – all enemies of America – control the majority of the world’s oil.
President Trump must have a strong oil industry in Texas to compete on the global stage.
I am the only candidate in the race committed to being his ally and providing the thriving oil industry he needs.
The fall of Maduro’s communist regime in Venezuela means Texas oil needs a strong leader now more than ever.
You won’t get that from any other candidate in the race.
_Will you help ensure that the Texas oil industry has the America First leadership it needs to win on the world stage?_
America is once again taking the fight to our enemies.
Which means, they are sure to come for our oil industry.
It’s more important than ever that we have strong leadership that knows how to stand up to evil people.
I’m the only one in the race who has a proven record of doing just that.
If you want our state and our oil industry to thrive, and for President Trump to have a true ally in his corner, I’m your guy.
**_Will you help me make this happen?_**
No one can predict what will happen next. But with your help, we can make sure Texas is ready to lead like never before.

---
| | [Donate](https://link.emails.bofrench.-g/s0sa62947bf)
---

Thanks in advance for supporting this mission.
We’re less than two months from Election Day. It will take everything we’ve got to deliver America First leadership to the Railroad Commission.

| | | [](https://link.emails.bofrench.com/click/e4422486/VaHR0cHM6Ly9ib2ZyZW5jaC5jb20/SZW1haWxzX2JvZnJlbmNoX2NvbTI2MDEwNQ/LbmNsalhtSXo/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1uY2xfYW1wbGlmeSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjYwMTA1LTIxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PW5jbC03OHpiTXNBcDZaJl9ubGlkPTc4emJNc0FwNlomX25oaWRzPW5jR3dBaDZGTEtQbHM/gaVwf-g/sem4e587c57)
---
| | **For Texas,**
**Bo French** **Candidate for TX Railroad Commissioner**

clean_body: The world runs on oil... and our enemies own most of it. | | | | | | | Dear friend, The world runs on oil. . . and our enemies own most of it. China, Iran, Russia, the Middle East, and Venezuela – all enemies of America – control the majority of the world’s oil. President Trump must have a strong oil industry in Texas to compete on the global stage. I am the only candidate in the race committed to being his ally and providing the thriving oil industry he needs. The fall of Maduro’s communist regime in Venezuela means Texas oil needs a strong leader now more than ever. You won’t get that from any other candidate in the race. Will you help ensure that the Texas oil industry has the America First leadership it needs to win on the world stage? America is once again taking the fight to our enemies. Which means, they are sure to come for our oil industry. It’s more important than ever that we have strong leadership that knows how to stand up to evil people. I’m the only one in the race who has a proven record of doing just that. If you want our state and our oil industry to thrive, and for President Trump to have a true ally in his corner, I’m your guy. Will you help me make this happen? No one can predict what will happen next. But with your help, we can make sure Texas is ready to lead like never before. | | Thanks in advance for supporting this mission. We’re less than two months from Election Day. It will take everything we’ve got to deliver America First leadership to the Railroad Commission. | | | | | For Texas, Bo French Candidate for TX Railroad Commissioner | | P.S. Learn how you can further support my campaign by going to | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|--- Pol. Adv. Paid for by the Bo French Campaign []()

I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dpg_em_fr_jan26](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122737935/593295727/-800341430?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_010526_B1_OSSOFFSPLIT_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTRiNzJhYi03NWVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MEMkAIjmjl-3N3iElfWSBDr536v1XE_qCEnIn5YK78o=) Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term. There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections. _But I have you, Peter._ Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority. Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.** Yes, this election will be tough. But we know how to win tough fights. Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Corrected RSVP Link for Herndon Town Hall/Updated Boysko Bulletin: Invitation to Three Legislative Town Halls
body:
| | |
---
**Updated Boysko Bulletin: ****Invitation to Three Legislative Town Halls**
---
Dear Peter, In a week’s time, I’ll be headed to Richmond for the 2026 General Assembly Session. I am excited about this opportunity to pass legislation that I’ve been working on for many years - that will make life in Virginia easier, safer, and fairer. This week, you have several opportunities to join me and your other elected officials to learn about our legislation and share your concerns. Please join me for one or all of three legislative town halls this week. Great Falls Town Hall with Delegate Rip Sullivan, Monday, 1/5/2026 at 6:30 pm, Great Falls Library, [link to rsvp for the McLean and Great Falls Town Halls](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122737988/593296012/-325686961?usp=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1MjNjNzItNzZlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a0i9-yVZWqdtTmhjXKBpiWXkAPWkG3VY_tAzDBR9wEE=&emci=983fa65f-73ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb523c72-76ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) McLean Town Hall with Delegate Rip Sullivan, Tuesday, 1/6/2026 at 6:30 pm, McLean Community Center, [link to rsvp for the McLean and Great Falls Town Halls](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122737989/593296013/-325686961?usp=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1MjNjNzItNzZlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a0i9-yVZWqdtTmhjXKBpiWXkAPWkG3VY_tAzDBR9wEE=&emci=983fa65f-73ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb523c72-76ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) Herndon Town Hall with Delegate Keys-Gammara, Wednesday, 1/7/2026 at 6:30 pm, Herndon Community Center, [link to rsvp to the Herndon Town Hall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122737990/593296014/824580479?usp=sharing&ouid=102228512899417232436&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1MjNjNzItNzZlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a0i9-yVZWqdtTmhjXKBpiWXkAPWkG3VY_tAzDBR9wEE=&emci=983fa65f-73ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb523c72-76ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556)

Your Voice Matters. Please attend to discuss the issues that matter most to our community – whether it's education funding, federal job losses, transportation, healthcare access, housing costs, or any other concern on your mind. I’ve also included information below on opportunities to attend two public hearings - the Governor’s Budget and the Fairfax Delegation Pre Legislative Session Hearing. Happy new year! I hope you had an enjoyable and peaceful holiday season. I’ve received many emails asking me to speak out against the federal Administration’s actions in Venezuela. I am opposed to the use of our troops in Venezuela. I’ve reached out to our federal legislators, as you should, to ask that they require our President to follow the rule of law. You know that I am committed to working for peace throughout our state, nation, and world. Kindest regards,

**Opportunities** **Public Hearing re Governor Youngkin’s Proposed 2026 - 2028 Biennial State Budget** Wednesday, January 7, 2026 - virtual hearings will begin at 10 am. There will be four separate virtual hearings with legislators from each region participating as follows: Northern Virginia; Western Virginia; Hampton Roads; Central Virginia (Richmond). [**Press Release: Emergency Motion to Defend In-State Tuition for Immigrant Students**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122738004/593296028/-988424050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1MjNjNzItNzZlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a0i9-yVZWqdtTmhjXKBpiWXkAPWkG3VY_tAzDBR9wEE=&emci=983fa65f-73ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb523c72-76ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) Over the holidays, we received news that the federal Administration sued Virginia, claiming that our law that allows undocumented students with ties to Virginia to pay in-state tuition is unconstitutional. I passed that legislation in 2020 - it is carefully crafted to ensure that it is constitutional and treats all students with ties to Virginia in the same manner. Further, the law ensures that all students can work to their full potential. We all benefit when each of us is able to learn and to contribute. [Learn more here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122738005/593296029/-988424050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1MjNjNzItNzZlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a0i9-yVZWqdtTmhjXKBpiWXkAPWkG3VY_tAzDBR9wEE=&emci=983fa65f-73ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb523c72-76ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) AG Miyares chose not to defend Virginia as he nears the end of his term. Others have stepped up, including the [Legal Aid Justice Center](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122738006/593296030/-1038851179?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1MjNjNzItNzZlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a0i9-yVZWqdtTmhjXKBpiWXkAPWkG3VY_tAzDBR9wEE=&emci=983fa65f-73ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb523c72-76ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) and the [ACLU of Virginia](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122738007/593296031/-706427413?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1MjNjNzItNzZlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a0i9-yVZWqdtTmhjXKBpiWXkAPWkG3VY_tAzDBR9wEE=&emci=983fa65f-73ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb523c72-76ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556), which are providing pro bono representation in this case on behalf of the Dream Project.
