clean_body: | | | Updated Boysko Bulletin: Invitation to Three Legislative Town Halls Dear Peter, In a week’s time, I’ll be headed to Richmond for the 2026 General Assembly Session. I am excited about this opportunity to pass legislation that I’ve been working on for many years - that will make life in Virginia easier, safer, and fairer. This week, you have several opportunities to join me and your other elected officials to learn about our legislation and share your concerns. Please join me for one or all of three legislative town halls this week. Great Falls Town Hall with Delegate Rip Sullivan, Monday, 1/5/2026 at 6:30 pm, Great Falls Library, McLean Town Hall with Delegate Rip Sullivan, Tuesday, 1/6/2026 at 6:30 pm, McLean Community Center, Herndon Town Hall with Delegate Keys-Gammara, Wednesday, 1/7/2026 at 6:30 pm, Herndon Community Center, Your Voice Matters. Please attend to discuss the issues that matter most to our community – whether it's education funding, federal job losses, transportation, healthcare access, housing costs, or any other concern on your mind. I’ve also included information below on opportunities to attend two public hearings - the Governor’s Budget and the Fairfax Delegation Pre Legislative Session Hearing. Happy new year! I hope you had an enjoyable and peaceful holiday season. I’ve received many emails asking me to speak out against the federal Administration’s actions in Venezuela. I am opposed to the use of our troops in Venezuela. I’ve reached out to our federal legislators, as you should, to ask that they require our President to follow the rule of law. You know that I am committed to working for peace throughout our state, nation, and world. Kindest regards, Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS If you would like to support my work, please visit =. Photo Gallery Update for Legislators on Dulles Airport in Richmond for the Virginia Education Summit, the Joint Rules Committee Meeting, and the meeting of the Joint Senate Finance and Appropriations and the House Appropriations Committees Lighting the menorah candles at Reston Town Center for Chanukah Legislative Updates Work continues on my 2026 legislative We are limited to 25 bills plus any bills recommended by a commission. So far, I have introduced one bill and one resolution - two of my highest priorities. I have drafted more than 30 bills and will introduce 26 total and then transfer the rest to other legislators. The final changes are due in a few days and most bills will be filed by the opening day of session, January 14th. Status: In Committee Status: In Committee I look forward to seeing many of you in Richmond. Please reach out to me by email at mailto:SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov if you would like to discuss my legislation or ask that I support other legislation. | | For detailed information on constituent services offered by my office, see my website, . Information available includes: Resources for Those Impacted by the current federal administration Additional Resources for Federal Employees Facing Unemployment Help Paying Bills Transportation Discounts: 50% Off Metrorail and Metrobus for SNAP Recipients Reach Out for Mental Health Support - Addiction Recovery Know Your Rights - Resources for Immigrants Opportunities Public Hearing re Governor Youngkin’s Proposed 2026 - 2028 Biennial State Budget Wednesday, January 7, 2026 - virtual hearings will begin at 10 am. There will be four separate virtual hearings with legislators from each region participating as follows: Northern Virginia; Western Virginia; Hampton Roads; Central Virginia (Richmond). The public may sign up to speak for one of the virtual public hearings on Tuesday, January 6, 2026, beginning at 8 am through 4 pm. Please check the or Committee websites for the latest information on registration. Fairfax Delegation Pre Session Legislative Hearing The Fairfax County delegation to the General Assembly will hold a public hearing regarding the upcoming 2026 session on Saturday, January 10, at 9 am in the Board Auditorium at the Fairfax County Government Center, 12000 Government Center Parkway, Fairfax with parking available in front of the Government Center Building. Fairfax County is assisting with the logistics of the delegation’s event. Fairfax County residents who want to sign up in advance to speak at the hearing should register online using this or contact the Department of Clerk Services at 703-324-3151, TTY 711, by Thursday, January 8, at noon. Learn more at . Give Back Over the holidays, we received news that the federal Administration sued Virginia, claiming that our law that allows undocumented students with ties to Virginia to pay in-state tuition is unconstitutional. I passed that legislation in 2020 - it is carefully crafted to ensure that it is constitutional and treats all students with ties to Virginia in the same manner. Further, the law ensures that all students can work to their full potential. We all benefit when each of us is able to learn and to contribute. AG Miyares chose not to defend Virginia as he nears the end of his term. Others have stepped up, including the and the , which are providing pro bono representation in this case on behalf of the Dream Project. Please support them if you can. In the News Events Monday Nights at 7 pm/ We welcome notices about events that are free or very low cost. Keep in Touch** It’s been a busy year back and forth from Herndon to Richmond. During Session, I work with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, session aides Toby Anthony and Mallory Lenz, and in District, Kathy Shupe, Juliet Morro, and Aditi Goel. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov. name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: …and then we won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Millions of Georgia voters turned out to vote for a better, more prosperous future for themselves and the entire country.
#

**January 5, 2021.** Do you remember? Election Day in Georgia.
Millions of Georgia voters turned out to vote for a better, more prosperous future for themselves and the entire country. _And then we won._
That victory, alongside Rev. Warnock, delivered the Senate majority for Democrats.
_It also guaranteed that MAGA will be _laser-focused_ on defeating Jon in 2026. _
They’ve already spent more than $10 million on this race, and by Election Day it’s likely that Jon will face more Super PAC spending than any Senate candidate in United States history.
**In order to win again in 2026, we are going to have to do even more than we did in 2020 and 2021 — and Jon can’t do it alone.**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
#

Peter —
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
[**And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Ruben Gallego and me so we can fight back.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-mek-em-mar25.qIyu4X&refcode=em260105-1-160&t=1&akid=4057%2E734936%2ExRCfBn)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: It's HERE! + Join Me On Newsmax Tonight!
body:
It is FINALLY here! I have been very busy signing all the pre-orders for my newest book entitled 'DIVIDED: BREAKING FREE FROM THE DOUBLE LIFE.' Past
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13965.1.7d759836f986716b9b329161424b1ade) |
---
It is FINALLY here! I have been very busy signing all the pre-orders for my newest book entitled '[DIVIDED: BREAKING FREE FROM THE DOUBLE LIFE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13966.1.b046c613fcc76b3ef86a825f699dc5c1).' **Pastor Paula White-Cain** wrote an _incredible_ Foreword and **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** gave an _amazing_ Endorsement. In this, I open up about _my own personal struggles_ as a follower of Jesus and a Pastor. I share things that I've never shared publicly in hopes that it will speak to people who might be ashamed with the different struggles they have even as Christians and how to have victory. There are two of us in all of us but we're not destined to live **DIVIDED** forever. You can visit: [https://clr.cm/qPKQ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13967.1.18e20e3d8bfb696be118c8f8728f03a9)to get your SIGNED copy and start reading immediately with the **FREE e-book** that's included. You can also get a copy on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13968.1.6e36cc98fc55d60917d739375e59c29d), [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13969.1.428987c8d1dd5200ac0ed8b96ab81e34), and all other book retailers as well. I believe this book will help many people overcome the double life that far too many of us live. Also, join me on NEWSMAX tonight at 8:45pm EST with David Harris Jr. Thank you -Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Click Here To Read "DIVIDED" Now ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13970.1.7ac05a1c0633b57b03bfa5d7fd031218)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13971.1.b504b047cb000313ed62abc3b0fcdafe)
---
Every one of us lives with tension - the tug-of-war between the two of us living in all of us. In DIVIDED, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer gets real, raw, and deeply relatable as he opens up about his own struggles with pride, anger, and failure while chasing God's purpose. Through humor, honesty, and hard-learned wisdom, Lahmeyer invites readers to drop the mask, confront the "dark me" that keeps surfacing, and experience the transforming power of grace. This is not a polished preacher's pep talk-it's a gut-level, heart-to-heart conversation about what it means to follow Jesus when life gets messy. Drawing from the lives of biblical characters like Peter, Jacob and Paul, Lahmeyer shows that even the greatest heroes of faith had moments of weakness, doubt, and defeat. He unpacks the difference between remorse and repentance, explores how belief shapes behavior, and reveals how identity-not effort-is the key to lasting transformation. With vivid stories, relatable honesty, and the truth of Scripture, he reminds us that God isn't looking for the perfect version of you-He's after the real you. Because the moment you get real with God is the moment He starts making you new. If you've ever felt like you're living two lives-the public you that looks strong and the private you that's barely hanging on-this book is for you. DIVIDED will help you see that failure isn't final, temptation isn't sin, and your past doesn't disqualify your purpose. You'll laugh, you'll be challenged, and you'll find hope in the God who meets you where you are but never leaves you there. Honest, gritty, and full of grace, this book will inspire you to feed the right wolf, renew your mind, and finally live as the "you" God designed you to be.
---
---
|
---
Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13972.1.03f2a89dd773ef698bce1ba774146049) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13973.1.aa6be760abd085228cd7490d1ccc1b31)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13974.1.0f1343a2a781f16cb90b657d7add5d56)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13975.1.4c1f8d6710743e8e8f882cab566edde0). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13976.1.69f8749f9635835e4cff57bec1475e69) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13977.1.bb49b702d25e0fa3fe6aea9d5bb25283) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27219246.13978.1.0a80e25b6b56616831c5b1d94e6bcb99) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

| As we kick off a brand-new year here in West Michigan, I’m feeling incredibly grateful – for this community, for the trust you’ve placed in me, and for the opportunity to keep fighting for our shared values.

Now that we’ve officially entered an election year, setting the right priorities matters more than ever. There is so much work ahead, and I want to ensure our agenda reflects what’s most important to the families and communities I’m honored to represent.

That’s why I put together a quick 2026 Priorities Survey – to hear directly from you about what issues you want front and center as we head into the year.

Your input will help guide our plan of action and ensure we stay focused on what truly matters to West Michigan.

[_**Will you take a minute to share your thoughts?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122738334/593296998/-1553535014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY0MTYyNS03OGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FTNRk3DckpHO-dLDj2ROSNkiBv1iSizcG_3De7uZVB4=&emci=00641625-78ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=09641625-78ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=750857)

clean_body: Now that we’ve officially entered an election year, setting the right priorities matters more than ever. | = | As we kick off a brand-new year here in West Michigan, I’m feeling incredibly grateful – for this community, for the trust you’ve placed in me, and for the opportunity to keep fighting for our shared values. Now that we’ve officially entered an election year, setting the right priorities matters more than ever. There is so much work ahead, and I want to ensure our agenda reflects what’s most important to the families and communities I’m honored to represent. That’s why I put together a quick 2026 Priorities Survey – to hear directly from you about what issues you want front and center as we head into the year. Your input will help guide our plan of action and ensure we stay focused on what truly matters to West Michigan. | – Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Nellie Pou
subject: Thank you. And here’s what’s next.
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Hi friend,

As we kick off the new year, we want to start with one simple message: thank you.

Thanks to supporters like you, we met our EOQ goal. That means our plans are moving forward. Our organizing continues. Our outreach expands. And our campaign enters the election year with real momentum.

But now the work gets even bigger.

This is the election year. This year, this seat will help determine control of the House — the year MAGA will throw everything they have at districts like ours.

We cannot slow down. We have to keep going hard, building on the foundation you helped create and making sure we have the resources to win.

As this campaign heats up, thank you for standing with me.

Nellie Pou
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=1f87b885-79ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=1f87b885-79ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]
Follow Nellie

name: George Whitesides
subject: This isn’t possible without your support.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2026?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2026?refcode=em-header] Peter, Happy New Year!

I want to thank you for your continued support. With your help, I’m proud to share that we met our end-of-year fundraising goal -- and are entering the midterm election year with strength.

It couldn’t come at a more important time. Congress is back in session this week, and what happens next will impact thousands of working families in CA-27 and beyond:

- After the surprise military action in Venezuela, Trump claimed that he will be “running” the country -- despite his campaign promises to end the forever wars. As a member of the Armed Services Committee, I’m demanding answers and that Congress receive a detailed plan of action.

- The Republican majority allowed the ACA tax credits to expire at the end of the year. Costs have already risen dramatically for millions of families nationwide because of the GOP’s refusal to act. We expect a vote on extension this week.

I’m fighting hard for our communities in Washington, because it’s up to us to build a stronger future for working families. Now that we’re in the election year, it’s critical that this seat stays blue -- because Democrats can’t flip the majority without it.

There’s a lot more to come, but right now, I want to extend my gratitude for your support that makes what I do in Washington and at home possible.

Thank you,

George

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2026?refcode=em-1.5.26-all-b
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. Chip in to George's campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2026?refcode=em-footer]
To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: GeorgeWhitesides.com [https://www.georgewhitesides.com/?]

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The message Charlie carried into eternity
body:
Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd111aa1650a4c4598abd7d096119902&_e=2hpxfbImgc8F5rMYliLI4p4v8qQsdU6fNpXHz3-opYG8hT392lgnZFLvsdgAU1-83n6HUkEF8d7bfY24w-JG_T9Zzgm-5Aai1zEq34UQL5v0jEnMMUPs_LQwDREgy-kdINVICvUoO2ZwfpyydXdW5N6tfVYmfru01DnG334BopiQfrS_0a1XsXzIl6QBA1bzeP__0JkE97JPyyOiKFglkJqUCc0RF4wXUiTDpmUakXYdXMbZROOwQZbqxjZ_DDbP_pDd3RJq51U8RQJogDXveYZ5iyRfbUM3wFn6rNbVp-5Pp8OFXJ3SFXaf0PMWv1OSXoASYF7pRyiyjurPNgBu98_jXK_mJ4jtpkgahE8FGvrfk9-jLzg82eKp_oEh7uN_h3rztOKabqUU1evJXKjz86svVeOKmYsQQoraO-Fdy2mDsaPFKNvo4ew_MaXvydkJm2ZCUr8mtrOMVgK0W1YHyalCW8rwD3Li8V3uqC5N0pKYDVDB_6ZbtLh0IcALLn8EI_tUbUaShGVZ3ljwZTBHQoNet6Jq9vgn8jzpKaZRF_9wqBW2D_-LUFktyL7K31G6joYrVo4CXxOtwTgV9CPqBCXJ0JVctvjWgaOmmW9mUkvNjb6kDTSb9ptqX4qS3nHkKe85I3N7z6Ar90DnYJptHSFVo7PIKJkvZNwUZVkQ_9Kn-Osm9pjMr68W8dPRiO4l)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd111aa1650a4c4598abd7d096119902&_e=2hpxfbImgc8F5rMYliLI4p4v8qQsdU6fNpXHz3-opYG8hT392lgnZFLvsdgAU1-83n6HUkEF8d7bfY24w-JG_T9Zzgm-5Aai1zEq34UQL5v0jEnMMUPs_LQwDREgy-kdINVICvUoO2ZwfpyydXdW5N6tfVYmfru01DnG334BopiQfrS_0a1XsXzIl6QBA1bzeP__0JkE97JPyyOiKFglkJqUCc0RF4wXUiTDpmUakXa-MLBV_mJZ5HTaF7GkJPII3HImIy4PoetAJRcsk8dzlqY8-0zkKKzMwUE6wwdzXMNGMJ65uv4oF99xT8cfRsc7caKz_JkL-o4GImBgca9w9Yb7ILGK7Lad6ylxBWpd7efWjo-Hn4huqvE8EVd-MF96Nskotn614ptXuMKKR0LEeklpBnrhPMJkmFTCDMhYH6VphTnix3cM3GfV85qwktOzIY57KY4h_SIYiw4uFE2vl1_yuPFyG-jSW9hSZAb7kZ9LtbxTAmrBsp9TitUISfnetW72UOjtDjEzHbdyoxAueIo8AUpJiZ49Zdtqyj67CFsPe6S19BQJthaRYMQgP-qejD6jAzPkyM8uM-bHeN3X91gAbxwIB2frA5DdliBTL1gDPUqMQjLDbRrsI1M7aYqjLAJuaofLKbywMJYbExw4Hw01tpTKD4pAWZgDpoWJYGIvZEjZEBEm4vIERiR57ZWM)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd111aa1650a4c4598abd7d096119902&_e=2hpxfbImgc8F5rMYliLI4p4v8qQsdU6fNpXHz3-opYG8hT392lgnZFLvsdgAU1-83n6HUkEF8d7bfY24w-JG_T9Zzgm-5Aai1zEq34UQL5v0jEnMMUPs_LQwDREgy-kdINVICvUoO2ZwfpyydXdW5N6tfVYmfru01DnG334BopiQfrS_0a1XsXzIl6QBA1bzeP__0JkE97JPyyOiKFglkJqUCc0RF4wXUiTDpmUakXbA-pilbggoid51lkDO7a0R8V1cei91HXIom8Ultlg36wKsbHLLQXMP-IXyEJdmXyzPACHkwTtZ_YeABnzlfGKfcBnzZurLm2tLkg0zwg5p-DyOkdPWU8vmXQtL_fASxpKaSY6URfXyx2bHGUbVgTI7Pk2TTfwYth2yunLzTiq0vzhCc-rcwXioegQC-IqoroyOLMvBBtqt-11Ps-EabP04FuF1pW5AkpqhNHn3w578cqMjBq__xp654yt3f_jWrsIKYkAz-Hih45ba9p7PMMfnel_M4dHz5LRqOA0gSbBUKO7hX6GS6317E1kROaT4SPBHY_8uvyncYe6XBRx3UfR0P6mSNjz9nAh4fpv-upoVviNERinTgWqiH1cQmegJprOWz7m5P0yiPD3QYJBrC1RnELpZ6fgAa3VcgejwvVSjkmcw0nXa24PgydB5FatehvsZi6ovKHZsQAiHBwJ2GGy1)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd111aa1650a4c4598abd7d096119902&_e=2hpxfbImgc8F5rMYliLI4p4v8qQsdU6fNpXHz3-opYG8hT392lgnZFLvsdgAU1-83n6HUkEF8d7bfY24w-JG_T9Zzgm-5Aai1zEq34UQL5v0jEnMMUPs_LQwDREgy-kdINVICvUoO2ZwfpyydXdW5N6tfVYmfru01DnG334BopiQfrS_0a1XsXzIl6QBA1bzeP__0JkE97JPyyOiKFglkJqUCc0RF4wXUiTDpmUakXZOsy0rWMNwPIbl6rwdeROXsfkZS6mJRwMOeyOlq2R_ZFnxVYA3ObwhRvhlCkW9E2k7vqsKi05EXiudxAcx3uB4FRYX2zhh4-453KXyV8kxYNxr0G86lNdYis3A-l0u-tYE1vwMaMAA1wCBZLINxhg_NQqcZtX5rMiUYS89slvxRR5NDPU-Rdz-dD7xFP-Y9c0Y6O4a20V_LnDFpJCGnLSPqoEAZtpdPK9vReZMtGepOmHS48eh2GGIS-t27BmNG9s3cqG5gl-whwcrtf1aZPWdvYbOkeNJ3A2cNekkjTK_AtTWHFjDGV_XhR6AeD8BvcdfOAoz2TRTtE7dTfkefRr48_-afZVGKbHMAxOZTX2WpOQSdx6LInGR5R4oa9x_pm-LSGbLxxtyDSZmvQ6qDoIU2qZyBThkHh-B3cWeFAKWSIm0L8v8PcESfJt8YhvlKp6iEWxITOu6O_7ve6CAxq67)
---
In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

clean_body: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

$5. Today.

$5 to take on the right-wing judges dismantling our
democracy.

$5 to hold politicians — both Democrats and Republicans —
accountable when they side with Trump’s extremist nominees.

$5 to build a movement demanding fair courts that serve the
people — not the powerful few.

When you give $5 to Demand Justice, you’re not just
donating — you’re joining the movement to take back our courts from
extremists who think they can rule from the bench.

For years, the right has waged a quiet war to capture the courts. They’ve
filled lifetime seats with partisan operatives who block progress, strip
away freedoms, and shield the wealthy and well-connected.

Demand Justice is organizing at every level — exposing judicial
corruption, calling out senators who rubber-stamp Trump’s picks, and
mobilizing a grassroots movement to restore balance and legitimacy to the
courts.

Our democracy can’t survive without fair courts. And we can’t win this
fight without you.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: re: Venezuela
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The Trump administration started the new year by illegally invading and
bombing the sovereign nation of Venezuela, killing at least 80 people, and
kidnapping Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and his wife.

These are war crimes that violate both U.S. and international law, and
it’s not about drugs or democracy. Trump himself said on Sunday, “We are
in the business of having countries around us that are viable and
successful and where the oil is allowed to freely come out.”

This unconstitutional regime change war has one purpose: to steal
Venezuela's oil so Trump's billionaire Big Oil buddies can cash in. He
even admitted to tipping off Big Oil ahead of the strike, and claims the
U.S. will work with oil companies to run the country.

This is American imperialism in action.

The so-called “peace president” has now bombed 8 countries in the first
year of his second administration. Trump and his war-hungry thugs are
talking about putting boots on the ground in Venezuela and carrying out
similar operations in Mexico, Colombia, Iran, and Cuba, threatening to
spend billions of our taxpayer dollars and send U.S. service members to
risk their lives in more endless wars.

All while millions of people across our country lose their healthcare and
struggle to get by.

Enough. Only Congress has the authority to declare war, and we need EVERY
Democrat in Congress to step up, do their jobs, and pass a War Powers
Resolution to stop this.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20260105-venezuela/?source=em20260105-37343&t=1002&akid=37343%2E1203867%2EzQKQ_- ]Add your name to demand Congress stop Trump’s war with Venezuela NOW!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20260105-venezuela/?source=em20260105-37343&t=1003&akid=37343%2E1203867%2EzQKQ_- ]Add Your Name

Every Justice Democrat in Congress is already leading the charge, speaking
out, and organizing to stop this from escalating into another forever war.

Let’s build the pressure on the rest of the Democratic Party to join them
and actually fight back.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260105-37343-footer&t=1004&refcode2=37343_1203867_zQKQ_-&akid=37343%2E1203867%2EzQKQ_-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=37343%2E1203867%2EzQKQ_-

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, The Trump administration started the new year by illegally invading and bombing the sovereign nation of Venezuela, killing at least 80 people, and kidnapping Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and his wife. These are war crimes that violate both U.S. and international law, and it’s not about drugs or democracy. Trump himself said on Sunday, “We are in the business of having countries around us that are viable and successful and where the oil is allowed to freely come out.” This unconstitutional regime change war has one purpose: to steal Venezuela's oil so Trump's billionaire Big Oil buddies can cash in. He even admitted to tipping off Big Oil ahead of the strike, and claims the U.S. will work with oil companies to run the country. This is American imperialism in action. The so-called “peace president” has now bombed 8 countries in the first year of his second administration. Trump and his war-hungry thugs are talking about putting boots on the ground in Venezuela and carrying out similar operations in Mexico, Colombia, Iran, and Cuba, threatening to spend billions of our taxpayer dollars and send U.S. service members to risk their lives in more endless wars. All while millions of people across our country lose their healthcare and struggle to get by. Enough. Only Congress has the authority to declare war, and we need EVERY Democrat in Congress to step up, do their jobs, and pass a War Powers Resolution to stop this. [ - ]Add your name to demand Congress stop Trump’s war with Venezuela NOW! [ - ]Add Your Name Every Justice Democrat in Congress is already leading the charge, speaking out, and organizing to stop this from escalating into another forever war. Let’s build the pressure on the rest of the Democratic Party to join them and actually fight back. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats: -

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The Trial of My Life Begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
There comes a point in every man’s life...
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---
No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: **_“Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.”_**
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3f80226bfc974bf8ae29ff291389ce7e&_e=pTbSljt0CeP6u_yBqrfJB75MWX64QCGN6NdgPwPL0r_JPQasQmGVMotIPD5fDkiu8qO7qSfvYrDwDOPLKiXPe4L_664bvKfzHoJak_WfXXJA65kkntUDvf-wpYXHZfv6Po-VO-FcJqoUiFDwhLsIxov7zqjTbORYc548Z8hnGUPq1JJ8Zy8JklGYxy4cZdOHBrYuWwt4jBJUaSAFYDIkXike81O2AkPkNpPgscgFnLOHwYOWSaufWVyNV-5azdL92p-pKOelEIYtsZaMH8B5tjTz1QY3VH9o0CnnKrHsq6ef3kt5ThfnBvVy2Ww0WSVbG4xRo76cEMlyMEqTEdjRA2H8jhgfVNSKz21FH3R9T--cFoWZVCe4sI7rBTeLFRd6UFjcaRgfliQWlABQTMMipEDjai1-YE9U1cJw2CXAQjU7Erh7KDFilIrnb_w73BPCcBEmNpwwaNI50KpAmPTaqMbIr6eaE4tArShdu29WCR2x4mt8v59m6JTybskd9-p3bCu2qzluiOsHZ4MOB3MTPuRYzhkvWyhTVqMwjxwVAzCK0qgBqQhcIRhafrnXGH6x0kwQQrTBXN66g7Bt65tOUw8KrldY9cvibUfQQNFQARI%3D)
__
---
**I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump.**
---
_Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my** _own_**._
---
**That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit._
---
But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get.
---
_I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America._
---
With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and _WON_!
---
_But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day._
---
[**But if you can, please make a contribution to my brand new “Rudy Defense Trust” to help me fight for my freedom and justice and beat the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for life.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3f80226bfc974bf8ae29ff291389ce7e&_e=pTbSljt0CeP6u_yBqrfJB75MWX64QCGN6NdgPwPL0r_JPQasQmGVMotIPD5fDkiu8qO7qSfvYrDwDOPLKiXPe4L_664bvKfzHoJak_WfXXJA65kkntUDvf-wpYXHZfv6Po-VO-FcJqoUiFDwhLsIxov7zqjTbORYc548Z8hnGUPq1JJ8Zy8JklGYxy4cZdOHK9qD-sUfZN3Oq6tW1WUeGIud8uruy_Nnq0DN_k0glSlaAhEoxseyt8Ln8EpKwhHDRaUApmfsHCpOg8DZfgCQ4N4qMu4lUOyT1S_9B2SGLftLrXiZerXlXTgIi92PpBThWNg2B_sYwHOJJwTo16_MvONurebiNiC4A-9WwPV3InMkHWVzuOnk555BCu8i5u68LCxkwXGycMifQ92FuCaf22IAANhaCca106REwnhjrpc3ggss8rGoTlf7YL7In3p5Cu8k89A-hAviPNAw8dSjItBb-oGz2K9eFRvMXRYgxdcXBQxxdd083FOAU2adMC8c6dgxWVR0aoqglMeuYM8I0pI7OBFX8-rnmcDmDnAecEuZv66uu_0854yjdBqcVGf-j7rRLiwnAN1dRR2vXGwyslr6lxvuAm3GMdWmw5oNVc8%3D)

clean_body: There comes a point in every man’s life... | Dear Fellow Patriot, There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you. No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: “Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.” I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump. Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my own. That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE. Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit. But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get. I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America. With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and WON! But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day. Thank you and God Bless you! Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: We cannot allow healthcare to become a luxury good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The fight over these ACA cuts led to the longest government shutdown in American history.
#
In the past five days, millions of Americans have seen their monthly health insurance premiums double — and millions more will no longer be able to afford their premiums at all — because **Republicans cut Affordable Care Act subsidies to finance tax cuts for their billionaire donors**.
Our healthcare system is broken.
The fight over these ACA cuts led to the longest government shutdown in American history. During that time, Alexandria visited residents in The Bronx to better figure out how we can fight back as we continue the fight for Medicare For All.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260105.oP-q_2&refcode=em20260105-10525-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10525%2E2526796%2EQHuAsS)
We need to stand up for the American people.
And **we need to do what we can to make healthcare affordable and accessible as we work to make it a human right for all**.**
Some people might call it "extreme," but Alexandria is fighting in Congress to make sure that the people of this country don't have to skip or ration their prescriptions just to survive the Trump administration**.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today so that she can continue the fight?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260105.oP-q_2&refcode=em20260105-10525-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10525%2E2526796%2EQHuAsS)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260105.oP-q_2&refcode=em20260105-10525-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10525%2E2526796%2EQHuAsS)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20260105?refcode=em20260105-10525-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=10525_2526796_QHuAsS&akid=10525%2E2526796%2EQHuAsS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20260105-10525-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=10525%2E2526796%2EQHuAsS)**
---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I’d love your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240581%2E444211%2En8IU0n)
We are doing something truly exceptional with Powered by People. And I’d love your help to grow it by [**becoming a recurring donor today.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20260105.JsZDSd&refcode=ema20260105-240581&t=3&akid=240581%2E444211%2En8IU0n)
As technology platforms, and our addiction to them, destroy our social and civic bonds... when the temptation has never been greater for political organizations to leverage their immense power to further inflame, isolate, and divide us... our volunteers are consciously choosing to bypass the algorithms and cold digital connections for the extraordinary power of meeting people in person, wherever they are, to bring them into the most important elections of our lives... to bring them out of the despair and cynicism that is manufactured for profit and remind them of their political power in what is still the world’s greatest democracy.
Our thousands of volunteers take the time to reach, register and turn out our fellow Americans, _in person_ , to ensure that we overcome the greatest challenges of our time—authoritarianism, corruption, political violence—and win the elections necessary to lead our country out of this great darkness.
And the best part about our approach to politics: it works.
In 2024, our volunteers met young prospective voters across the state of Texas. We got them registered to vote, personally stayed in touch with them, answered their questions about voting, and nudged them until they cast their ballot. Young voters nationally turned out at a rate of 42%. In Texas it was 37%. In our program, _young voters turned out at a rate of 79%._
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20260105.JsZDSd&refcode=ema20260105-240581&t=4&akid=240581%2E444211%2En8IU0n)
**Now, I’d love your help in growing this program to support more volunteers, to reach more young voters, to ultimately turn out the margin of victory in the most important elections in this country’s history.**
[**By becoming a recurring donor, you will ensure that we have the resources necessary to consistently reach, register and turn out voters in the Congressional and Senate races that will determine the balance of power in America following the 2026 elections.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20260105.JsZDSd&refcode=ema20260105-240581&t=5&akid=240581%2E444211%2En8IU0n)
You will guarantee that we can do the real work, person to person, face to face, human to human, that will help us win and show America that we can still be a government of, by and for the people.
**[BECOME A RECURRING DONOR](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20260105.JsZDSd&refcode=ema20260105-240581&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=240581%2E444211%2En8IU0n)**
Thank you for joining us,
Beto

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260105-240581-footer&t=7&refcode2=240581_444211_n8IU0n&akid=240581%2E444211%2En8IU0n)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/update-contact-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=240581%2E444211%2En8IU0n)

name: Karl for Congress
subject: American Imperialism
body:
[](https://link.karlforcongress.us/donate/)
---
On January 3rd, Donald Trump [invaded Venezuela](https://link.karlforcongress.us/7df1f6dc/ "A timeline of U.S. military escalation against Venezuela leading to Maduro's capture") and kidnapped their president and first lady. This was done without notice to, or permission from, Congress. These were violations of federal and international law and were the acts of a tyrant, not the leader of a constitutional republic. We have surrendered the moral high ground on the world stage and set a dangerous precedent for authoritarians to act with impunity. We can no longer challenge Xi on his designs for Taiwan, nor Putin as he tries to claim Ukraine in his quest to resurrect the Soviet Union. Make no mistake: this is not a defense of Nicolas Maduro or his dictatorial rule. It is a defense of American ideals! We cannot have a foreign policy based on invading countries and kidnapping their heads of state. As an immigrant from Jamaica, it was especially unsettling for me when both Trump and Marco Rubio made it clear that [Cuba could be next](https://link.karlforcongress.us/8fb6e537/ "Rubio sends warning to Cuba’s leaders after Maduro’s removal: ‘I’d be concerned’"). It is a chilling message being sent to the Caribbean, Latin America, and the rest of the world: American imperialism is here! The situation is made much worse when you consider the entire reason this happened: **Oil** Venezuela has the largest oil reserves in the world! The type that US refineries in the Gulf are [designed to process](https://link.karlforcongress.us/c2a56cad/ "Why the U.S Can’t Use the Oil it Produces"). Additionally, during his second presidential campaign, Donald Trump [requested a 1 billion dollar donation](https://link.karlforcongress.us/c62bc6f7 "Trump pressed oil executives to give $1 billion for his campaign, people in industry say") from the gathered oil and gas executives at a fundraiser (receiving millions in response), promising them lax regulation and increased profits. When speaking at a press conference after the invasion, Trump made it clear that American companies would be the ones managing Venezuelan oil. He's repaying his donors at the expense of a country's sovereignty. Saying the quiet part out loud like this would make both prior Bush administrations blush! Ignore everything this administration said to justify murdering individuals in boats off Venezuela's coast. All claims about drugs fall apart when you consider that Trump just pardoned the former Honduran president, Juan Orlando Hernandez, for drug trafficking. Congress must rein in this madness! Exercise your Article I powers and hold this lawless president accountable!
| _Your support is what makes this campaign possible.[Donating](https://link.karlforcongress.us/donate/ "Donate to the campaign") is the easiest way to help us bring our message of equal protections and benefits from emerging technologies to Washington!_
---
[DONATE](https://link.karlforcongress.us/donate/)

| [](https://karlforcongress.us/donate/) **Karl for Congress** PO Box 12314 Philadelphia, PA 19119 | [](https://instagram.com/karlmorrispa/ "Instagram") | [](https://tiktok.com/@karlmorrispa "TikTok") | [](https://bsky.app/profile/karlmorrispa.bsky.social "Bluesky") | [](https://facebook.com/karlmorrispa "Facebook") | [](https://linkedin.com/in/karlmorrispa "LinkedIn")

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Bumper stickers, buttons, and flyers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
I just got out of a meeting with my team, and we have a big year ahead of us.
| Hi there, 2026 is here and I’m ready to hit the ground running. I just got out of a meeting with my team, and we have a big year ahead of us. **Winning this governor’s seat in November means investing early, so if you’re ready to support this work today, here are the ways you can power our campaign:**
* [A $10 donation](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6657?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.A4US0E&refcode=MB_EM_FR_010526_B1_KickOff&t=2&akid=5759%2E196590%2ElZ-dZv) pays for an order of bumper stickers and buttons.
* [A $25 donation](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3522?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.YA9eVU&refcode=MB_EM_FR_010526_B1_KickOff&t=3&akid=5759%2E196590%2ElZ-dZv) covers flyers for one block.
* [A $50 donation](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6658?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.foJ3MA&refcode=MB_EM_FR_010526_B1_KickOff&t=4&akid=5759%2E196590%2ElZ-dZv) funds one canvassing shift.
* [A $100 donation](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6659?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.BguB-B&refcode=MB_EM_FR_010526_B1_KickOff&t=5&akid=5759%2E196590%2ElZ-dZv) goes towards airing our ads to counter GOP misinformation.

[Will you help us kick off election year with a contribution today?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_010526_B1_KickOff&t=6&akid=5759%2E196590%2ElZ-dZv) Wisconsin has always been a battleground state, and this race will be no different. With the Trump administration wreaking havoc on everyday Wisconsinites, our families can’t take much more corruption, chaos, and increased costs. The latest polls show that I’m leading this race, but we can’t take that for granted. The GOP will be spending massive amounts of money to keep this state red, which is why I need your help to fight back. [How much are you able to donate today? clean_body: I just got out of a meeting with my team, and we have a big year ahead of us. | Hi there, 2026 is here and I’m ready to hit the ground running. I just got out of a meeting with my team, and we have a big year ahead of us. Winning this governor’s seat in November means investing early, so if you’re ready to support this work today, here are the ways you can power our campaign: pays for an order of bumper stickers and buttons. covers flyers for one block. funds one canvassing shift. goes towards airing our ads to counter GOP misinformation. Wisconsin has always been a battleground state, and this race will be no different. With the Trump administration wreaking havoc on everyday Wisconsinites, our families can’t take much more corruption, chaos, and increased costs. The latest polls show that I’m leading this race, but we can’t take that for granted. The GOP will be spending massive amounts of money to keep this state red, which is why I need your help to fight back. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Undeniable
body:
Peter, this is incredible:
First, experts at _The Cook Political Report_ increased our chances of winning this race. The strength of our grassroots movement right out of the gate was undeniable.
Then, everyone from _CNN_ to _MSNBC_ said the Senate was officially in play – and we know that the path to retaking the majority runs straight through Ohio.
**Now, not one but _two_ recent polls show me leading my Republican opponent, Jon Husted!**
The momentum is behind us, but I need your help to keep it going. Corporate special interests are going to spend millions to defeat me, and the only way I can fight back and win is if folks like you pitch in at key moments like this.
**[So please, will you give $5 split with Wes Moore or more now to help us surge ahead in the polls, flip this critical seat, and take back the Senate?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260105-1.d-zb4W&refcode=em-20260105-1&t=1&akid=1162%2E1086043%2E6Wvo3E)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260105-1.d-zb4W&amount=5&refcode=em-20260105-1&t=20&akid=1162%2E1086043%2E6Wvo3E)**
Thank you, Peter. I appreciate it.
Sherrod
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260105-1.d-zb4W&refcode=em-20260105-1&t=21&akid=1162%2E1086043%2E6Wvo3E)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260105-1&t=22&refcode2=1162_1086043_6Wvo3E&akid=1162%2E1086043%2E6Wvo3E)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=1162%2E1086043%2E6Wvo3E)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1162%2E1086043%2E6Wvo3E)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Peter - We just saw the seventh stamp price increase in recent years!

All while service standards are dropping, and more and more post offices are closing every single day.

The truly horrific legacy of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy continues to haunt us all. That’s why we need URGENT action to save USPS!
Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is LEADING the fight to save USPS from Trump’s devastation. Sign the petition now to stand with USPS and oppose Trump’s price increases >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4nv3Rv2fOU-2_Q9l6lO7aA2]

CLICK HERE: SIGN THE PETITION → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4nv3Rv2fOU-2_Q9l6lO7aA2]

Donald Trump is determined to take over and DEVASTATE the United States Postal Service’s essential services, but we’re not going to let that happen.

→ Trump said he wants to personally take over the Post Office and even called the agency a “tremendous loser.”

→ Trump said he supports privatizing the Postal Service and opposed funding for the agency because of his campaign against mail-in voting.

→ Remember, Trump installed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, who was responsible for slower services, mail delays, overworked postal workers, and so much more.

This latest price increase is just the latest warning sign.

So today, we’re calling on every single Democrat from 18326 to stand with the Postal Service against Trump’s devastating attacks. Sign our petition NOW to support your local post office >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4nv3Rv2fOU-2_Q9l6lO7aA2]

But Republicans will spend MILLIONS to flip this seat red.

name: Cori Bush
subject: In 2026, let's rise up together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs]
You were there when I needed you the most, Peter. I don’t take that for granted.
Now, I’m running for Congress again, and every insider and special interest that wants us to fail is watching. They’re waiting to see if we can raise the money it takes to run this campaign. That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me again as I run for Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs]
If we fall short, they’ll say our movement is finished. If we rise up together, they’ll see the truth: we still have fight in us.
When I ran before, we shocked the establishment by building a campaign powered by people, not special interests. We did it once, and we can do it again. But we’ll need a steady base of support that shows we’re in this for the long haul.
To win , we need to prove that this campaign has the strength, energy, and grassroots power to win.
That’s why I’m asking you to become a monthly supporter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs&recurring=1] today.
Your recurring gift is more than a donation; it’s a commitment to keeping this movement alive. It’s an opportunity to show up for St. Louis and what matters most to our communities.
Will you join me with a monthly gift of $5, $10, or $20 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs&recurring=1]
BECOME A MONTHLY SUPPORTER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs&recurring=1]
Every brick counts. Every month matters. Together, we’re building a movement that can’t be bought and won’t be silenced.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260105_brickbybrick_actrs&recurring=1]
Paid for by Cori For Us

PO Box 12404
St. Louis, MO 63132
United States

clean_body: I'd be honored to have your citizen endorsement.| | | Click here if you wish to unsubscribe Dear Peter, I sent this a few weeks ago, but I am hoping to get it to the top of your inbox today. I am just looking for your name to add to my supporter list today. I want to kick-start 2026 by adding 100 more names this week, and I would appreciate your support. We have a long campaign ahead , and your boost of support will give me the energy I need to keep going! Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor & 2026 Candidate for Governor \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Nancy Dahlstrom <nancy@mail.nancyforalaska.com> Date: Fri, Dec 19, 2025 Subject: Can you fill this out? (I just need your name) To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Peter, the race to be Alaska's next governor is going to come down to two fundamental questions : 1) Who has the experience to lead our state in these complicated times? 2) Who will work best with President Trump to unleash Alaska's full potential? I'm not asking for money, just your name. I believe in earning every vote , and I certainly don't take your support for granted. But if you agree that my 20-plus years of public service from the legislature, the Department of Corrections, and as Alaska's Lieutenant Governor is a record that shows I'm ready to lead, President Trump has called me a "Proven Fighter," and I can't wait to prove him right every day, fighting for YOU while we work together to usher in Alaska's Golden Age. Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor and 2026 Republican candidate for governor | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P.O.Box 770725, Eagle River, Alaska 99577

Peter,

We're watching something important happen across the country, and we want to know where you stand.

[**Are you planning to vote for Democrats in 2026? Take our quick poll >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122739689/593301965/350977001?ms=em26_260105_sotr_e1srv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em26_260105_sotr_e1srv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em26_260105_sotr_e1srv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260105_sotr_e1srv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=5W9sAVqfQUb0q1h2GD3mcxopb7TXl28YpoXoACvAJjFevcq+i5mlZkPq1FRxd+a5v1szalX6j8tZdVMVT8rDAhqTd4XPvZgbzgmjOla4fM75/bNSYenIQTgv8QsofHCC8YWfcehEkoSdmxbfntxxEfrE2faP5TVowgNafQw1P18=&refcode2=f9138f91-7eea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTEzOGY5MS03ZWVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VjZJuTUuvkkv-HIKyZeURuveCc0FeJ9kFsRqkphqmaU=&emci=2aad583f-51ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=f9138f91-7eea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=15820338)

All 2025, the results rolled in—from the Wisconsin Supreme Court race to the special election in Tennessee to local races in Georgia, Iowa, and states all across the country: **Democrats are winning tough elections, and even when we don't win, we're outperforming expectations in places Republicans thought they had locked down.**

In race after race, voters are making their voices clear. People are fed up with the chaos and cruelty in the GOP agenda. They're tired of the manufactured crises, political games, and the refusal to solve real problems. Americans nationwide are ready for leadership that focuses on the issues they care about, listens to families, and actually gets things done. They want change, and Democrats are offering exactly that.

Momentum is on our side, Peter. As we start 2026, _**Democrats now have a 63% chance to retake the House majority.**_ But just like every other race Democrats have faced, we'll need to keep up the hard work to win. That means more door knocking, more conversations with voters, and, yes, continued participation from this grassroots team. So, we just have one simple question to ask:

[**Are you ready to vote for Democrats this November? They want change, and Democrats are offering exactly that. Momentum is on our side, Peter. As we start 2026, Democrats now have a 63% chance to retake the House majority. But just like every other race Democrats have faced, we'll need to keep up the hard work to win. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Trump wants to run Venezuela
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Swalwell for Governor 2026
body:
Another broken promise. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122739992/593303049/-2131621047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjBjOWMwOC04MGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhGzYXCcSmrCcjHkdcnigyO7x0cC5kpzDGkZl08H898=)
---
Friends, Donald Trump promised to end all wars on day one. Instead, he’s starting them. In just two weeks, he has bombed Syria, Nigeria, and now Venezuela. This is just another broken promise and a total betrayal of the platform that got him elected. He promised to lower costs. Instead, his "tariff tax" sent prices soaring through the holidays. He promised to release the Epstein files. Instead, he’s still hiding them. **Now, he wants to run Venezuela? This guy couldn't even run a casino. And he’s failing to run our own country.** There are a lot of bad guys in the world, many of them with arrest warrants — like Vladimir Putin. But in a democracy, the President does not get to lawlessly abduct foreign leaders or occupy nations without the consent of Congress and the people’s representatives. When Congress returns tomorrow, we face a simple choice: Do we check or cosign the President? Are we still a democracy? Will we demand that the President tell us the length of time, the number of troops, and define the terrain that’s going to be covered in this new conflict? The truth is, the people of California aren’t focused on Venezuela. They’re focused on the rent in Los Angeles, the cost of living in Ventura and Vallejo, and the price of groceries in Pleasanton. **My job as Governor is what Donald Trump’s job should be: Get prices the hell down now!** \- Eric
| Democrat Eric Swalwell is running for Governor to make California affordable. He is a husband, a father of three, and one of the most outspoken members of Congress.
---
[**Eric's counting on your support to win this race! Please donate today to help us build a campaign that can go the distance.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122739993/593303050/-2131621047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjBjOWMwOC04MGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhGzYXCcSmrCcjHkdcnigyO7x0cC5kpzDGkZl08H898=)

name: Bob Brooks
subject: Help a couple of firefighters put out the huge dumpster fire engulfing Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB BROOKS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Guys like me and Sam are not only going to extinguish the fire in DC, but build something better from the ashes.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122740121/593303439/-1559916131?refcode=email_010526_forstag&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjAxOTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUzN2UwZGEtODBlYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IZZ8ApCm00OSpq4VwSHTWU0CXEInrrg_Z7i2o_7NzVU=) Peter, who do you call to put out a fire?? Especially if it’s a five-alarm fire engulfing our federal government? Sounds like you need some firefighters for a job this big, right? Well, I got some news you might like to hear then. **Another firefighter just announced his run for Congress. His name is Sam Forstag and he’s running to flip a competitive seat out in Montana.** Sam is a smokejumper, which means he parachutes into remote areas to stop wildfires before they can grow. It takes a lot of skill and a lot of heart to be a wildland firefighter like Sam. It’s impressive stuff! And not only do we share a firefighting background but a strong union background as well. Sam is also a union leader. He proudly serves as vice president of his union’s local. [**Both myself and Sam have built careers on public service and hard work. Another firefighter just announced his run for Congress. His name is Sam Forstag and he’s running to flip a competitive seat out in Montana. Sam is a smokejumper, which means he parachutes into remote areas to stop wildfires before they can grow. It takes a lot of skill and a lot of heart to be a wildland firefighter like Sam. name: Sean McCann
subject: I’d appreciate your input
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SEAN MCCANN
body:
ACTION NEEDED

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122740133/593303538/510768709?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWMwNmUyMi04MWVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IouJZC9TT0RLVJ9Xw400N9pXCGOcpN80fL4lCHF_bYs=) I’ve spent most of my life serving Kalamazoo and the people of Southwest Michigan. And one of the most important lessons I’ve learned is that, to serve effectively, you have to address what people _actually_ need. And that starts with showing up and listening. Nowadays, too many politicians talk AT people instead of listening TO them – and honestly, I’m tired of it. That’s never been how I do things, and it’s not how I’ve been running this campaign either. **So today, I’m reaching out because I want to hear from you. What are your top priorities for 2026? What issues are keeping you up at night? What do you need from your representatives in Washington?** **_[Please take a minute out of your day to let me know! Every response will help us build a stronger strategy to flip this seat and I’d really appreciate knowing how I can best help you and your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122740134/593303549/2058698667?refcode=email_010526_prioritiessurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWMwNmUyMi04MWVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IouJZC9TT0RLVJ9Xw400N9pXCGOcpN80fL4lCHF_bYs=&emci=9f6bf314-4ce0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=f5c06e22-81ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=53530095)_** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122740135/593303564/2058698667?refcode=email_010526_prioritiessurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWMwNmUyMi04MWVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IouJZC9TT0RLVJ9Xw400N9pXCGOcpN80fL4lCHF_bYs=&emci=9f6bf314-4ce0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=f5c06e22-81ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=53530095)

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Can I be honest with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1512%2E251025%2E4Jxa6k ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1512%2E251025%2E4Jxa6k ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Can I be honest with you? I’m about to ask for your support even though I
don’t love asking for money.

But before you close out of this email, I’m asking for one minute of your
time — because this election year is do-or-die for the future of our
Democratic Party, and I want to be straight with you about why.

Still here? Thank you. I appreciate you, truly. 🙏

Look, we are officially in 2026 now. That means the attention, the money,
and the pressure around this race are only going to intensify from here
on.

The political chatter will become more chaotic the closer we get to
Election Day, and by then, it can be extremely difficult to break through
the noise. That’s why I want to tell you this now:

We can win this competitive primary AND defeat Mike Rogers this November —
but there’s a big “if” to that.

Before I delve into what the “if” is, I’d like to remind you that after
losing a presidential election to a creepy authoritarian billionaire, too
many party bosses and think tank consultants decided the ideal approach to
campaigning was to run on a say-nothing, stand-for-nothing platform.

Michigan is the epicenter of whether that approach wins or fails.

We have a wide-open primary, and whoever wins it will have to fight
Trump’s handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers, for a must-win Senate seat. If
we get this wrong in Michigan, it won’t just cost us one Senate seat — it
could set back any real effort to rebuild this party for years.

And the same old guard forces that botched the last election already have
their thumb on the scale here. They’ve lined up behind a candidate who
votes like a Republican when it counts, takes corporate PAC money without
hesitation, and boasts about receiving AIPAC’s endorsement.

Their strategy is simple: Stay quiet, cash in the checks, and hope enough
TV ads can drown out our message.

They’re dead wrong. I know we have what it takes to win. Depending on the
poll, we’re nearly tied for first or second place. We’re also
laser-focused on things that the majority of
Americans
support:

* Putting more money in your pockets
* Getting money out of politics
* Passing Medicare for All

But there’s still that big “if” I’ve been mentioning throughout this
email.

Peter, we can
only win this competitive primary and defeat Mike Rogers IF we have the
resources to respond to attacks, spread our message, and reach enough
swing voters across Michigan.

Once AIPAC and the MAGA money machine start funneling millions of dollars
into Michigan to boost their preferred candidates, it’ll already be too
late to do anything about it if we haven’t built a strong enough
foundation to prepare.

That’s where the magic of this grassroots team comes in,
Peter.

I know you likely can’t afford to contribute a massive amount of money at
once, but with our recurring donation program, you can give a little each
month that ends up having a huge impact on our campaign.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/543?c0=em-ms-aes-20260105-1-ak.e7UqwI&amount=10&refcode=em20260105-1511&t=1004&akid=1512%2E251025%2E4Jxa6k ]So if you’re able to, will you start a monthly contribution of any
amount today and help us get ready for the fight ahead?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/543?c0=em-ms-aes-20260105-1-ak.e7UqwI&amount=10&refcode=em20260105-1511&t=1023&akid=1512%2E251025%2E4Jxa6k ]Donate $10 monthly ››

Thank you for taking the time to read this. I know your time is valuable,
and I hope this left you feeling what I feel every day on the trail — that
together, we can win.

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1512%2E251025%2E4Jxa6k
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1512%2E251025%2E4Jxa6k

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Derek, Mark Kelly here.
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
**[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Adam Schiff and me so we can fight back.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12026_abs_em_kelly.peiHpg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20260105_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=9382%2E5257348%2EMog4IU)**

subject: I’m taking a big political risk.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_riveraccessvideo?refcode=x_260105_riveraccess3_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_riveraccessvideo?refcode=x_260105_riveraccess3_act]
David Seligman here, candidate for Colorado Attorney General. A lot of people said I shouldn’t send this email , but I won’t back down.
For decades, billionaire landowners and special interests have sown confusion about who can access Colorado’s rivers and streams, telling rafters and anglers they could be arrested, sued, or even shot for floating or wading through waters that belong to all of us. This leaves everyday people unsure whether stepping into a river could land them in court.
That ends on my first day as attorney general.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_riveraccessvideo?refcode=x_260105_riveraccess3_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_riveraccessvideo?refcode=x_260105_riveraccess3_act]
This isn’t just a fight about public land and water— this is about whether those with wealth and power have to play by the same rules as the rest of us.
I’ve spent my entire career standing with everyday people, taking on powerful interests in an economy rigged against us. Now, I’m bringing that same fight to every community across our state.
To kick off 2026, will you consider donating $5, $10, or $20 to help me fight back against the powerful interests opposing my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_riveraccessvideo?refcode=x_260105_riveraccess3_act]

Your support right now helps us build the momentum to take on billionaires and oligarchs like those hoarding Colorado’s rivers for themselves. We know s pecial interests and billionaires are watching this race, ready to protect the status quo that works for them. I’m running to make sure the law works for you instead.
With gratitude,
David
