name: Tim Walz
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/64?t=1&akid=414%2E34582%2E3zeTjL)
Hi Peter,
Like many Minnesotans, I was glad to turn the page on 2025. It was an extraordinarily difficult year for our state.
In September, I announced that I would run for a historic third term as Minnesota’s Governor. And I have every confidence that, if I gave it my all, I would succeed in that effort.
But as I reflected on this moment with my family and my team over the holidays, I came to the conclusion that I can’t give a political campaign my all. Every minute I spend defending my own political interests would be a minute I can’t spend defending the people of Minnesota.
So I’ve decided to step out of the race and let others worry about the election while I focus on the work.
I know this news may come as a surprise. But I’m passing on the race with zero sadness and zero regret. After all, I didn’t run for this job so I could have this job. I ran for this job so I could do this job. Minnesota faces an enormous challenge this year. And I refuse to spend even one minute of 2026 doing anything other than rising to meet the moment. Minnesota has to come first – always.
Today, I’m proud of the work we’ve done to make Minnesota America’s best place to live and raise kids – from our new paid leave policy to our child tax credit to our free lunch program.
And I’m proud of the team we’ve built together, Peter. I can’t thank you enough for your support of my campaign. Thank you for the trust you placed in me, and the generosity you’ve shown me.
With deep gratitude,
Tim Walz

Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=2&akid=414%2E34582%2E3zeTjL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=414%2E34582%2E3zeTjL)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

name: Voter Action Project
subject: What's at stake this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
When it comes to fighting voter suppression, our work is never done. Increasing participation in free and fair elections that are accessible to ALL eligible voters is our #1 goal for 2026, Team.
Unfortunately, this is what we're facing as we start the year:
➜ Mail-in voting is under threat in state legislatures and now from the Supreme Court.
➜ Without vote-by-mail, millions of Americans will not be able to vote.
➜ With the 2026 midterm election around the corner, this is a disaster.
Remember, Team: Attacks on mail-in voting are voter suppression, plain and simple. We need your help now, more than ever. Will you chip in $25 to protect vote-by-mail before it’s too late? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010526_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010526_3&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010526_3&amount=35]
As voters across the country face unprecedented barriers at the ballot box , our fight to defend voting rights continues.
From educating voters on rapidly changing election laws -- like USPS changing the postmark rules -- to ensuring voters have the tools they need to make their voices heard this year, Voter Action Project will continue to stand strong in defense of voters in need, which is why we rely on early support from this team.
We have the momentum, but we have to keep doing the work to keep it going until November.
We’re working overtime to solidify our plans to fight back and ensure every American can cast a ballot in 2026. Can you chip in $25 to support our work today? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010526_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010526_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010526_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: JD Vance
subject: The Senate fight that changes everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate

Houston deserves a representative who will not be silenced |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122740971/593306765/-1181810701?refcode=WUEFHM01_20260105_HWWLaunch_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1057525&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNjMWJlOC04M2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJHT7gvLwCCev_tt9ELGuFTZ-o6Wb7TOCbz51dkH3k4=) Peter, Republican Gov. Greg Abbott left Houston without a representative in Congress for nearly _a year_ — not because there wasn't anyone ready to serve, but because he wanted to silence this solid-Democratic district.

Then Abbott and Trump gerrymandered Texas districts to water down the voting power of residents.

**But this is Amanda Edwards’ home. She will not be silenced._And neither will we_.**

[**That's why today, we're launching Houston Women Win, a project with EMILYs List and Amanda Edwards dedicating to supporting our fight to restore representation for TX-18 and all our crucial work. When Houston families needed help navigating immigration paperwork, federal services, disaster recovery, or urgent healthcare appeals, they had no congressional office to call. The consequences were real: seniors couldn't get medications, small businesses couldn't access federal programs, and families in crisis had nowhere to turn.

We've heard heartbreaking stories from constituents who reached out during emergencies and had no one on the other end of the line — because Greg Abbott made a political decision that ignored the needs of real people.

Amanda is running to change that.

Amanda has lived what so many Texas families experience: rising costs, financial fear, and the knowledge that one emergency could destroy everything. When her father battled cancer, her family lived with constant uncertainty over whether they would be able to afford treatment — and whether insurance would come through.

No family should face ruin because someone they love needs care.

When Hurricane Harvey hit, Amanda didn't wait for press conferences or committees. She went neighborhood by neighborhood — literally knocking on doors — to make sure seniors, disabled neighbors, and families had food, medication, and emergency resources. She coordinated deliveries, checked in relentlessly, and refused to leave anyone behind.

That is what real service looks like.

**If we want a government that works for everyday people, we need representatives who understand that public office is not about performance — it's about responsibility.**

This runoff election will determine whether Houston has a champion in Congress who listens, shows up, and delivers.

name: NEWS ALERT
subject: Empire abroad. Collapse at home.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Illegal regime change abroad. Economic crisis at home. This is what a failed political class looks like.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/9S7JgHKGV5zAgcCBwU5TVw~~/AAUS1hA~/9Hu1xnV9S1-GqaQHnsizzBWo7BTJINHYbIHYUf2-t0JeVZn0LBjy1OYjEtDCXmEtNCGBIEMq2BKd2C13s8V06J5Fs8ojKtrb6yWsKLTYUhr8HACv15Wqj0L4wt-7_goQ)
| | Friend, In the dead of night, the United States launched illegal, unconstitutional attacks on Venezuela’s sovereignty and kidnapped its sitting president. That isn’t security.
That isn’t defense.
That is **regime change by force** \- the same decapitation strategy Washington has used for decades, always with the same disastrous results. Let’s be honest about what this is really about:
Empire expansion.
Oil.
Natural resources.
Power. And while the political class argues over whether Donald Trump should have asked Congress first, almost no one is willing to say the truth out loud: **This was a blatant violation of international law that makes every American less safe.** It’s also a convenient distraction. As the Epstein files resurface - tying Trump directly to one of the most powerful trafficking networks in modern history - we’re told to look away. To focus elsewhere. To accept more chaos abroad while rot deepens at home. And at home, things are breaking fast. Healthcare costs are exploding.
Housing is unaffordable.
Foreclosures and evictions are rising.
Vehicle repossessions are surging.
Student debt defaults and wage garnishments are increasing.
Bankruptcies are climbing.
The job market is weakening. Meanwhile, **the majority of Americans are still living paycheck to paycheck** , while income inequality reaches historic highs. This is what a destructive, unresponsive government looks like. A government willing to bankroll empire and endless intervention - while refusing to act with urgency on healthcare, housing, wages, or cost of living. We are nearly **$40 trillion in debt** , yet somehow there is always money for war, weapons, and regime change - and never enough to help working families survive. This moment demands course correction.
Not tomorrow. Not next election cycle.
**Now.** I’m running for Congress because I refuse to accept this status quo - and because working people deserve leaders who will confront power, not protect it. This campaign is built by people, not war profiteers or corporate interests. If you’re able, please chip in whatever you can today to help us keep organizing, keep telling the truth, and keep fighting for a government that actually serves the people it claims to represent. Even $5 matters. Truly. We don’t have the luxury of waiting anymore. **[Chip in now to stop war profiteering, bring costs down at home, and defeat Lauren Boebert.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8xCVbfrPOYPfnEdGdgBSxg~~/AAUS1hA~/7j6NyfnSgVH3bM29szCvzzInaMzPVlqMzlUe7QO_ljdBe6cUukKmlfeCEajKzGCN_vt3Dbg8fOiMMMLdcDnMAyXV6qrKF8k78sVE9fQq9RHfFWVN2P4l98Lxj8nniF4G2ilz88lgszF2n4CUJ3zSCTp-89Uilky3P3JaVPSoJTI~)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [Chip in $10 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/2qBYVn9UA2M7MYPhGBHbjA~~/AAUS1hA~/kz9DOj2GI977kDerEWT3_tozimV72wGY6zqCdPBj5j4IQOq1fDU1WZ0Z3GX8pJsEZmO0lzrOpBXCAuHGdoY2kr54ufL23QVxwKXcUNvmHFCPmUouMp2MDJ2Ovu093TSxfjN-D7odRJ6jlH9YQhK8L6_No7S3xLTjwqdhhGMJeZzxKtXif6zpMMQ6PJuR692M) | [Chip in $25 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ufMHgItN1jCcxQhLVTecEQ~~/AAUS1hA~/kz9DOj2GI977kDerEWT3_tozimV72wGY6zqCdPBj5j4IQOq1fDU1WZ0Z3GX8pJsEZmO0lzrOpBXCAuHGdoY2kr54ufL23QVxwKXcUNvmHFAk2SauagWzsSGIHaFEviTNRv0V4nT9_hRjOk9Hqi8fBl-aq6VfgjksL2hI-R72bf6tpcSpKhK7MFcJ1kU-QVOO)

clean_body: Illegal regime change abroad. Economic crisis at home. This is what a failed political class looks like. | | | Friend, In the dead of night, the United States launched illegal, unconstitutional attacks on Venezuela’s sovereignty and kidnapped its sitting president. That isn’t security. That isn’t defense. That is regime change by force \- the same decapitation strategy Washington has used for decades, always with the same disastrous results. Let’s be honest about what this is really about: Empire expansion. Oil. Natural resources. Power. And while the political class argues over whether Donald Trump should have asked Congress first, almost no one is willing to say the truth out loud: This was a blatant violation of international law that makes every American less safe. It’s also a convenient distraction. As the Epstein files resurface - tying Trump directly to one of the most powerful trafficking networks in modern history - we’re told to look away. To focus elsewhere. To accept more chaos abroad while rot deepens at home. And at home, things are breaking fast. Healthcare costs are exploding. Housing is unaffordable. Foreclosures and evictions are rising. Vehicle repossessions are surging. Student debt defaults and wage garnishments are increasing. Bankruptcies are climbing. The job market is weakening. Meanwhile, the majority of Americans are still living paycheck to paycheck , while income inequality reaches historic highs. This is what a destructive, unresponsive government looks like. A government willing to bankroll empire and endless intervention - while refusing to act with urgency on healthcare, housing, wages, or cost of living. We are nearly $40 trillion in debt , yet somehow there is always money for war, weapons, and regime change - and never enough to help working families survive. This moment demands course correction. Not tomorrow. Not next election cycle. Now. I’m running for Congress because I refuse to accept this status quo - and because working people deserve leaders who will confront power, not protect it. This campaign is built by people, not war profiteers or corporate interests. If you’re able, please chip in whatever you can today to help us keep organizing, keep telling the truth, and keep fighting for a government that actually serves the people it claims to represent. Even $5 matters. Truly. We don’t have the luxury of waiting anymore. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ~~ ---|--- Let us show that a grassroots movement built on honesty, lived experience and working-class values can rise above fear, division and the politics of the powerful. John Padora Working Dad • Fighter • Engineer Candidate for Congress in CO 04 | Paid for by Padora for Colorado Padora for ColoradoPO Box 116Severance, CO 80546United States "Website"•~~ "Privacy Policy"

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

This may be your last stand to defend your cash from a digital stranglehold. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Congress just rammed We have some horrifying news... name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Let’s keep fighting
body:
| | Peter,

Happy New Year! I am so grateful to you for everything you’ve done to support me over the past few years.

While being in Congress is not without its challenges and frustrations, I’ve remained focused on keeping my head down, blocking out the noise, and working across the aisle to get things done for Southwest Washington. **And Peter, that work has paid off – 2025 has undoubtedly been a productive year.**

Over the past year, we’ve delivered wins for **rural schools, strengthening trades and career and technical education, ensuring farmers can fix their own equipment, lowering energy costs, cutting red tape** , and more.

My office also helped to recover more than **$6 million** for constituents owed to them by federal agencies and secured nearly **$6.4 million** in funding for community-led projects. And, I continued working to hear directly from folks across the entire district about the issues that are most affecting them, holding **7 in-person town halls, 12 mobile office hour sessions, and 12 community roundtables** throughout the course of the year.

**Through it all, I’ve kept my promise to put our community above partisan politics in Congress.**

Peter, it is the honor of a lifetime as your representative. As one of the most targeted seats, we’re going to have to fight tooth and nail this year to keep our seat, and I’ll be counting on your support every step of the way.

Thank you again for everything you’ve already done – now let’s get back to work!

Marie

name: Team Gina
subject: Democrats are coming together around this campaign
body:
Andrew White just endorsed Gina for Texas.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Big news in the Texas Governor’s race today, Peter:
Andrew White — a Democrat who was running for governor — ended his campaign and endorsed Gina Hinojosa because she’s the strongest candidate to defeat Greg Abbott.
That kind of support reflects what more Texans are starting to see: **Gina has the experience, values, and momentum to win this race.**
Greg Abbott is facing 10 Republicans running against him — chaos inside his own party after more than a decade of failed leadership.
Meanwhile, Democrats are starting to come together around the strongest candidate. Now we have to fuel that momentum.

clean_body: Andrew White just endorsed Gina for Texas. Big news in the Texas Governor’s race today, Peter: Andrew White — a Democrat who was running for governor — ended his campaign and endorsed Gina Hinojosa because she’s the strongest candidate to defeat Greg Abbott. That kind of support reflects what more Texans are starting to see: Gina has the experience, values, and momentum to win this race. Greg Abbott is facing 10 Republicans running against him — chaos inside his own party after more than a decade of failed leadership. Meanwhile, Democrats are starting to come together around the strongest candidate. Now we have to fuel that momentum. Thank you, Team Gina Email us: mailto:info@ginafortexas.com

Your representative needs to hear from you today.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741073/593307183/1328794144?refcode=ea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4MDBmNDA2LTg1ZWEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZV8NnsD_w2vptIXvifEFEr9nnk99C0XMH5ThtbfscZU=&emci=ccb9cbe8-6cea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)

Remember when Donald Trump promised Big Oil executives a “great deal” if they poured $1 billion into his campaign? What happened this weekend was proof he’s making good on that promise. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741074/593307184/1797657022?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa%26ms%3Dea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=ea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4MDBmNDA2LTg1ZWEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZV8NnsD_w2vptIXvifEFEr9nnk99C0XMH5ThtbfscZU=&emci=ccb9cbe8-6cea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105) **Hours after the U.S. military carried out strikes in Venezuela and forcibly removed its president, Trump announced that the U.S. would “run the country” and take control of Venezuela’s oil.** Without permission from Congress, without international approval, and without any public plan, Trump unilaterally ordered military action, seized a foreign head of state, and openly declared his intention to control another nation’s resources. Let that sink in. He wants U.S. oil companies to move in, “spend billions of dollars” to rebuild Venezuela's oil infrastructure, and start profiting from the country's resources. He even suggested deploying American troops — without asking Congress — to protect these corporate interests and “ _get the oil flowing._ ” Jane Fonda always says, we owe it to our children and their children to demand better. Ending our dependence on oil is part of that responsibility. Fossil fuels are making people sick, releasing toxic chemicals like dioxins, benzene, and naphthalene into our air, our water, and our food. What’s unfolding now is the inevitable result of fossil fuel greed combined with unchecked executive power and reckless militarism. This moment calls for restraint, diplomacy, and level-headed leadership. Since none of those qualities exist in the White House at this time, we must rely on Congress to act. **The power to declare war belongs to Congress. Not the president. Not the Pentagon. Not fossil fuel executives whispering in the Oval Office.** That’s why the U.S. Senate is preparing to vote on a War Powers Resolution that would force Trump to seek congressional approval before escalating further attacks on Venezuela. **[This vote could happen any day, and your representative needs to hear from you right now. Click here to tell your Congressperson to help us end Trump's war-mongering by passing the War Powers Resolution >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741075/593307185/1797657022?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa%26ms%3Dea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=ea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4MDBmNDA2LTg1ZWEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZV8NnsD_w2vptIXvifEFEr9nnk99C0XMH5ThtbfscZU=&emci=ccb9cbe8-6cea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741076/593307186/1797657022?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa%26ms%3Dea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=ea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4MDBmNDA2LTg1ZWEtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZV8NnsD_w2vptIXvifEFEr9nnk99C0XMH5ThtbfscZU=&emci=ccb9cbe8-6cea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b800f406-85ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)

What happened this weekend was proof he’s making good on that promise. Hours after the U.S. military carried out strikes in Venezuela and forcibly removed its president, Trump announced that the U.S. would “run the country” and take control of Venezuela’s oil. Without permission from Congress, without international approval, and without any public plan, Trump unilaterally ordered military action, seized a foreign head of state, and openly declared his intention to control another nation’s resources. Let that sink in. He wants U.S. oil companies to move in, “spend billions of dollars” to rebuild Venezuela's oil infrastructure, and start profiting from the country's resources. He even suggested deploying American troops — without asking Congress — to protect these corporate interests and “ get the oil flowing. ” Jane Fonda always says, we owe it to our children and their children to demand better. Ending our dependence on oil is part of that responsibility. Fossil fuels are making people sick, releasing toxic chemicals like dioxins, benzene, and naphthalene into our air, our water, and our food. What’s unfolding now is the inevitable result of fossil fuel greed combined with unchecked executive power and reckless militarism. This moment calls for restraint, diplomacy, and level-headed leadership. Since none of those qualities exist in the White House at this time, we must rely on Congress to act. The power to declare war belongs to Congress. Not the president. Not the Pentagon. Not fossil fuel executives whispering in the Oval Office. name: James Talarico
subject: An exclusive look at our first TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
Exciting news: I want to give you an exclusive look at our first TV ad before it starts airing all across Texas tomorrow.
It’s about the fights I’ve led here in Texas against billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians.
This is my first chance to introduce myself to all Texans, and I want you to be among the first to see it.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/1117?c0=jt-em-first-ad.pwvu-v&refcode=em260105-1-ak&t=1&akid=369%2E1347274%2EcxQVKW)
**[Please take 30 seconds to watch our first ad, and I hope you’ll consider making a donation to get our message in front of as many voters as we can.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/1117?c0=jt-em-first-ad.pwvu-v&refcode=em260105-1-ak&t=2&akid=369%2E1347274%2EcxQVKW)**
[WATCH + DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/1117?c0=jt-em-first-ad.pwvu-v&refcode=em260105-1-ak&t=3&akid=369%2E1347274%2EcxQVKW)
The only reason we’re able to start airing TV ads is because of your support. Grassroots donations from supporters like you are fueling this people-powered campaign.
I hope this gets you fired up for these next 8 weeks. We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of voters we still need to reach.
Let’s go win this thing.
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=4&akid=369%2E1347274%2EcxQVKW) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=5&refcode2=369_1347274_cxQVKW&akid=369%2E1347274%2EcxQVKW)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=369%2E1347274%2EcxQVKW).

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: I got up a little too early on Jan. 1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Nobody likes clutter, much like Mariannette Miller-Meeks' leadership; it increases stress, anxiety, and it makes it harder to move forward.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741505/593308814/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE4Y2YzNi04N2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Awu1bp2coouHidOhhEIT8nIc9ahRkRlBZskOL6ir4bY=)

Peter, how did you start your 2026? I'll tell you how I started mine.

I woke up bright and early (a little too early, according to everyone in my house who had to hear my alarm) and got to work on taking down my Christmas decorations, decluttering the house, and tackling some much-needed home organization projects by driving to Lowe's.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741508/593308817/178532079?ms=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=zFKSqjIPWPGkcfFbO31hRFbtbc6LR1W0sJQ7fzuBz2sFFbo1fqe8vFSs8ptq8ncncYBmpdBan5ctD2zBfHIzi++/eZSwJK6Y1oJC8l4Tncm/pr/bIoapGlnMhZDFvuNllXBI9W2aziiE6zNXKWr6Px1KFTRZXQ9cIrKQDXqhkck=&refcode2=e8a8cf36-87ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE4Y2YzNi04N2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Awu1bp2coouHidOhhEIT8nIc9ahRkRlBZskOL6ir4bY=&emci=0ba84bb1-69ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e8a8cf36-87ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=13891890)
Nobody likes clutter, much like Mariannette Miller-Meeks' leadership; it increases stress, anxiety, and makes it harder to move forward. And this year, it's the first thing I tackled to make sure I can be laser-focused on kicking her out of office and bringing leadership back to our district. **[Right now, I'm not going to ask for your money, but I want to know I can count on you as we kick-off election year. Will you sign your name to let me know you're committed to our campaign in 2026?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741510/593308819/178532079?ms=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=zFKSqjIPWPGkcfFbO31hRFbtbc6LR1W0sJQ7fzuBz2sFFbo1fqe8vFSs8ptq8ncncYBmpdBan5ctD2zBfHIzi++/eZSwJK6Y1oJC8l4Tncm/pr/bIoapGlnMhZDFvuNllXBI9W2aziiE6zNXKWr6Px1KFTRZXQ9cIrKQDXqhkck=&refcode2=e8a8cf36-87ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE4Y2YzNi04N2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Awu1bp2coouHidOhhEIT8nIc9ahRkRlBZskOL6ir4bY=&emci=0ba84bb1-69ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e8a8cf36-87ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=13891890)**

I always strive to keep a very tidy house, but as most of us know, it's easy for things to spin out of control while we juggle bills, prioritize family, and get pulled in millions of other directions over the year. While all that is going on, Mariannette Miller-Meeks is making it more difficult for families to thrive in our district by attacking healthcare, our economy, and rubber-stamping any and every party initiative.

**[It's time to clean house, Peter. More specifically, I'm fighting to get Mariannette Miller-Meeks out of the House and clean up her mess. I want to make sure the people of this district can have a sparkling future. If you're with me, add your name to let me know my team and I can count on you>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741513/593308822/178532079?ms=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260105_Declut_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=zFKSqjIPWPGkcfFbO31hRFbtbc6LR1W0sJQ7fzuBz2sFFbo1fqe8vFSs8ptq8ncncYBmpdBan5ctD2zBfHIzi++/eZSwJK6Y1oJC8l4Tncm/pr/bIoapGlnMhZDFvuNllXBI9W2aziiE6zNXKWr6Px1KFTRZXQ9cIrKQDXqhkck=&refcode2=e8a8cf36-87ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE4Y2YzNi04N2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Awu1bp2coouHidOhhEIT8nIc9ahRkRlBZskOL6ir4bY=&emci=0ba84bb1-69ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e8a8cf36-87ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=13891890)**

Thank you,

Christina

clean_body: Nobody likes clutter, much like Mariannette Miller-Meeks' leadership; it increases stress, anxiety, and it makes it harder to move forward. | = Peter, how did you start your 2026? I'll tell you how I started mine. I woke up bright and early (a little too early, according to everyone in my house who had to hear my alarm) and got to work on taking down my Christmas decorations, decluttering the house, and tackling some much-needed home organization projects by driving to Lowe's. Nobody likes clutter, much like Mariannette Miller-Meeks' leadership; it increases stress, anxiety, and makes it harder to move forward. And this year, it's the first thing I tackled to make sure I can be laser-focused on kicking her out of office and bringing leadership back to our district. I always strive to keep a very tidy house, but as most of us know, it's easy for things to spin out of control while we juggle bills, prioritize family, and get pulled in millions of other directions over the year. While all that is going on, Mariannette Miller-Meeks is making it more difficult for families to thrive in our district by attacking healthcare, our economy, and rubber-stamping any and every party initiative. Thank you, Christina Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. Chip in to support her campaign today >> | = = | PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. This is big: **Former GOP Gov. Scott Walker just endorsed our extreme opponent.**
When politicians like Scott Walker jump in, it’s because they’re trying to unlock new donor networks and rally far-right groups behind our extreme opponent — giving them access to even more money and resources.

subject: Thank you for getting us here

body:
We’re starting 2026 off strong

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122741754/593309796/-653362279?amount=25&refcode=b26_em_msg_2025.01.05_b1_rw_allO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBiOGM4NzctODllYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zvODffWCqu_yex1mCMa_bfGCGRnBHn92TDCxUJiABfc=)

Hi friend, I want to share an update with you as we start off 2026 – and say thank you. **Because of your support, we hit our 2025 fundraising goal.** That means a lot. It gives us real momentum and puts us in a strong position to continue the work of building this campaign. Last year, we organized, listened, and showed up across PA-09. The counties in this district shifted 33 points to the left since 2021, and we found out why. We talked to voters who are frustrated with rising costs, tired of broken promises, and ready for a representative who actually works for them. Your support has made that possible, and it will allow us to have more of those conversations and reach voters across the district in the months ahead. **Our focus for 2026 is clear: keep making this race about local issues and working families and keep expanding our grassroots movement. We can do that because of you.** Thank you for helping us reach this milestone. I’m grateful to have you on our team. – Rachel Wallace

name: Trump War Watch via Our Revolution
subject: Add Your Name: Tell Congress No U.S. Occupation of Venezuela!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

🚨🚨 Trump just said the U.S. will ‘run’ Venezuela. 🚨🚨And he made his motive
chillingly clear, boasting: “We’re going to be taking a tremendous amount
of wealth out of the ground.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34918?source=email-20260105&t=1011&akid=10044%2E5885482%2ELH7pDo ]Headline: Trump says U.S. will 'run' Venezuela after capturing Maduro
in surprise military attack

He’s quickly pulling us into yet another endless war about oil and
profits. But here’s the thing: Trump doesn’t have the power to do this
alone – CONGRESS has to authorize war.

Over the weekend, Our Revolution members took the streets to march for
peace, standing tall against Trump and his oil oligarchs. And now we need
to OVERWHELM Congress with pressure to stop Trump’s march to war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34918?source=email-20260105&t=1012&akid=10044%2E5885482%2ELH7pDo ]Add your name now to demand: NO U.S. OCCUPATION OF VENEZUELA! Our
voices will be delivered straight to Congress: No occupation, no endless
war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34918?source=email-20260105&t=1013&akid=10044%2E5885482%2ELH7pDo ]ADD YOUR NAME

We’ve seen this playbook before – in Panama, in Iraq, in Afghanistan.
Trillions spent, countless lives lost or shattered, only for oligarchs and
defense contractors to cash in. Trump doesn’t even bother to hide it. He’s
promising oil profits for American companies, while seizing Venezuelan
sovereignty.

Because let’s be clear: this has NOTHING to do with the Venezuelan people
or their freedom. Instead, Trump and the billionaire class want to wage
war and call it “liberation” – while Big Oil lines its pockets and we all
pay the price.

What we’re seeing is a dangerous escalation of Trump’s authoritarianism,
designed to put the hemisphere under Trump’s thumb. Today it’s Venezuela.
Tomorrow, is it Cuba? Greenland? Who’s next?

Our Revolution supporters already hit the streets over the weekend,
demanding no war with Venezuela. Because we don’t need another endless war
for oil. We need a government that puts people, not profits, first.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34918?source=email-20260105&t=1014&akid=10044%2E5885482%2ELH7pDo ]Photo of OUr Revolution activists protesting the U.S. attcks on
Venezuela

If we don’t stand up, Trump, his inner circle, and his oligarchs will see
our silence as a green light for chaos. Let’s make it clear that the
public does not support this occupation – Venezuelans, not Trump and his
oil cronies, should decide their future. Tell Congress to block any
military action and stop Trump NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34918?source=email-20260105&t=1015&akid=10044%2E5885482%2ELH7pDo ]Together we can stop Trump’s latest rush to war, but only if we
pressure Congress to ACT. Sign now to demand: NO U.S. OCCUPATION OF
VENEZUELA.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34918?source=email-20260105&t=1016&akid=10044%2E5885482%2ELH7pDo ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Our voices will be delivered straight to Congress: No occupation, no endless war. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME We’ve seen this playbook before – in Panama, in Iraq, in Afghanistan. Trillions spent, countless lives lost or shattered, only for oligarchs and defense contractors to cash in. Trump doesn’t even bother to hide it. He’s promising oil profits for American companies, while seizing Venezuelan sovereignty. Because let’s be clear: this has NOTHING to do with the Venezuelan people or their freedom. Instead, Trump and the billionaire class want to wage war and call it “liberation” – while Big Oil lines its pockets and we all pay the price. What we’re seeing is a dangerous escalation of Trump’s authoritarianism, designed to put the hemisphere under Trump’s thumb. Today it’s Venezuela. Tomorrow, is it Cuba? Greenland? Who’s next? Our Revolution supporters already hit the streets over the weekend, demanding no war with Venezuela. Because we don’t need another endless war for oil. We need a government that puts people, not profits, first. [ ]Photo of OUr Revolution activists protesting the U.S. attcks on Venezuela If we don’t stand up, Trump, his inner circle, and his oligarchs will see our silence as a green light for chaos. Let’s make it clear that the public does not support this occupation – Venezuelans, not Trump and his oil cronies, should decide their future. Tell Congress to block any military action and stop Trump NOW! [ ]Together we can stop Trump’s latest rush to war, but only if we pressure Congress to ACT. Sign now to demand: NO U.S. OCCUPATION OF VENEZUELA. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME When we organize, we win. # **White liberals PANIC as REAL Venezuelans bash socialism and praise Trump!**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d81df7a2-e034-4bd6-8891-b1d5ddf05910?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d81df7a2-e034-4bd6-8891-b1d5ddf05910?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Maduro claims he was "kidnapped," pleads not guilty during court appearance **
Toppled Venezuelan despot Nicolas Maduro, 63, **[appeared in shackles and orange prison garb in Manhattan court Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/60c13a09-5fda-438a-9471-02c39907cd86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for his arraignment, declaring "I am here kidnapped... I was captured at my home in Caracas, Venezuela" and pleading not guilty to narco-terrorism, drug, and weapons offenses that could carry the death penalty, while insisting "I am innocent... I am a decent man. I am still president of my country."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9c22999-2089-470f-9f58-4d839bb49472?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Wife Cilia Flores also arraigned, injured during capture:** Maduro's wife, Cilia Flores, 69, appeared alongside him in jail-issued clothing with bandages on her eyelid and temple from injuries her lawyer said she sustained during her "abduction" from Venezuela, identifying herself as "the first lady of the Republic of Venezuela" and telling the judge she is "completely innocent" when asked about her plea.
* **Dramatic courtroom confrontation and bizarre moments:** During proceedings before 92-year-old Judge Alvin Hellerstein, a Venezuelan detractor yelled "Jamas!" (Spanish for "never," pronounced like "Hamas") from the gallery while Maduro proclaimed innocence, and as the ousted tyrant was leaving, protester Pedro Rojas heckled him in Spanish, prompting Maduro to turn and say "I am a man of God" and "I am a prisoner of war."
* **Protesters clash outside courthouse:** Several hundred protesters gathered outside the courthouse before proceedings began, with the NYPD separating pro-Maduro demonstrators from a slightly larger group of Venezuelans and Cubans celebrating his arrest using metal barricades, with one anti-Maduro protester screaming at the pro-Maduro crowd "Eighty percent of you guys don't even understand what I'm saying. You don't speak Spanish!"

* * *
# Venezuela Vice President sworn in as interim president
Delcy Rodriguez, Venezuela's vice president and oil minister, was formally inaugurated Monday as the nation's interim president while former leader Nicolas Maduro appeared in New York federal court on narco-terrorism charges.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6fc8cd6b-592e-4abd-9612-80b82c1d4454?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Family connection:** Rodriguez, 56, a longtime Maduro confidant, was sworn in by her brother Jorge Rodriguez who serves as National Assembly president, during a ceremony that also saw 283 Venezuelan lawmakers elected last May take their oaths of office.
* **Maduro 's legal troubles:** The leadership transition occurred as the former strongman made his U.S. court appearance pleading not guilty of federal narco-terrorism charges, marking a dramatic shift in Venezuela's political landscape following years of international pressure and sanctions.

* * *
# **Minneapolis Hilton Hotel under fire for allegedly canceling ICE agent reservations**
A Hampton Inn by Hilton in Lakeville, Minnesota, is facing federal scrutiny after allegedly **[refusing accommodations to immigration enforcement](https://substack.com/redirect/d74a30ce-e301-4558-a3ee-873c5b71cbe6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** personnel and canceling Department of Homeland Security reservations.
[| | | | | Homeland Security
---
@DHSgov
NO ROOM AT THE INN! @HiltonHotels has launched a coordinated campaign in Minneapolis to REFUSE service to DHS law enforcement. When officers attempted to book rooms using official government emails and rates, Hilton Hotels maliciously CANCELLED their reservations. This is
| 5:27 PM * Jan 5, 2026 * 3.84M Views12.3K Replies * 18.8K Reposts * 56.2K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/a4640eb7-5eab-4ce4-b576-8376f9185102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Email evidence released:** ICE shared correspondence on social media appearing to show hotel staff informing DHS-associated guests the property wouldn't allow ICE or immigration agents to stay, stating "we have noticed an influx of GOV reservations" and warning "we are not allowing any ICE or immigration agents to stay at our property," with follow-up messages canceling bookings after online research linked names to immigration work.
* **DHS condemnation:** Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin accused Hilton of launching "a coordinated campaign in Minneapolis to REFUSE service to DHS law enforcement," questioning "Why is Hilton Hotels siding with murderers and rapists to deliberately undermine and impede DHS law enforcement from their mission to enforce our nation's immigration laws?"
* **Timing with federal operation:** The controversy emerged as CBS News reported the Trump administration deployed approximately 2,000 ICE deportation and Homeland Security Investigations agents to Minnesota as part of an expanded federal crackdown tied to a widening fraud scandal in the state.

ICE's official X account publicly challenged Hilton asking why their Minneapolis team canceled federal law enforcement reservations, while Hilton did not immediately respond to Fox News Digital's request for comment.
* * *
# **Ohio man arrested after attempting break-in at Vice President Vance 's home**
A 26-year-old man with documented mental health issues was taken into custody following an **[attempted break-in at Vice President](https://substack.com/redirect/1053ef5f-246e-41a2-a2f3-bf15025606a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** JD Vance's Cincinnati residence, where he used a hammer to smash windows in the middle of the night.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1053ef5f-246e-41a2-a2f3-bf15025606a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Attack details:** William DeFoor was apprehended after Secret Service personnel heard disturbances near midnight and found DeFoor had broken windows trying to force his way into Vance's property, additionally vandalizing a Secret Service vehicle while approaching the house.
* **Troubled background:** Records indicate DeFoor previously received a two-year mental health treatment order this past April following a vandalism conviction for inflicting $2,000-plus damage on an interior design business, while earlier trespassing accusations were dropped in 2023 after judicial determination he lacked mental capacity to participate in his own defense.
* **Family protection requested:** The vice president expressed gratitude for law enforcement's rapid intervention while asking news organizations to refrain from showing photos of his damaged residence, emphasizing his desire to shield his children.

DeFoor is charged with obstructing official business, criminal damaging, trespassing, and vandalism, with an initial court hearing set for Tuesday.

Troubled background: Records indicate DeFoor previously received a two-year mental health treatment order this past April following a vandalism conviction for inflicting $2,000-plus damage on an interior design business, while earlier trespassing accusations were dropped in 2023 after judicial determination he lacked mental capacity to participate in his own defense. Family protection requested: The vice president expressed gratitude for law enforcement's rapid intervention while asking news organizations to refrain from showing photos of his damaged residence, emphasizing his desire to shield his children. DeFoor is charged with obstructing official business, criminal damaging, trespassing, and vandalism, with an initial court hearing set for Tuesday. * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

# [Wag the Dog in Venezuela: Democrats Must Relentlessly Expose Trump's Treason](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=183410668&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNDEwNjY4LCJpYXQiOjE3Njc2NTYxMzAsImV4cCI6MTc3MDI0ODEzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RanuCcEpF7OSTjTinrqdNeKQab0XVTbQcb3clXaIAuA)
### A foreign crisis as political cover, a presidency spiraling, and Democrats with no excuse left not to call this what it is.
| | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Jan 5

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1134262-7d9f-4a48-af8e-76b496339842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**by Cliff Schecter**_
One can try to get into Donald Trump's head, if one is so inclined. Whether wishing to access his Venezuela "plans" or newest gauche, gold trinket to wield as a sword against the demons constantly whispering _you 're nothing, Donald_.
But I wouldn't recommend it.
My guess is many a shrink or mistress have tried and exited staggering, horrified by what they witnessed. Also, there's not much of value to discover when you go intellectually spelunking in that cavernous, addled bungalow of un-read books, unresolved-Ivanka issues and un-investigated neural diarrhea.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1134262-7d9f-4a48-af8e-76b496339842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I know this, because one of the benefits you get with Blue Amp Media is we peel off into the darkness of potential danger and endless emotional suffering for you. Membership has its privileges.
This is what led us to unhappily predict a Trump land invasion of Venezuela was forthcoming. You can [read the stories that we broke and our predictions about the horde of morally-punctured poltroons of Trump Inc here](https://substack.com/redirect/4de71957-8d80-4915-b90e-6c1d7021ea97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But for this piece wanna talk politics. Because, it is unavoidable with Trump, like misspelling three-letter words or eventually becoming the cause of airborne VD. Trump only cares about power politics and the corrupt spoils it bestows upon him. It's all the overgrown amygdala knows. He'd probably toss Tiffany off the top of Trump Tower if there were a Rolex in it.
_**So for Democrats, getting this right could not be more important in this moment.**_
Rep. Seth Moulton (D-MA) and Sen. Ruben Gallego (D-AZ) are veterans leading the way in responding to Trump's unconstitutional, international war crimes. Venezuela is on tap right now, but ICE, Epstein, tariffs, Trump's billionaire-fluffing, these're all of a piece
**So providing the simple straightforward narrative of Trump, and contrasting who we are, what we 're doing and how we're fighting him, is crucial. **It goes like this:
> Trump and his coterie of cruel, allied, rich-beyond-consequences fucksticks are destroying our democracy and economy to pocket our paychecks and ban our personal freedoms. The Thiels, Musks, Bezos', Zuckerbergs, Ellisons and other self-anointed ruling families meet in backrooms _to decide our rights, our economic station, our very lives as they divvy up their billions in gains at our expense_. They are, in every sense, the exact conspiracy The Right has imagined about The Left for decades.
**This** is the message we must take into the 2026 election if we want an FDR-like blowout that turns out the Democratic base, even those who haven't voted in years, wins over a chunk of the Republican vote, and overwhelmingly cleans up among independents.
So who's hitting the right note and taking the correct tack in responding to Trump's dictatorial attack on Venezuela? Let's see what Seth Moulton's saying. Then take a look at House "Leader," Hakeem Jeffries.
**Here 's Rep. Moulton**:
> Today, the Trump administration carried out an unconstitutional military attack on Venezuela, and once again, they are doing it without a plan, without honesty, and without legal authority.
> **The only consistency we 've received from this administration throughout this engagement has been dishonesty.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1134262-7d9f-4a48-af8e-76b496339842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> Marco Rubio told Congress and the American people days ago this was not about regime change. That was false. He said this was about drugs. That was false. Every step of the way the story changes...the truth does not support what they are doing.
> **..when the Secretary of State lies to Congress, the President lies to the country, we lose Congressional oversight of the military, the rule of law starts to collapse.**
> I served in Iraq during the forever wars. I came to Congress because I saw what happens when lawmakers fail to stop illegal wars built on lies. **That is why I introduced the No Unauthorized War with Venezuela Act,** alongside every Democratic veteran in the House and the ranking members of our national security committees. **Congress has a constitutional responsibility to decide when this country goes to war, not the President acting alone, not based on shifting excuses.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1134262-7d9f-4a48-af8e-76b496339842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> Invading, occupying, or running Venezuela will not fix a single problem facing American families. It will not lower costs. It will not make us safer. It will only put more service members in harm's way without justification or accountability.
> Leadership means telling the truth, even when it is uncomfortable. It means standing up to any administration, Republican or Democrat, that thinks it can wage war without answering to the American people.
> That is exactly what I am doing, and it's a fight we can only win if we all stand together in holding this corrupt administration accountable.
That's it. That simple.
Tell a simple story--the truth--about what's they did, how it's wrong, how we'll fight to make it right and help Americans. As Moulton said, there are bad people who are "corrupt," telling "lies," and committing "illegal" acts. Good Americans must stop them, "telling you the truth" even when it's "uncomfortable" because that's what those without bone-spur-hampered courage do.
* * *
Furious about this Wag the Dog war? So are we! Subscribe for free to stay in the loop.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.t15Y99bPPOAsUThYo-JCXGu3QcQ6HNpqk_wUSWuCCXE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=183410668)
* * *
**Now this statement by Rep. Jeffries:**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1134262-7d9f-4a48-af8e-76b496339842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> Nicolas Maduro is a criminal and authoritarian dictator who has oppressed the people of Venezuela for years. He is not the legitimate head of government. Undoubtedly, the rule of law and democracy have broken down in Venezuela and the people of that country deserve better.
> "Donald Trump has the constitutional responsibility to follow the law and protect democratic norms in the U.S. That is what putting America First requires.
> "The Trump administration has not sought congressional authorization for use of military force and failed to properly notify Congress in advance of the operation in Venezuela. The promotion of security and stability in a region requires more than just military force as we painfully discovered in Iraq and Afghanistan.
> "Far too many questions remain unanswered, including whether further military actions are planned. First, how many American troops remain on the ground in Venezuela? Second, what does 'America is going to run Venezuela until a judicious transition takes place' mean? Third, were military strikes about seizing foreign oil to benefit friends of the Trump Admin? Fourth, why did Trump pardon the former Honduran President, a narco trafficker convicted in an American court of law, but willing to take us to war in Venezuela in connection with similar allegations?
> Pursuant to the Constitution, the framers gave Congress the sole power to declare war as the branch of government closest to the American people. The House and Senate must be briefed immediately and compelling evidence to explain and justify this unauthorized use of military force should be presented forthwith.
#### **Anyone Spot A Difference There Besides EVERYTHING?**
Where Moulton leads from a position of strength going straight after Trump, defining him as corrupt, a criminal, and a liar, Jeffries goes straight for...Maduro. Telling us how bad a dude Maduro is right in the lede. Like he's insecure and needs to justify he's his opposition to Trump's tyranny by also saying "but I don't like him either!"
_There 's an old saying in politics: If you're explaining you're losing. And Jeffries is explaining like a MFer._
Where Moulton defines the Don the Dingo's actions in the harshest terms--criminal, dishonest, corrupt; refers to Marco Rubio as a "snake" and "liar,"--Jeffries...asks Trump questions. Really, this was the best he and his people could or would do.
Our dictator just attacked a sovereign nation and killed 100 people, many of whom were civilians, without meeting his constitutional duty to share it with, and seek counsel from, Congress. Oh, I'm sorry, he's made that partisan too. He told MAGA chuds like Tom Cotton.
[2026 is our year - join us!](https://substack.com/redirect/e1134262-7d9f-4a48-af8e-76b496339842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Just not Democrats, as Rep. Jim Himes pointed out he was left in the dark. So war is now partisan too.
Back to Jeffries, who's asking him how many troops will stay on the ground and whether this is about oil...as if he'll answer your questions, and if he does, it'll be honest? Is this real?? I know you are too smart not to know who this man is, so you must know you'll get nothing. In other words, you sent out a form letter to check a box but actually offer nothing of any political, legal, or constitutional value.
**Let me put it this way: are you kidding me?**
In Jeffries' rhetoric, there is no sentence such as: "your actions are illegal, but what should we expect from a lifetime con man, convicted felon, the man most responsible for the January 6th coup attempt, per prosecutor Jack Smith." Instead we get:
> Pursuant to the Constitution, the framers gave Congress the sole power to declare war as the branch of government closest to the American people. The House and Senate must be briefed immediately.
WHAT? Is this a dissertation? A class lecture? _Does he think this accomplishes one GD thing in terms of political communication!??_
There's no "...Trump broke the law, " just "...Trump has the constitutional responsibility to follow the law." Gee, thanks for pointing that out. Anyone reading what you wrote knows that**....but they have no idea if he actually did follow the law **_**because you didn 't bother to tell them**_**.** What. Are. We. Doing . Here??
Why didn't you add in a School House Rock song for more punch?
Republicans are a fascistic party of Christian Nationalists who gorge on gold like they're Jabba the Hutt sucking down amphibians. They don't believe laws apply apply to them. Their leader is a caricature of of a Sacha Baron Cohen dictator.
Yet if we let Jeffries and Schumer run our strategy, tactics and messaging, as opposed to Gallego and Moulton, we'll find a way to lose a generational chance to change the direction of this country. With the headwinds Republicans face, we'll probably still win. But that isn't enough. We need to rout them.
I'm tired of having this same conversation. If we want to have the kind of victory that saves us from the Stalinists, either Jeffries or Schumer must let others be the faces and have real responses.
Or they must step aside.
**There is not third choice for democracy.**
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1134262-7d9f-4a48-af8e-76b496339842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

### **Topics Covered in This Video**
1. Venezuela and why I see it as a sign of American decline, not the core story
2. Energy security and the U.S. failure to expand power generation compared to China
3. America's inability to build major infrastructure and execute large projects
4. Debt, deficits, and how fiscal constraints limit future investment
5. Why the U.S. defaults to military power when economic and industrial capacity fall behind
6. A Venezuelan perspective on Maduro, public sentiment, and regional instability
7. My 2025 "most interesting stories" review, including China and AI economic warfare, stablecoins and the privatization of the dollar, Ohio marijuana reform, redistricting, turnout, and political winners
8. Wrap-up and audience Q&A

name: Robert Garcia
subject: I am calling for a War Powers vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Trump is leading us into a war with Venezuela
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122742671/593312429/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWIzYTY3MC04YmVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CyHBVIa4cdsIzwzdZ8TRha5tEffdov1a3y37OwzfgJA=)
This is Congressman Robert Garcia, the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
President Trump is leading us toward war with Venezuela — without Congress, without accountability, and without the Constitution.
**Let me be clear: this is dangerous, unconstitutional, and unacceptable.**
The Trump administration has all but admitted the truth — this is about oil and control, not democracy. While Nicolás Maduro is a brutal dictator, that does not give any president the authority to launch a war or pursue regime change on their own. The Constitution is clear: only Congress can authorize war.
Instead of lowering costs, fixing health care, or helping families here at home, Donald Trump is once again steering the country toward another foreign conflict. We’ve seen where this road leads. Endless war. Lost lives. Trillions of taxpayer dollars wasted.
**_Congress must act immediately._**
**I am calling for a War Powers vote to block any unauthorized military action against Venezuela. And we need Republicans to step up and put the Constitution over party — before it’s too late.**
_If you believe no president should be able to start a war alone...
If you believe Congress must do its job...
If you believe America cannot afford another reckless conflict..._
[**Add your name now and demand Congress join me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122742672/593312430/1288622638?refcode=260105_RG_warpower-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWIzYTY3MC04YmVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CyHBVIa4cdsIzwzdZ8TRha5tEffdov1a3y37OwzfgJA=&emci=a881726a-8bea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=6ab3a670-8bea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=16877361)
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122742673/593312431/1288622638?refcode=260105_RG_warpower-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWIzYTY3MC04YmVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CyHBVIa4cdsIzwzdZ8TRha5tEffdov1a3y37OwzfgJA=&emci=a881726a-8bea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=6ab3a670-8bea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=16877361)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia

**After delivering a decisive America First victory, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth is now under the most intense attack of his career.** _**

Because Pete Hegseth did what strong leaders do.

**✅ He stood with President Trump.**

**✅ He stood up to a narco-terrorist dictator.**

**✅ He put America’s safety first — without apology.**

Following the successful operation that removed Venezuelan strongman Nicolas Maduro from power, Secretary Hegseth spoke plainly and powerfully to the American people:
**“Nicolás Maduro had his chance,” Hegseth said. “Just like Iran had their chance until they didn’t and until he didn’t.”** **“This is America First. This is peace through strength.”**
**_That message shook Washington._**

Now the media and the Radical Left are working overtime to **tear him down** , discredit his leadership, and force him out.

**Let’s be clear about what Pete Hegseth represents:**
**🇺🇸 Strength instead of weakness**

**🇺🇸 Action instead of excuses**

**🇺🇸 An America that protects its people, its borders, and its future**
Maduro was warned and he ignored it.

President Trump and Pete Hegseth acted — decisively.

And now Pete Hegseth is paying the price for refusing to bow to the political class.

clean_body: We need every Trump voter to read this... | | | | 🚨 THIS IS AN EMERGENCY UPDATE 🚨 After delivering a decisive America First victory, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth is now under the most intense attack of his career. Why? Because Pete Hegseth did what strong leaders do. ✅ He stood with President Trump. ✅ He stood up to a narco-terrorist dictator. ✅ He put America’s safety first — without apology. Following the successful operation that removed Venezuelan strongman Nicolas Maduro from power, Secretary Hegseth spoke plainly and powerfully to the American people: “Nicolás Maduro had his chance,” Hegseth said. “Just like Iran had their chance until they didn’t and until he didn’t.” “This is America First. This is peace through strength.” That message shook Washington. Now the media and the Radical Left are working overtime to tear him down , discredit his leadership, and force him out. Let’s be clear about what Pete Hegseth represents: 🇺🇸 Strength instead of weakness 🇺🇸 Action instead of excuses 🇺🇸 An America that protects its people, its borders, and its future Maduro was warned and he ignored it. President Trump and Pete Hegseth acted — decisively. And now Pete Hegseth is paying the price for refusing to bow to the political class. 🚨 THIS IS WHERE YOU COME IN 🚨 We need 25,000 PATRIOTS to stand with Pete Hegseth before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. TAKE ACTION NOW: When strong leaders are attacked, silence is surrender. If Pete Hegseth is pushed out, America First is pushed back. If Pete Hegseth falls, weakness returns to Washington.
